12.1: Yesu kalonga nao kwa simo, “Munhu imoja kahanda mizabibu mumgunda wake. Kazungulusila lwigo mumgunda wake, kahimba hanhu ha kukamila zabibu, kazenga lingo. Abaho kawakodisha walimaji, kafunga mwanza kachola.
12.2: Msimu wa kubawa zabibu viuvikile, kamtuma msang'hanaji kwa awo walimaji yamgalile zabibu kulawa mumgunda wake.
12.3: Lakini walimaji awo wamgoga, wamtowa, wamuwinga makono gaiyeka.
12.4: Abaho kamtuma msang'hanaji iyagwe, ayo nayo wamtowa mdipala na wamgela kinyala.
12.5: Mwene mgunda kamtuma msang'hanaji iyagwe, nayo wamkoma, na kawatuma wayagwe wengi wawatendela vivo, wayagwe wawatowa na wayagwe wawakoma.
12.6: Kakala kasigala na munhu imoja wa kumtuma, nayo kakala mwanage yamnogele ng'hani. Kamtuma kuno kolonga, ‘Omtegeleza mwanangu.’
12.7: Lakini walimaji wailongela, ‘Ino ayo muhazi, lekeni tumkome tusole uhazi wake!’
12.8: Avo wamgoga, wamkoma wamwasila kunze ya umgunda wa imizabibu.”
12.9: Yesu kawauza, “Vino mwene mgunda kotendaze? Kokwiza kuwakoma walimaji wose na kowakodisha walimaji wayagwe mgunda awo wa mizabibu.
12.10: Hamgasomile Maandiko Gang'alile vigalonga, ‘Dibwe wadilemile wazengaji, Sambi digalamuka dibwe kulu kubanza gose.
12.11: Mbuli ino itendigwa na Mndewa, nayo yotukanganya!’ ”
12.12: Vilongozi wa Wayahudi walonda kumgoga Yesu, kwavija wajuwa lusimo luno kawalonga wao. Lakini waludumba lunhu lwa wanhu, avo wamuleka wasegela. Mbuli ya kuliha kodi (Matayo 22:15-22; Luka 20:20-26)
12.13: Mafalisayo wayagwe na wanhu wa Helode wakala watumigwe kwa Yesu, wamgoge kwa mbuli zake.
12.14: Wamcholela wamulongela, “Mfundiza, tokujuwa gweye kwa munhu ulonga ukweli, humdumba munhu yoyose, hutonga ukulu wa munhu. Lakini gweye kofundiza goyolonda Imulungu wanhu wagatende. Tulongele, vino vinoga kuliha kodi kwa Mndewa wa Lumi hebu havinogile bule? Tulihe hebu sikutulihe?”
12.15: Lakini Yesu kaujuwa ubala wao kawauza, “Habali monigeza? Ngalileni isente niilole.”
12.16: Wamgalila isente, nayo kawauza, “Vino kihanga kino cha nani? Na twaga dino da nani?” Wamwidika, “Va Mndewa wa Lumi.”
12.17: Yesu kawalongela, “Mgweleleni Mndewa wa Lumi vili va Mndewa wa Lumi, na mgweleleni Imulungu vili va Imulungu.” Nao wamkanganya Yesu. Mbuli ya kuzilibuka (Matayo 22:23-33; Luka 20:27-40)
12.18: Abaho Masadukayo, wanhu olonga kuduhu kuzilibuka kulawa kwa wafile. Wayagwe wamcholela Yesu wamulongela,
12.19: “Mfundiza, Musa katwandikila, ‘Munhu yahafa na kuleka mwehe wake bila wana, ndugu yake munhu ayo kolondigwa yamsole mgane ayo, yamulelele ndugu yake yafile wana.’
12.20: Kukala na ndugu saba, ija imkulu kasola mwehe kafa halekile wana.
12.21: Wa kabili nayo kamuhala mgane ayo nayo vivija kafa halekile wana. Vivija kwa wa kadatu kafa halekile wana.
12.22: Abaho kwa wayagwe, wose saba wamsolile mgane ayo wafa hawalekile wana. Ako kumwande, mtwanzi ayo nayo kafa.
12.23: Avo, wanhu wose wafile wahazilibuka mwiisiku ya kuzilibuka, mtwanzi ayo kokuwa mwehe wa nani? Kwavija wose saba wakala wamsolile.”
12.24: Yesu kawedika, “Mweye mopotela! Kwavija hamugajuwile Maandiko Gang'alile hebu udahi wa Imulungu.
12.25: Kwavija wanhu wafile vonda wazilibuke, hawasola wala hawasoligwa okuwa kamba wasenga wa kuulanga.
12.26: Kwa mbuli ya kuzilibuka kwa wanhu wafile, hamusomile mna ikitabu cha Musa mbuli ya kisolo kikwaka? Imulungu kamulongela Musa, ‘Niye na Imulungu wa Abulahamu na wa Isaka na wa Yakobo.’
12.27: Heyo heli Imulungu wa wanhu wafile, ila Imulungu wa wanhu wagima. Avo mweye mopotela ng'hani!” Lagizo kulu (Matayo 22:34-40; Luka 10:25-28)
12.28: Mfundiza Malagizo ga Musa imoja yakalile aho kahulika viwaibamilile. Kona kamba Yesu kawedika goya Masadukayo, avo kamkwesela Yesu kamuuza, “Mna Gamalagizo gose lagizo gani dili kulu?”
12.29: Yesu kamwidika, “Lagizo dili kulu ijo dino, ‘Tegelezeni mweye wanhu wa Izilaeli! Mndewa Imulungu wetu ayo Mndewa yaiyeka.
12.30: Mnogele Mndewa Imulungu wako kwa moyo wako wose na kwa loho yako yose na kwa nzewele zako zose na kwa nguvu zako zose.’
12.31: Lagizo da kabili kwa ukulu ijo dino, ‘Mnogele miyago kamba viuinogela mwenyego.’ Kuduhu lagizo diyagwe kulu kubanza gano mabili.”
12.32: Mfundiza Malagizo ga Musa kamtogola Yesu, “Mfundiza, kwidika goya viulongile, Mndewa ayo Imulungu na kuduhu iyagwe ila heyo.
12.33: Kumnogela Imulungu wako kwa moyo wako wose na kwa nzewele zako zose na kwa nguvu zako, na kumnogela miyago kamba viuinogela mwenyego, kunoga ng'hani kugoga Malagizo gano mabili kubanza kumulavila Imulungu nhosa za wanyama na nhosa ziyagwe.”
12.34: Yesu viyonile munhu ayo kedika goya, kamulongela, “Huli kutali na Undewa wa Imulungu.” Kusongela aho haduhu munhu yoyose yagezile kumuuza Yesu mbuli yoyose. Kilisito Mkombola ayo nani (Matayo 22:41-46; Luka 20:41-44)
12.35: Yesu viyakalile kofundiza Mng'anda ya Imulungu, kawauza, “Habali wafundiza Malagizo ga Musa olonga Kilisito Mkombola mwana wa Daudi?
12.36: Loho Yang'alile kamulongoza Daudi kulonga, ‘Mndewa Imulungu kamulongela Mndewa wangu, Kala hano hana umwambu wa mkono wangu wa kudila mbaka niweke hasi mmagulu gako wanhu wakwihile.’
12.37: “Avo Daudi mwenyego kamkema, ‘Mndewa.’ Avo Kilisito Mkombola kodahaze kuwa mwana wa Daudi?” Yesu kowazuma wanhu mbuli ya wafundiza Malagizo ga Musa (Matayo 23:1-36; Luka 20:45-47) Lunhu lwa wanhu lukala lumtegeleza Yesu kwa kudeng'helela.
12.38: Viyakalile kofundiza, kawalongela, “Muiteganye na wafundiza Malagizo ga Musa, onogelwa kugenda kuno ovala mikanzu mitali na kulamusigwa na wanhu mna gamagulilo,
12.39: osagula vigoda va haulongozi mzing'anda za kumpula Imulungu na kukala hanhu hanogile mna izinyimwilinyimwili.
12.40: Owaboka wagane vinhu na kusola ng'anda zao, abaho oilagusa wanoga kwa kumpula Imulungu mbuli nyingi. Nhaguso yao yokuwa ng'hulu!” Sadaka ya mgane (Luka 21:1-4)
12.41: Yesu kakala behi na kigelo cha kulavila sadaka hana Ing'anda ya Imulungu, kawalola wanhu viwolava sente mkigelo. Matajili wengi walava sente nyingi.
12.42: Abaho keza mgane mkiwa kalava sente mbili ndodo.
12.43: Yesu kawakema wanahina zake kawalongela, “Nowalongela ukweli mgane mkiwa ino kalava sente nyingi mna ikigelo cha sadaka kubanza wose wayagwe.
12.44: Kwavija wose walava vija visigale muutajili wao, lakini mgane ino hamoja na ukiwa wake kalava vose viyelinavo.”

13.1: Yesu viyakalile kosegela kuna Ing'anda ya Imulungu, mwanahina wake imoja kamulongela, “Mfundiza, lola mabwe gano na ng'anda zino vizinogile!”
13.2: Yesu kamwidika, “Kozona ng'anda zino vizili ng'hulu? Haduhu dibwe donda dilekigwe uchanha ya diyagwe, kila dibwe dokwasigwa hasi.” Kugaya na kudununzika (Matayo 24:3-14; Luka 21:7-19)
13.3: Yesu viyakalile kuna Ulugongo lwa Mizeituni, mwambu kwa mwambu na Ng'anda ya Imulungu, baho Petulo na Yakobo na Yohana na Andeleya wamcholela Yesu kinyelegezi.
13.4: Wamulongela, “Tulongele, choni chonda kitendeke kulagusa kipindi cha kulawilila gano gose?”
13.5: Yesu kawalongela, “Muiteganye, munhu yoyose sikuyawavizile.
13.6: Wanhu wengi, okwiza kwa twaga jangu na kulonga, ‘Nene iyo heyo!’ Nao owavizila wanhu wengi.
13.7: Mwahahulika mbuli za ng'hondo kutali na mbuli za ng'hondo mmabehi, sikumudumbe, kwavija gano gose golondigwa galawilile, ila kimambukizo king'hali hakinavika.
13.8: Isi yoitowa na isi iyagwe, undewa oitowa na undewa uyagwe. Kila hanhu hokuwa na mitigisiko mikulu ya isi na lufilili lwa nzala. Gano gose kamba mwanduso wa usungu wa kulela mwana.
13.9: “Na mweye muiteganye. Mogogigwa na kugaligwa mkitala. Motoigwa mna izing'anda za kumpula Imulungu, mogaligwa haulongozi wa wakulu wa isi na wandewa mbuli ya niye, ili muwalongele Mbuli Inogile.
13.10: Lakini kimambukizo king'hali hakinavika, Mbuli Inogile tanhu yolondigwa ipetigwe kwa wanhu wose.
13.11: Mwahagogigwa na kugaligwa mkitala, sikumunyawenyawe mbuli ya kulonga. Kipindi chahavika longeni chochose chonda mugweleligwe. Kwavija mbuli zonda mulonge hazili zenu, ila zolawa kwa Loho Yang'alile.
13.12: Munhu komuhinduka ndugu yake too yakomigwe, na tata komuhinduka mwanage yakomigwe. Wana owahinduka tata zao na mama zao wakomigwe.
13.13: Wanhu wose owehila mweye mbuli ya niye, lakini yoyose yonda yafunge umoyo mbaka kukimambukizo kokomboligwa. Magayo makulu (Matayo 24:15-28; Luka 21:20-24)
13.14: “Vondamuchone, ‘Kinhu kinyolodoke kigala Ubananzi’ kima hanhu si hake. Munhu yosoma yavijuwe, waja weli mwiisi ya Yudea wakimbilile kuna ivigongo.
13.15: Munhu yeli mkiswili cha ng'anda yake sikuyahumuluke hasi mna ing'anda yake kusola kinhu.
13.16: Yeli kumgunda sikuyabwele ukae kusola kiwalo chake.
13.17: Ogaya watwanzi wali na zinda na waja okong'heza mna izisiku azo.
13.18: Mpuleni Imulungu mbuli zino sikuzilawilile mna ikipindi cha kihuhwe!
13.19: Kwavija siku azo hokuwa na magayo makulu, haganalawila kulawa kuna ichanduso Imulungu viyalumbile isi mbaka sambi na honda galawilile kabili.
13.20: Lakini Imulungu kazihunguza siku zizo, maza hazihunguze sambi yahone munhu yoyose. Lakini mbuli ya wanhu zake yawasagule, Imulungu kazihunguza siku zizo.
13.21: “Avo, munhu yoyose yahawalongela, ‘Amweye, Kilisito kahano!’ hebu ‘Kahaja!’ sikumumtogole.
13.22: Kwavija olawilila makilisito na watula ndagu wa uvizi. Otenda unzonza na vilaguso ili yahadahika wawavizile hata waja wasaguligwe na Imulungu.
13.23: Muiteganye! Niye niwalongela kila kinhu kipindi king'hali hakinavika. Kwiza kwa Mwana wa Munhu (Matayo 24:29-31; Luka 21:25-28)
13.24: “Gahamala magayo ga siku azo, zuwa dokuwa ziza, na mbalamwezi honda imwemwese bule,
13.25: nhondo zolagala kulawa kuulanga, na vinhu vili kuulanga votigisika.
13.26: Abaho Mwana wa Munhu kolawilila, kokwiza mna gamawingu kwa nguvu ng'hulu na ukulu.
13.27: Abaho kowatuma wasenga zake wa kuulanga mna izibanzi nne za mwiisi, waweke hamoja wanhu wasaguligwe na Imulungu kulawa mwambu uno wa isi na uyagwe. Fundizo da biki da mtini (Matayo 24:32-35; Luka 21:29-33)
13.28: “Ifunzeni kubitila biki da mtini. Matambi gake gahasonga kuzuka na kwika majani, mujuwe kamba vuli da mmabehi.
13.29: Vivija, mwahazona mbuli azo, mojuwa kamba kammabehi kwiza.
13.30: Nowalongeleni ukweli, wanhu wa lukolo luno hawafa wose mbaka gano gose galawilile.
13.31: Ulanga na isi vobita, lakini mbuli zangu hondazibite ng'o. Kuduhu munhu yaijuwile siku hebu saa (Matayo 24:36-44)
13.32: “Kuduhu yaijuwile siku hebu saa ya kwiza, siyo wasenga wa kuulanga wala Mwana, lakini Tata yaiyeka ayo yaijuwile.
13.33: Muiteganye, na mukale meso, kwavija Hamkijuwile kipindi chonda yeze.
13.34: Yokuwa kamba munhu yofunga mwanza na kuwaleka wasang'hanaji zake walolese goya vinhu, kila munhu kamgwaa sang'hano ya kutenda. Kamulagiza mkalizi wa mulango yakale meso.
13.35: Muiteganye, kwavija hamujuwile kipindi cha kwiza mkulu wa ng'anda, yodaha kuwa ichungulo, kilo kikulu, nzogolo zikwika, hebu imitondo.
13.37: Mbuli iniwalongele mweye, nowalongela wanhu wose, kaleni meso!”

14.1: Zikala zisigale siku mbili ivike Nyimwilinyimwili ya Pasaka na Magate haganageligwa hamila. Wakulu wa walava nhosa na wafundiza Malagizo ga Musa wakala ozahila nzila ya kumgoga Yesu wamkome.
14.2: Walonga, “Sikututende avo kipindi cha Nyimwilinyimwili ya Pasaka, buleavo wanhu oding'huka.” Yesu kobakigwa mavuta ako Betania (Matayo 26:6-13; Yohana 12:1-8)
14.3: Yesu kakala Betania mng'anda ya Simoni, munhu yakalile na utamu wa dikulu. Viyakalile koja, mtwanzi imoja keza na nyhupa ya alabasita imemile mavuta gonung'hila goya ga bei ng'hulu. Kaifungula, kamgidila Yesu gamavuta mdipala.
14.4: Wanhu wayagwe wakalile aho wagevuzika, wailongela, “Unanzi gani uno wa mavuta!”
14.5: Abaho wamkomhokela mtwanzi ayo, walonga, “Mavuta gano gahauzigwe kwa sente magana madatu na zisente wagweleligwe wakiwa!”
14.6: Lakini Yesu kawalongela, “Mulekeni, habali momgaza mtwanzi ino? Niye kanhendela mbuli inogile.
14.7: Wanhu wakiwa mokala nao siku zose, saa yoyose mwahalonda modaha kuwataza. Lakini honda mukale na niye siku zose.
14.8: Mtwanzi ino katenda viyadahile, kalongola kulubakaza lukuli lwangu mavuta ganogile, kulutanda kwa kuzikigwa.
14.9: Nowalongeleni ukweli, kokose konda ipetigwe Mbuli Inogile mwiisi, kino kiyatendile mtwanzi ino cholongigwa, avo wanhu omkumbuka.” Yuda kotogola kumuhinduka Yesu (Matayo 26:14-16; Luka 22:3-6)
14.10: Abaho imoja wa wanahina zake longo na wabili yakemigwe Yuda Isikaliote, kachola kwa wakulu wa walava nhosa yamuhinduke Yesu kumwao.
14.11: Avo viwahulike kiyalongile wadeng'helela, na wailagana nayo kumgwaa sente. Avo Yuda kasonga kuzahila nzila ya kumgela Yesu mmakono gao. Yesu koja ndiya ya Pasaka na wanahina zake (Matayo 26:17-25; Luka 22:7-14, 21-23; Yohana 13:21-30)
14.12: Mna isiku ya ichanduso ya Nyimwilinyimwili ya Magate hagageligwe Usasu, siku dijo mwana ng'hondolo wa Pasaka kochinjigwa, wanahina zake Yesu wamuuza, “Kolonda tuchole kwahi tukutandile ndiya ya Pasaka?”
14.13: Yesu kawatuma wanahina zake wabili kawalongela, “Gendeni kudibuga, momting'hana mbigalo kaidikwa nongo ya mazi. Mkwelelezeni,
14.14: mbaka mng'anda yonda yengile, mulongeleni mwenekae, ‘Mfundiza kolonga, da kwahi gati da kudila ndiya ya Pasaka niye na wanahina zangu?’
14.15: Nayo kowalagusila gati kulu dili uchanha dikigwa goya na dihambigwa. Mumo tutandileni.”
14.16: Wanahina zake wasegela, wachola kudibuga, wavika kila kinhu vivija viyawalongele Yesu, avo wamtandila ndiya ya Pasaka.
14.17: Viivikile ichungulo, Yesu kavika na wanahina zake longo na wabili.
14.18: Viwakalile oja, Yesu kalonga, “Nowalongeleni imoja wenu yoja na niye, konihinduka.”
14.19: Wanahina zake wanyawanyawa, wamuuza, imoja imoja, “Vino gweye kolonga niye?”
14.20: Yesu kawedika, “Imoja wenu mweye longo na wabili, yozanhika gate jake hamoja na niye mbakuli.
14.21: Mwana wa Munhu kofa kamba Maandiko Gang'alile vigolonga. Lakini kogaya munhu ija yomuhinduka Mwana wa Munhu. Yahanogile ng'hani kamba munhu ayo sambi yavumbuke!” Ndiya ya Mndewa (Matayo 26:26-30; Luka 22:14-20; 1 Wakolinto 11:23-25)
14.22: Viwakalile oja, Yesu kasola gate, kamgwaa nhogolwa Imulungu, kadibanzula na kawagwaa wanahina zake kalonga, “Soleni, uno ulo lukuli lwangu.”
14.23: Abaho kasola kikasi cha divai, kamgwaa nhogolwa Imulungu, kawagwaa wanahina zake, wose waking'wela.
14.24: Yesu kalonga, “Ino ayo damu yangu ilagusa lagano da Imulungu, ikwitika mbuli ya wanhu wengi.
14.25: Nowalongela, kusongela sambi honda ning'we kabili divai, mbaka siku dijo donda ning'we divai ya sambi Muundewa wa Imulungu.”
14.26: Abaho wemba lwila, wachola kuna Ulugongo lwa Mizeituni. Yesu kolagula Petulo kombela (Matayo 26:31-35; Luka 22:31-34; Yohana 13:36-38)
14.27: Yesu kawalongela, “Mweye mose mokimbila na kundeka niiyeka, kwavija Maandiko Gang'alile golonga, ‘Imulungu komtowa msusilaji, na ng'hondolo wose opwililika.’
14.29: Petulo kamwidika Yesu, “Hata kamba wose wahakuleka, niye sikuleka bule!”
14.30: Yesu kamulongela Petulo, “Nokulongela ukweli, kilo cha lelo nzogolo yang'hali hana kwika miyanza mibili, konibela miyanza midatu.”
14.31: Petulo kagangamiza kulonga, “Silonga vivo bule, hata kamba nahafa na gweye!” Na wanahina wayagwe walonga vivo. Yesu kompula Imulungu ako Getisemane (Matayo 26:36-46; Luka 22:39-46)
14.32: Yesu na wanahina zake wavika hanhu hokemigwa Getisemane, Yesu kawalongela, “Kaleni hano, niye nogenda kumpula Imulungu.”
14.33: Kawasola Petulo na Yakobo na Yohana. Yesu kona usungu na kanyunyuwala.
14.34: Kawalongela wanahina zake, “Usungu uli muumoyo wangu mkulu ng'hani odaha kung'homa. Kaleni hano meso.”
14.35: Kachola kumwande kidogo, kaibwanha hasi, kampula Imulungu, kamba yahadahika sikuyaibitile saa ayo ya madununzo.
14.36: Kampula Imulungu, “Tata! Kumwako gose godahika. Ukisegese kikasi kino cha madununzo. Lakini siyo kamba vinilonda niye ila viulonda gweye.”
14.37: Abaho kabwela kawavika wanahina zake wadatu wawasa. Kamulongela Petulo, “Simoni kuwasa? Vino hamudahile kukala meso hata saa dimoja?”
14.38: Kawalongela, “Kaleni meso, mumpule Imulungu sikumwingile mna ukugezigwa. Moyo wa munhu olonda kutenda ganogile, lakini lukuli lwabule nguvu.”
14.39: Kachola lwa kabili kumpula Imulungu, kalonga mbuli zizija.
14.40: Viyabwelile kabili, kawavika wanahina zake wawasa, kwavija meso gao gakala na utulo. Hawaijuwile mbuli yakumulongela Yesu.
14.41: Viyabwelile mwanza wa kadatu, kawalongela, “Mung'hali muwasa na kubwihila? Yotosha! Kipindi kivika! Loleni, Mwana wa Munhu kogeligwa mmakono ga wanhu wene nzambi.
14.42: Lamukeni, tuchole. Loleni munhu yonihinduka kavika!” Yesu kogogigwa (Matayo 26:47-56; Luka 22:47-53; Yohana 18:3-12)
14.43: Yesu viyakalile yang'hali yogendelela kulonga, imoja wa wanahina zake longo na wabili, yakemigwe Yuda Isikaliote kavika. Keza na lunhu lutumigwe na wakulu wa walava nhosa, wafundiza Malagizo ga Musa na wavele, kuno wapapa mapanga na malungu.
14.44: Yuda Isikaliote yomuhinduka Yesu kawagwaa kilaguso, kawalongela, “Munhu yonda nimnonele ayo yummulonda. Mgogeni mumgele mmakono genu.”
14.45: Bahaja Yuda kamcholela Yesu kamulongela, “Mfundiza!” Abaho kamnonela.
14.47: Lakini imoja wa waja wakalile na Yesu, kasomola panga jake, kamkanha digwiti msang'hanaji wa Mkulu wa walava nhosa.
14.48: Yesu kawalongela, “Vino habali mwizile kungoga na mapanga na malungu kamba vija nambavi?
14.49: Kila siku ng'hala na mweye, nowafundiza kuna Ing'anda ya Imulungu, hamnigogile. Lakini gano gatendeka ili Maandiko Gang'alile galawilile.”
14.51: Mbwanga imoja yavalile mgolole wiiyeka, kakala yomkweleleza Yesu. Walonda kumgoga,
14.52: lakini kauleka mgolole wake, kakimbila mwazi. Yesu kamkitala (Matayo 26:57-68; Luka 22:54-55, 63-71; Yohana 18:13-14, 19-24)
14.53: Abaho Yesu kagaligwa mng'anda ya Mkulu wa walava nhosa, mumo wakulu wa walava nhosa wose, wavele na wafundiza Malagizo ga Musa waiting'hana.
14.54: Petulo kamkweleleza Yesu kwa kutali, kengila muuluwa lwa mkulu wa walava nhosa, kakala hasi na wakalizi, kokotela moto.
14.55: Wakulu wa walava nhosa na wanhu wose wa mkitala wazahila usindila wa uvizi ili wamkome Yesu, lakini hawaupatile bule.
14.56: Wanhu wengi walonga mbuli za uvizi kwa Yesu, lakini usindila wao hauwilumbile.
14.57: Abaho wanhu wayagwe wema walonga mbuli za uvizi kwa Yesu.
14.58: Walonga, “Tumuhulika kolonga, ‘Noibomola Ng'anda ino ya Imulungu izengigwe na wanhu, na kwa siku ndatu noizenga iyagwe haizengigwe na wanhu.’ ”
14.59: Na awo vivija usindila wao hauwilumbile.
14.60: Mkulu wa walava nhosa kenuka mgameso ga wanhu kamuuza Yesu, “Vino kuduhu mbuli ya kwidika kwa kitala choolava wanhu wano?”
14.61: Lakini Yesu kanyamala tuluu, halongile mbuli, Mkulu wa walava nhosa kamuuza kabili, “Gweye ayo Kilisito Mkombola, Mwana wa ija Yotogoligwa?”
14.62: Yesu kamwidika, “Nene iyo heyo. Mweye momona Mwana wa Munhu kakala muukulu mwambu wa mkono wa kudila wa Imulungu yeli na Udahi, kokwiza mna gamawingu ga kuulanga!”
14.63: Mkulu wa walava nhosa kakidega kiwalo chake, kalonga, “Hatulonda usindila uyagwe!
14.64: Muhulika viyomuliga Imulungu. Mweye mogesaze?” Wose walonga, kabananga kolondigwa yakomigwe.
14.65: Wanhu wayagwe wamtemela mate Yesu, wamgubika gameso, wamtowa na wamulongela, “Lagula, nani yakutowile!” Abaho wakalizi wamsola wamtowa ng'hofi. Petulo kombela Yesu (Matayo 26:69-75; Luka 22:56-62; Yohana 18:15-18, 25-27)
14.66: Petulo viyakalile yang'hali hasi muuluwa, msang'hanaji imoja wa kitwanzi wa mkulu wa walava nhosa kamcholela.
14.67: Viyamone Petulo kokotela moto, kamulola bunhuu kamulongela, “Gweye vivija kukala hamoja na Yesu wa Nazaleti.”
14.68: Petulo kabela, “Bule, sijuwile kiulonga.” Abaho Petulo kalawa kunze mbaka kuna uluhelengo. Bahaja nzogolo keka.
14.69: Msang'hanaji ija wa kitwanzi kamona Petulo, kawalongela wanhu wemile aho, “Ino nayo imoja wao!”
14.70: Lakini Petulo kabela kabili. Hamwande kidogo wanhu wakalile wemile aho wamulongela Petulo kabili, “Gweye vivija kwa imoja wao, kwavija kwa mwenekae wa Galilaya.”
14.71: Petulo kalonga, “Imulungu kojuwa nolonga ukweli, niduwiligwe nahalonga uvizi, simjuwile munhu yumulonga!”
14.72: Bahaja nzogolo keka mwanza wa kabili, baho Petulo kakumbuka mbuli ziyalongeligwe na Yesu, “Nzogolo yang'hali hanakwika miyanza mibili, konibela miyanza midatu.” Avo Petulo kasonga kulila.

15.1: Imitootondo, wakulu wa walava nhosa, wafundiza Malagizo ga Musa, wavele na wanhu wose wa mkitala waiting'hana, waitogolela kumgala Yesu kwa Pilato. Wamgodeka nzabi, wamgala kwa Pilato.
15.2: Pilato kamuuza Yesu, “Gweye ayo Mndewa wa Wayahudi?” Yesu kamwidika, “Ona, vivo viulonga.”
15.3: Wakulu wa walava nhosa wamulavila Yesu vitala vingi,
15.4: avo Pilato kamuuza Yesu kabili, “Hulonda kwidika? Tegeleza viwokulavila vitala!”
15.5: Lakini Yesu hedike mbuli yoyose, Pilato kakanganya. Yesu kotagusigwa yafe (Matayo 27:15-26; Luka 23:13-25; Yohana 18:39-19:16)
15.6: Yahavikaga Nyimwilinyimwili ya Pasaka Pilato kamfungulilaga mfungwa imoja wamulondile wanhu.
15.7: Mna ikipindi acho kukala na munhu imoja twaga jake Balaba, kakala yagodekigwe mkifungo na wayage, mbuli ya ukomaji kipindi wanhu viwading'huke.
15.8: Lunhu lwa wanhu viluiting'hane, lumpula Pilato yawatendele kamba viyatendaga.
15.9: Pilato kawauza, “Molonda niwafungulileni mndewa wa Wayahudi?”
15.10: Pilato kajuwa goya kamba wakulu wa walava nhosa wamgela Yesu mmakono gake kwavija wamonela migongo.
15.11: Lakini wakulu wa walava nhosa wawading'hula wanhu wampule Pilato yawafungulile Balaba.
15.12: Pilato kaluuza kabili lunhu luja, “Vino molonda nhende choni kwa munhu ino yumumkema mndewa wa Wayahudi?”
15.14: Pilato kawauza, “Vino kabananga choni?” Awo wagendelela kukemelela, “Muwambe mumsalaba!”
15.15: Pilato kalonda kulunogeza lunhu lwa wanhu, avo kamfungulila Balaba mkifungo. Abaho kalagiza Yesu yatoigwe mbalati na yawambigwe mumsalaba. Wakalizi omzeha Yesu (Matayo 27:27-31; Yohana 19:2-3)
15.16: Wakalizi wamgala Yesu muuluwa lwa ng'anda ya mkulu wa isi, waiting'hana na wayao wose.
15.17: Wamvaza kiwalo cha Undewa, waluka ngata ya miba, waika mdipala jake.
15.19: Wamtowa mbalati mdipala wamtemela mate, wamfugamila na kumwinamila.
15.20: Viwamambukize kumzeha, wamvula ikiwalo cha Undewa wamvaza viwalo vake. Abaho wamulava kunze wamuwambe mumsalaba. Yesu kowambigwa mumsalaba (Matayo 27:32-44; Luka 23:26-43; Yohana 19:17-27)
15.21: Viwakalile mnzila wamting'hana munhu imoja twaga jake Simoni, mwenekae wa Kilene, tatao Alekizanda na Lufo. Kipindi acho kakala kolawa kumgunda, wakalizi wamnanahiza yaupape msalaba wa Yesu.
15.22: Wamgala Yesu mbaka hanhu hokemigwa Goligota, fambulo jake, “Hanhu ha Fumvu da Pala.”
15.23: Wamgwaa Yesu divai ihanganyigwe na kinhu kili usungu, lakini Yesu kalema kung'wa.
15.24: Abaho wamuwamba Yesu mumsalaba, waigolela viwalo vake, kwa kubwanha simbi, ili ijuwike simbi yomgwila nani avo yasole ikiwalo.
15.25: Ikala saa ndatu imitondo viwamuwambile Yesu mumsalaba.
15.26: Wandika kilamuso cha kutagusigwa kwake, chandikigwa vino, “Mndewa wa Wayahudi.”
15.27: Vivija wawawamba wabavi wabili hamoja na Yesu, imoja mwambu wake wa mkono wa kudila na iyagwe mwambu wake wa kumoso.
15.28: Avo galawilila Maandiko Gang'alile galongile, “Kekigwa hamoja na wanhu watendile gehile.”
15.29: Wabita nzila watigisa mapala gao wamuliga Yesu, walonga, “Gweye kulonga koibomola Ng'anda ya Imulungu na kuizenga kabili kwa siku ndatu!
15.31: Vivija wakulu wa walava nhosa na wafundiza Malagizo ga Musa wamzeha Yesu walonga, “Kawakombola wayagwe, lakini hadaha kuikombola mwenyego!
15.32: Leka tumulole Kilisito Mkombola, Mndewa wa Izilaeli, lelo yahahumuluka mumsalaba na siye tomtogola!” Vivija na wanhu waja wabili wawambigwe hamoja na Yesu wamuliga. Ifa ya Yesu (Matayo 27:45-56; Luka 23:44-49; Yohana 19:28-30)
15.33: Viivikile saa sita imisi, isi yose ikala igubikigwe na ziza totolo, ziza dijo dikala kwa masaa madatu.
15.34: Viivikile saa tisa imisi, Yesu kalila kwa sauti ng'hulu, “Eloi, Eloi, lama, sabakitani?” Fambulo jake, “Imulungu wangu, Imulungu wangu, habali kundeka?”
15.35: Wanhu wayagwe wemile aho viwamuhulike, walonga, “Tegelezeni, komkema Eliya!”
15.36: Munhu imoja kakimbila kavabika dodoki mwiidivai, kadinanika mulubiki, kadika mmulomo wa Yesu, kalonga, “Beta tulole kamba Eliya kokwiza kumuhumulusa mumsalaba!”
15.37: Yesu kalila kwa sauti ng'hulu, abaho kafa.
15.38: Panziya da Ng'anda ya Imulungu digola gati da Ng'anda ya Imulungu na hanhu hong'ala ng'hani, didegeka mhande mbili, kulawa uchanha mbaka hasi.
15.39: Mkulu wa wakalizi yemile haulongozi ha msalaba kamona Yesu viyafile, kalonga, “Kweli munhu ino kakala Mwana wa Imulungu!”
15.40: Baho kukala na watwanzi wayagwe wakalile olola kwa kutali. Mna iwao kakala Malia Magidalena, Malia mamao Yakobo mdodo na Yusufu na Salome.
15.41: Watwanzi awo wamkweleleza Yesu viyakalile Galilaya na kumsang'hanila. Watwanzi wayagwe wezile nayo Yelusalemu vivija wakala aho. Kuzikigwa kwa Yesu (Matayo 27:57-61; Luka 23:50-56; Yohana 19:38-42)
15.42: Viivikile ichungulo ing'hali hainavika siku ya Kubwihila. Wayahudi wakala oitanda kwa siku ayo ya Kubwihila.
15.43: Yusufu mwenekae wa Alimataya, imoja wa wakulu wa Mkitala cha Wayahudi yategelezigwe ng'hani kavika. Munhu ino kakala kobetela kwiza kwa Undewa wa Imulungu. Avo kamgendela Pilato bila kudumba, kampula yamgwee lukuli lwa Yesu.
15.44: Pilato kakanganya kuhulika Yesu kafa. Kamkema mkulu wa wakalizi kamuuza kamba Yesu kakala yafile mwaka.
15.45: Pilato viyalongeligwe avo na mkulu wa wakalizi kamba Yesu kafa, kamulongela Yusufu yalusole lukuli lwa Yesu.
15.46: Yusufu kagula sitili, kaluhumulusa lukuli lwa Yesu, kaluzingiliza sitili kalwika mdipanga disongoligwe mdibwe. Abaho kabimbilisa dibwe kulu kadigubika mmulomo wa dipanga.
15.47: Malia Magidalena na Malia mamake Yusufu wahona hanhu halwikigwe lukuli lwa Yesu.

16.1: Viimalile siku ya Kubwihila, Malia Magidalena, Malia mamake Yakobo na Salome wagula mavuta gonung'hila goya wachola kulubakaza lukuli lwa Yesu.
16.2: Imitootondo ng'hani mna isiku ya jumapili, zuwa vidisongile kulawa wachola kudipanga.
16.3: Viwakalile mnzila wailongela, “Nani yonda yatubimbilisile idibwe hamgwazo wa umulomo wa dipanga?”
16.4: Lakini viwalolile wona dibwe dija dibimbilisigwa mwaka hamgwazo. Dikala dibwe kulu ng'hani.
16.5: Avo wengila mdipanga, wamona mbwanga imoja yavalile kiwalo kizelu, kakala mkono wa kudila, wadumba ng'hani.
16.6: Kawalongela, “Sikumudumbe nojuwa momzahila Yesu wa Nazaleti yawambigwe mumsalaba. Kahaduhu hano, kazilibuka! Loleni hanhu hawamwikile.
16.7: Avo choleni mkawalongele wanahina zake na Petulo, ‘Yesu kowalongolela Galilaya, kuko momona kamba viyawalongele.’ ”
16.8: Avo walawa mdipanga, kuno ogwaya na kudumba, wakimbila. Hawamulongele munhu yoyose mbuli ino kwavija wakala odumba. Yesu komulawilila Malia Magidalena (Matayo 28:9-10; Yohana 20:11-18)
16.9: Yesu viyazilibuke mwiisiku ya Jumapili imitootondo, tanhu kamulawilila Malia Magidalena, ija yamulavile vinyamkela saba.
16.10: Nayo kachola kuwalongela waja wakalile na Yesu, wakala wang'hali oiyalala na kulila.
16.11: Viwamuhulike Malia Magidalena kolonga kamba Yesu mgima na kamona, hawamtogolele bule. Yesu kowalawilila wanahina wabili (Luka 24:13-35)
16.12: Abaho Yesu kawalawilila wanahina zake wabili mna ikihanga kiyagwe, wanahina awo wakala ochola kumgunda.
16.13: Nao wabweleganya na kuwalongela wayao, lakini hawawatogolele bule. Yesu kowalawilila wanahina zake longo na imoja (Matayo 28:16-20; Luka 24:36-49; Yohana 20:19-23; Sang'hano 1:6-8)
16.14: Kukimambukizo Yesu kawalawilila wanahina zake longo na imoja viwakalile woja. Kawakomhokela kwavija wakala wabule kutamanila na wakala wadala kuwatogolela waja wamonile viyazilibuke.
16.15: Kawalongela, “Choleni mwiisi yose mukawapetele wanhu wose Mbuli Inogile.
16.16: Munhu yoyose yotogola na kubatizigwa, kokomboligwa, lakini munhu yoyose yolema kutogola kotagusigwa.
16.17: Wanhu wose otogola ogweleligwa udahi wa kutenda unzonza, kwa twaga jangu olava vinyamkela, olonga ulonzi wa sambi,
16.18: wahagoga mizoka hebu wahang'wa sumu hondawatendigwe kinhu chochose kihile, owekila wanhu watamu makono gao, nao ohona.” Yesu kogaligwa kuulanga (Luka 24:50-53; Sang'hano 1:9-11)
16.19: Mndewa Yesu viyamambukize kulonga na wanahina zake, kagaligwa kuulanga, kakala muukulu mwambu wa mkono wa kudila wa Imulungu.
16.20: Abaho wanahina zake wachola kila hanhu kuwapetela wanhu Mbuli Inogile. Na Mndewa kasang'hana nao na unzonza wautendile ulagusa kamba usenga wao ukala wa ukweli.

1.1: Mkulu Teofili, Wanhu wengi wawamba ng'hani kwandika mbuli zija zilawilile kumwetu.
1.2: Wandika mbuli zija zitulongeligwe na wanhu waja wazonile kwa meso gao kusongela kuna ichanduso na wapetile uusenga.
1.3: Avo go mkulu, kwavija nizizahila vinogile mbuli zino kulawa kuna ichanduso, vinikona niye yokuwa vinoga kukwandikila goya mbuli zija zilawilile.
1.4: Notenda vino ili ujuwe ukweli wose wa mbuli ziufundizigwe. Kuvumbuka kwa Yohana Mbatizaji kopetigwa
1.5: Kipindi acho Helode viyakalile mndewa wa Yudea, kukala na mulava nhosa, twaga jake Zakalia, wa kibumbila cha Abiya. Mwehe wake kakala Elizabeti, nayo vivija kalawa mulukolo lwa mulava nhosa Haluni.
1.6: Wose wabili wakala otenda ganogile mgameso ga Imulungu, na kugagoga Malagizo gose ga Mndewa Imulungu.
1.7: Wakala wabule wana kwavija Elizabeti kakala mgumba, na wose wabili wakala wavele.
1.8: Siku dimoja Zakalia kakala Mng'anda ya Imulungu yosang'hana isang'hano yake ya kulava nhosa, kamba viyatendaga mna izamu yake.
1.9: Zakalia kasaguligwa kwa kubwanha simbi, kamba viwatendaga walava nhosa, kwingila Mng'anda ya Mndewa yasome ubani.
1.10: Kipindi cha kusoma ubani vikivikile, wanhu wengi wakala kunze ompula Imulungu.
1.11: Msenga wa kuulanga wa Mndewa kamulawilila Zakalia, kema mwambu wa mkono wa kudila wa upango wa kusomela ubani.
1.12: Zakalia viyamone, kasinhuka na kagwaya kwa bwembwe.
1.13: Lakini msenga wa kuulanga kamulongela, “Sikuudumbe, Zakalia! Imulungu kahulika kupula kwako. Mwehe wako Elizabeti kokulelela mwana wa kimbigalo, twaga jake komkema Yohana.
1.14: Kodeng'helela ng'hani na wanhu wengi odeng'helela kwa kuvumbuka kwake.
1.15: Kokuwa munhu mkulu mgameso ga Mndewa. Honda yang'we ugimbi hebu divai. Kokuwa na Loho Yang'alile kusongela mna iinda ya mamake.
1.16: Kowatenda wanhu wengi wa Izilaeli wailumbe na Mndewa Imulungu wao.
1.17: Nayo komulongolela Mndewa, kokuwa na nguvu kamba mtula ndagu wa Imulungu Eliya. Kowatenda tata na wana wainogele, kowagalusa wanhu waja hawamtegeleza Imulungu wagese ganogile kamba wanhu wanogile, avo yamtandile Mndewa wanhu zake.”
1.18: Zakalia kamuuza msenga ija wa kuulanga, “Vino nojuwaze mbuli ino kamba ya ukweli? Niye na mwehe wangu twa wavele.”
1.19: Msenga ija kamwidika, “Niye na Gabilieli. Nokwima haulongozi ha Imulungu, heyo ayo yanhumile nonge na gweye kukupetela mbuli ino inogile.
1.20: Lakini kwavija hutogole mbuli zangu zonda zilawilile mna ikipindi chake, sambi hudaha kulonga mbaka siku vonda ilawilile mbuli ino.”
1.21: Kipindi acho wanhu wakalile ombeta Zakalia, wakanganya habali kokawa kulawa Mng'anda ya Imulungu.
1.22: Viyalawile kunze hadahile kulonga nao. Wajuwa hana kinhu cha unzonza kiyaonile Mng'anda ya Imulungu, kwavija kawagwaa kilaguso kwa kwinula makono gake, na kakala halonga.
1.23: Viyamambukize sang'hano yake Mng'anda ya Imulungu, kabwela ukae.
1.24: Hamwande kidogo imwehe Elizabeti kagoga inda. Hasegele ukae kumwake kwa miyezi mitano. Kalonga,
1.25: “Hakimambukizo Mndewa kanisegesela kinyala mgameso ga wanhu!” Kuvumbuka kwa Yesu kopetigwa
1.26: Elizabeti viyakalile na inda ya miyezi sita, Imulungu kamtuma msenga wa kuulanga, twaga jake Gabilieli, yachole kudibuga da Nazaleti, mwiisi ya Galilaya.
1.27: Kakala na usenga wa mhambe imoja yafungiligwe zengele na mbigalo imoja twaga jake Yusufu, yalawile mulukolo lwa Mndewa Daudi. Mhambe ayo twaga jake Malia.
1.28: Msenga ija kamcholela Malia, kamulongela, “Zihoze! Mndewa kahamoja na gweye. Nayo kakunogela ng'hani!”
1.29: Malia viyauhulike usenga awo wa msenga wa kuulanga, kakala na mfundo ng'hani muumoyo wake, kakanganya usenga awo ofambula choni.
1.30: Msenga ija kamulongela, “Malia, sikuudumbe, gweye kupata ng'hekewa ya Imulungu.
1.31: Kogoga inda na kolela mwana wa kimbigalo, nayo komkema Yesu.
1.32: Kokuwa munhu mkulu, kokemigwa Mwana wa Imulungu yeli Uchanha Ng'hani. Mndewa Imulungu komgwaa kigoda cha undewa, kamba viyakalile Daudi muhenga wake.
1.33: Kokuwa mtawala wa lukolo lwa Yakobo milele, na undewa wake hawisha bule!”
1.34: Malia kamuuza msenga ija, “Niye na mhambe. Lelo mbuli ayo yokuwaze?”
1.35: Msenga ija kamwidika, “Loho Yang'alile kokwizila, na nguvu za Imulungu zokugubika. Avo Mwana yonda yavumbuke kokuwa Yang'alile na kokemigwa Mwana wa Imulungu.
1.36: Kumbuka ndugu yako Elizabeti. Wanhu wakala olonga kakala mgumba, lakini sambi kana inda ya miyezi sita, hamoja na uvele uyalinao.
1.38: Malia kalonga, “Niye na msang'hanaji wa Mndewa, nailawilile kumwangu kamba viulongile.” Abaho msenga ija kasegela. Malia komtembelela Elizabeti
1.39: Kumwande kidogo Malia kafunga mwanza, kalopola kuchola kuna idibuga dili mvigongo va isi ya Yudea.
1.40: Kengila mng'anda ya Zakalia, kamulamusa Elizabeti.
1.41: Elizabeti viyahulike Malia komulamusa, king'hele kili mna iinda yake kizumha. Nayo Elizabeti kamemezigwa Loho Yang'alile,
1.42: kalonga kwa sauti ng'hulu, “Gweye kunogeligwa kubanza watwanzi wose, na imwana yonda umulele konogeligwa!
1.43: Habali mbuli ino ng'hulu inilawilile niye, mbaka mama wa Mndewa wangu keza kunhembelela?
1.44: Vimhulike kondamusa, mwana king'hele yeli mna iinda yangu kazumha kwa kudeng'helela.
1.45: Kumweda gweye utogola usenga wa Mndewa, kwavija olawilila kumwako!” Lwila lwa Malia
1.46: Malia kalonga, “Moyo wangu omgwaa nhogolwa Mndewa,
1.47: Loho yangu yomdeng'helela kwavija Imulungu Mkombola wangu,
1.48: kang'humbuka, niye msang'hanaji wake muhole! Kulawa sambi wanhu wose ong'hema munhu yamwedile,
1.49: kwavija Imulungu Mkulu kanhendela vinhu vikulu. Twaga jake ding'ala.
1.50: Kulawa lukolo na lukolo, kowonela bazi wanhu wose omtegeleza.
1.51: Katenda mbuli ng'hulu kwa mkono wake. Kawapwililisa wanhu weli na magoda mmizoyo yao.
1.52: Kawahumulusa wandewa mna ivigoda vao va undewa, na kawenula wahole.
1.53: Weli na nzala kawatenda wegute kwa vinhu vinogile na kawawinga matajili makono gaiyeka.
1.54: Kasang'hana kija kiyalongile kwa wahenga zetu, keza kumtaza msang'hanaji wake Izilaeli.
1.55: Kakumbuka kumonela bazi Abulahamu, na lukolo lwake lose siku zose!”
1.56: Malia kakala kwa Elizabeti miyezi midatu, abaho kabwela ukae kumwake. Kuvumbuka kwa Yohana Mbatizaji
1.57: Kipindi cha kuifungula Elizabeti vikivikile, kaifungula mwana wa kimbigalo.
1.58: Wanhu weli behi nayo na ndugu zake viwahulike mbuli ng'hulu ziyatendeligwe na Mndewa, wadeng'helela hamoja nayo.
1.59: Imwana viyavikize siku nane, wamwingiza kumbi. Walonda kumkema Zakalia, twaga da tatake,
1.60: lakini mamake kalonga, “Bule, twaga jake Yohana.”
1.61: Wamulongela, “Kuduhu munhu mulukolo lwenu yeli na twaga dijo!”
1.62: Abaho wamgwaa kilaguso tatake, wamuuza twaga gani diyalondile mwanage yakemigwe.
1.63: Zakalia kawapula kibao cha kwandikila, kandika vino, “Twaga jake Yohana.” Wanhu wose wakanganya!
1.64: Bahaja Zakalia kadaha kulonga, kamgwaa nhogolwa Imulungu.
1.65: Wanhu weli behi nayo wadumba ng'hani. Mbuli izo za unzonza zibwililika kila hanhu kuvigongo va isi ya Yudea.
1.66: Kila munhu yahulike mbuli ayo kaigelegeza, kauza, “Vino mwana ino kokuwa nani?” Kwavija udahi wa Mndewa ukala hamoja nayo. Lwila lwa Zakalia
1.67: Zakalia tatake Yohana kamemezigwa Loho Yang'alile, kalonga usenga wa Imulungu,
1.68: “Yatogoligwe Mndewa, Imulungu wa Izilaeli! Keza kuwataza wanhu zake na kuwagombola.
1.69: Katugwaa Mkombola yeli na udahi, mzukulu wa Daudi msang'hanaji wake.
1.70: Kamba viyalongile toka mwaka kubitila watula ndagu zake wang'alile,
1.71: kamba kotukombola na wanhu wang'hobo, na kulawa mmakono ga wanhu watwihile.
1.72: Kalonga kowonela bazi wahenga zetu, na kokumbuka lagano jake ding'alile.
1.74: kutukombola mmakono ga wanhu watwihile, na kututenda tumsang'hanile bila kudumba,
1.75: tuwe wanhu wang'alile na wanhu otenda goyolonda Imulungu, siku zose za ugima wetu.
1.76: Gweye mwanangu, kokemigwa mtula ndagu wa Imulungu yeli Uchanha Ng'hani. Komulongolela Mndewa, kuitanda nzila yake.
1.77: Kowalongela wanhu zake kamba okomboligwa, na nzambi zao zogeligwa kumgongo.
1.78: Imulungu wetu kana bazi na moyo unogile. Kotumwemwesela mulenge wa ukombola kulawa kuulanga,
1.79: na owamwemwesela wanhu wose okala mdiziza da ifa, na kulongoza magulu getu mnzila ya tindiwalo.”
1.80: Imwana ija kagendelela kukula lukuli na kawa na nguvu mwiiloho. Kakala kuluwala mbaka siku dija viyalawilile mgameso ga wanhu wa Izilaeli.

2.1: Kipindi acho, Agusito, Mndewa wa Lumi, kalagiza wanhu wose mwiisi ya Lumi wapetigwe.
2.2: Awo ukala mwanza wa ichanduso wa wanhu kupetigwa kipindi Kilenio viyakalile mkulu wa isi ya Siliya.
2.3: Avo kila munhu kachola kudibuga diyavumbuke kwandikigwa twaga jake.
2.4: Yusufu kasegela kudibuga da Nazaleti mwiisi ya Galilaya, kachola kudibuga da Beselehemu mwiisi ya Yudea, hanhu hayavumbuke mndewa Daudi. Yusufu kachola kuko kwavija kolawa mulukolo lwa Daudi.
2.5: Kachola na Malia kupetigwa, yakalile yamfungile zengele. Nayo Malia kakala na inda.
2.6: Viwakalile kudibuga da Beselehemu, kipindi cha Malia kuifungula kivika.
2.7: Kaifungula mwanage wa chaudele wa kimbigalo, kamvaza vikumbi. Abaho kamtambaliza hanhu hoodimiligwa ng'ombe, kwavija hawapatile gati mzing'anda za wageni. Wasusilaji wa ng'hondolo na wasenga wa kuulanga
2.8: Kilo acho kukala na wasusilaji wa ng'hondolo mna imigunda ili behi na Beselehemu, wakala okaliza fugo zao.
2.9: Msenga wa kuulanga kawalawilila, ukulu wa Mndewa uwamwemwesela, nao wadumba ng'hani.
2.10: Lakini msenga ija kawalongela, “Sikumudumbe! Niye niwagalila mbuli inogile, mbuli yonda itende wanhu wose wadeng'helele.
2.11: Lelo kudibuga da Daudi, Mkombola wenu kavumbuka, ayo Kilisito Mndewa!
2.12: Kino acho kilaguso kumwenu, momvika mwana king'hele kavazigwa vikumbi, katambalizigwa hanhu hoodimiligwa ng'ombe.”
2.13: Bahaja bumbila kulu da wasenga wa kuulanga dilawilila, diilumba na msenga ija iyagwe, wamtogola Imulungu walonga,
2.14: “Ukulu kwa Imulungu yeli Uchanha Ng'hani kuulanga, na tindiwalo diwe kwa wanhu wa mwiisi yawanogele!”
2.15: Wasenga wa kuulanga viwabwelile kuulanga, wasusilaji wailongela, “Tucholeni Beselehemu tukailole mbuli ino ilawilile, yailongile Mndewa.”
2.16: Avo walopola kuchola, wawavika Malia na Yusufu, na wamona imwana king'hele katambalizigwa hanhu hoodimiligwa ng'ombe.
2.17: Wasusilaji viwamone imwana, wawalongela kija kiyawalongele msenga wa kuulanga mbuli ya imwana.
2.18: Wanhu wose wahulike kija kiwalongile wasusilaji, wakanganya.
2.19: Lakini Malia kazika mbuli izo muumoyo na kazigelegeza ng'hani.
2.20: Wasusilaji wabwela kuno okwimba nyila za kumtogola Imulungu kwa mbuli zose ziwahulike na kuzona. Zose zilawilila kamba msenga wa kuulanga viyawalongele. Yesu kogweleligwa twaga
2.21: Mna isiku ya nane, siku ya kwingizigwa imwana kumbi, wamgwaa twaga da Yesu. Twaga ijo kagweleligwa na msenga wa kuulanga mamake hanagoga inda. Yesu kogaligwa Mng'anda ya Imulungu
2.22: Vikivikile kipindi cha kuisunha kamba Musa viyalagize mna Gamalagizo gake, Yusufu na Malia wamsola imwana na wachola nayo Yelusalemu ili wamwike mgameso ga Mndewa,
2.23: kamba viyandikigwe mna Gamalagizo ga Mndewa, “Kila mwana wa chaudele wa kimbigalo yonda yavumbuke yagaligwe mgameso ga Mndewa.”
2.24: Vivija wachola kulava nhosa kamba malagizo ga Mndewa vigalondile, “Huwa wabili hebu makinda mabili ga njiwa.”
2.25: Kipindi acho kukala na munhu yokala Yelusalemu, twaga jake Simeoni. Munhu ayo kakala yotenda goyolonda Imulungu na komdumba Imulungu. Vivija kakala yobetela ukombola wa Izilaeli, na Loho Yang'alile kakala hamoja nayo.
2.26: Nayo Loho Yang'alile kamulongela honda yafe mbaka yamone Kilisito Mkombola.
2.27: Loho kamulongoza Simeoni yachole kuna Ing'anda ya Imulungu. Abaho Yusufu na Malia wamgala imwana Yesu kuna Ing'anda ya Imulungu wamtendele kamba Malagizo ga Musa vigalondile.
2.28: Simeoni kamsola imwana mmakono gake, kamtogola Imulungu, kalonga,
2.29: “Mndewa, sambi kusang'hana kamba viulongile, muleke msang'hanaji wako yachole moyo uholile.
2.30: Kwa meso gangu niwona ukombola wako,
2.31: ukombola uutandile mgameso ga wanhu wose.
2.32: Mulenge uwatenda wanhu haweli Wayahudi wajuwe goulonda, na kugala ukulu kwa wanhu zako wa Izilaeli.”
2.33: Tatake na mamake imwana wakanganya kija kiyalongile Simeoni mbuli ya imwana.
2.34: Simeoni kawatambikila, kamulongela Malia, “Mwana ino kasaguligwa na Imulungu mbuli ya kupotela na kukomboligwa wanhu wengi wa Izilaeli. Nayo kokuwa kilaguso kulawa kwa Imulungu, na wanhu wengi omulema.
2.35: Abaho magesa ga wanhu wengi gogubuligwa. Na gweye mwenyego, usungu uli kamba panga dikutwa dousoma moyo wako.”
2.36: Kukala na mgane imoja mtula ndagu wa Imulungu, yakalile mvele ng'hani, twaga jake Ana, biti Fanueli kulawa kabila da Asheli. Mtwanzi ayo kakala na mkasano wake kwa miyaka saba toka yasoligwe.
2.37: Nayo kakala mgane mbaka viyavikize miyaka malongo manane na nne. Kipindi chose acho kakala Mng'anda ya Imulungu imisi na ikilo, komgwaa ukulu Imulungu, kopula na kofunga kuja.
2.38: Saa iija kavika, kamgwaa nhogolwa Imulungu na kalonga mbuli za imwana kwa wanhu wose wakalile ombeta Imulungu yaikombole Yelusalemu. Kubwela Nazaleti
2.39: Yusufu na Malia viwamambukize kugatenda gaja gose galondeke na Malagizo ga Mndewa, wabwela kudibuga jao da Nazaleti mwiisi ya Galilaya.
2.40: Imwana kakula na kawa mbala goya, kakala yamemile nzewele, na ng'hekewa ya Imulungu ikala kumwake. Mbwanga Yesu Mng'anda ya Imulungu
2.41: Kila mwaka tatake na mamake Yesu wacholaga Yelusalemu kuna inyimwilinyimwili ya Pasaka.
2.42: Yesu viyavikize miyaka longo na mibili, wachola kuna inyimwilinyimwili ya Pasaka kamba viwatendaga.
2.43: Nyimwilinyimwili viimalile, wabwela ukae, lakini mbwanga Yesu kasigala Yelusalemu. Tatake na mamake hawajuwile bule.
2.44: Wao viwagize kakala mna ikibumbila cha wanhu, avo watembela siku ngima. Abaho wasonga kumzahila Yesu mwa ndugu zao na mbwiga zao.
2.45: Hawamone bule, avo wabweleganya Yelusalemu kumzahila.
2.46: Siku ya kadatu wamvika kuna Ing'anda ya Imulungu, kakala hamoja na wafundiza wa Kiyahudi, kowategeleza na kuwauza.
2.47: Wanhu wose wamuhulike wakanganya nzewele zake na vija viyawedike.
2.48: Tatake na mamake viwamone wasinhuka ng'hani. Mamake kamuuza, “Mwanangu, habali ututendile vino? Niye na tatako tukala moyo nyunguwaa tokuzahila gweye!”
2.49: Yesu kawedika, “Habali munizahila? Vino hamujuwile bule niye nilondigwa ng'hale mng'anda ya Tatangu?”
2.50: Lakini wao hawajuwile fambulo da ulonzi awo.
2.51: Abaho Yesu kachola nao Nazaleti, ako kakala kowategeleza. Mamake kazika muumoyo mbuli zino zose.
2.52: Yesu kakula lukuli na ubala, kanogeligwa na Imulungu hamoja na wanhu.

3.1: Mwaka wa longo na tano muundewa wa mndewa wa Lumi yakemigwe Tibelio, Pontio Pilato kakala mkulu wa isi ya Yudea, na Helode kakala mkulu wa isi ya Galilaya, na Filipo mdodo wake kakala mkulu wa Itulea na isi ya Tulakoniti, na Lusania kakala mkulu wa isi ya Abilene,
3.2: Anasi na Kayafa wakala wakulu wa walava nhosa. Kipindi acho mbuli ya Imulungu imwizila Yohana mwanage Zakalia ako kuluwala
3.3: Yohana kachola mziisi zose zili mmabehi na lwanda lwa Yolidani, kawapetela wanhu, “Lekeni nzambi na mbatizigwe na Imulungu kozigela kumgongo nzambi zenu.”
3.4: Kamba viyandikigwe mna ikitabu cha mtula ndagu wa Imulungu Isaya, “Munhu kokema kuluwala, ‘Itandeni nzila ya Mndewa, goloseni nzila yonda yabite!
3.5: Kila konde dimemezigwe, kila kisugulu na kigongo visegesigwe, nzila hazigoloke zigolosigwe, na nzila zihile zotendigwa goya.
3.6: Wanhu wose okona Imulungu kowakombola wanhu!’ ”
3.7: Lunhu lwa wanhu lumcholela Yohana yawabatize. Yohana kawalongela, “Mweye mizoka! Nani yawalongele modaha kuikimbila nhaguso yonda igaligwe na Imulungu?
3.8: Musang'hane gaja gonda galaguse muzileka nzambi zenu. Sikumuilongele, ‘Abulahamu ayo muhenga wetu.’ Nowalongela, Imulungu kodaha kugasola mabwe gano na kugatenda lukolo lwa Abulahamu!
3.9: Shoka ikigwa goya kukanha mibiki mna gamasina. Kila biki hadilela matunda ganogile dokanhigwa na kwasigwa muumoto.”
3.10: Lunhu lwa wanhu lumuuza Yohana, “Avo tutende choni?”
3.11: Yohana kawedika, “Munhu yoyose yeli na viwalo vibili yamgwee kimoja miyage yelibule, na ija yeli na ndiya yatende vivo.”
3.12: Wabokela kodi nao weza kubatizigwa. Wamuuza Yohana, “Mfundiza, siye tutende choni?”
3.13: Nayo kawalongela, “Sikumubokele kodi kubanza vija vimulagizigwe.”
3.14: Wakalizi nao wamuuza, “Na siye tutende choni?” Nayo kawalongela, “Sikumumboke munhu yoyose sente yake hebu sikumumtaguse munhu yoyose kwa uvizi. Mutosheke na kija kimubokela.”
3.15: Wanhu wakala obetela kwiza kwa Mkombola, avo wasonga kuiuza mmizoyo yao kamba Yohana kodaha kuwa ayo Kilisito Mkombola.
3.16: Yohana kawalongela wose, “Niye nowabatiza mweye kwa mazi, lakini kokwiza ija yeli munhu mkulu ng'hani kubanza niye. Niye sifaya hata kudohola nzabi za vilatu vake. Ayo kowabatiza kwa Loho Yang'alile na moto.
3.17: Ayo kana lungo mmakono gake lwa kubetela uhule wake. Kowika uhemba kukanho, lakini koisoma imikumvi muumoto haufaga.”
3.18: Kwa mbuli nyingi Yohana kawapetela wanhu Mbuli Inogile na kawalonda waleke nzambi zao.
3.19: Lakini Yohana kamkomhokela mndewa Helode, mkulu wa isi ya Galilaya kwavija kamsola Helodiya, mwehe wa mdodo wake, na katenda nzambi nyingi.
3.20: Abaho Helode katenda dihile ng'hani kwa kumgodeka Yohana mkifungo. Yesu kobatizigwa (Matayo 3:13-17; Maluko 1:9-11)
3.21: Wanhu wose viwakalile obatizigwa, Yesu nayo kabatizigwa. Viyakalile kompula Imulungu, ulanga ugubuka,
3.22: na Loho Yang'alile kamuhulumukila mna ulukuli luigalile na huwa. Sauti ihulikigwa kulawa kuulanga, “Gweye kwa Mwanangu nikunogele. Ninogelwa na gweye.” Wanhu wa lukolo luyavumbuke Yesu (Matayo 1:1-17)
3.23: Yesu viyasongile sang'hano yake, kakala na miyaka malongo madatu. Avo wanhu wagesa kakala mwanage Yusufu, mwanage Heli,
3.24: mwanage Matati, mwanage Lawi, mwanage Meliki, mwanage Yani, mwanage Yusufu,
3.25: mwanage Matatia, mwanage Amosi, mwanage Nahumu, mwanage Esili, mwanage Nagai,
3.26: mwanage Maati, mwanage Matatia, mwanage Semeni, mwanage Yusufu, mwanage Yuda,
3.27: mwanage Yoana, mwanage Lesa, mwanage Zelubabeli, mwanage Shealitieli, mwanage Neli,
3.28: mwanage Meliki, mwanage Adi, mwanage Kosamu, mwanage Elimadamu, mwanage Eli,
3.29: mwanage Yoshua, mwanage Eliezeli, mwanage Yolimu, mwanage Matati, mwanage Lawi,
3.30: mwanage Simeoni, mwanage Yuda, mwanage Yusufu, mwanage Yonamu, mwanage Eliakimu,
3.31: mwanage Melea, mwanage Mena, mwanage Matata, mwanage Natani, mwanage Daudi,
3.32: mwanage Yese, mwanage Obedi, mwanage Boazi, mwanage Salimoni, mwanage Nashoni,
3.33: mwanage Aminadabu, mwanage Adimini, mwanage Alini, mwanage Heziloni, mwanage Pelesi, mwanage Yuda,
3.34: mwanage Yakobo, mwanage Isaka, mwanage Abulahamu, mwanage Tela, mwanage Naholi,
3.35: mwanage Selugi, mwanage Lagau, mwanage Pelegi, mwanage Ebeli, mwanage Sela,
3.36: mwanage Kenani, mwanage Alifakisadi, mwanage Shemu, mwanage Nuhu, mwanage Lameki,
3.37: mwanage Metusela, mwanage Henoko, mwanage Yaledi, mwanage Mahalaleli, mwanage Kenani,
3.38: mwanage Enoshi, mwanage Seti, mwanage Adamu, mwanage Imulungu.

4.1: Yesu kabwela kulawa Yolidani, kamema Loho Yang'alile na kalongozigwa na Loho Yang'alile mbaka kuluwala.
4.2: Ako kagezigwa na Mwenembago kwa ikipindi cha siku malongo mane. Mna ikipindi chose acho hadile kinhu chochose, avo vizimalile siku azo, nzala imuluma.
4.3: Abaho Mwenembago kamulongela Yesu, “Kamba gweye kwa Mwana wa Imulungu, dilongele dibwe dino digaluke gate.”
4.4: Lakini Yesu kamwidika, “Maandiko Gang'alile golonga, ‘Munhu hawa mgima kwa kuja kwiiyeka!’ ”
4.5: Abaho Mwenembago kamsola Yesu mbaka uchanha ng'hani, kamulagusila undewa wose wa mwiisi kwa mwanza umoja.
4.6: Mwenembago kamulongela Yesu, “Nokugwaa ukulu na utajili wose uno, kwavija vose va mmakono gangu, na niye nodaha kumgwaa munhu yoyose inimulonda.
4.7: Nokugwaa vinhu vose vino, kamba wahanitambikila.”
4.8: Yesu kamwidika, “Maandiko Gang'alile golonga, ‘Mtambikile Mndewa Imulungu wako, na umsang'hanile heyo yaiyeka!’ ”
4.9: Abaho Mwenembago kamsola Yesu mbaka Yelusalemu, kamwika uchanha ng'hani kuna ikiswili cha ing'anda ya Imulungu, abaho kamulongela Yesu, “Kamba gweye kwa Mwana wa Imulungu, ilagaze mwenyego hasi kulawa hano.
4.10: Kwavija Maandiko Gang'alile golonga, ‘Imulungu kowalagiza wasenga zake wa kuulanga wakukalize!’
4.11: Na vivija golonga, ‘Okupapa mmakono gao, sikuuilumize magulu gako mgamabwe!’ ”
4.12: Lakini Yesu kamwidika, “Maandiko Gang'alile golonga, ‘Sikuumgeze Mndewa Imulungu wako!’ ”
4.13: Mwenembago viyamambukize kumgeza Yesu kwa kila nzila, kamuleka mbaka kipindi kiyagwe kinogile. Yesu kosonga sang'hano yake ako Galilaya (Matayo 4:12-17; Maluko 1:14-15)
4.14: Abaho Yesu kabwela isi ya Galilaya, nguvu ya Loho Yang'alile ikala hamoja nayo. Mbuli zake zibwililika mziisi zose za mmabehi.
4.15: Kakala yofundiza mna zing'anda za kumpula Imulungu na kila munhu kamgwaa nhogolwa. Yesu kolemigwa ako Nazaleti (Matayo 13:53-58; Maluko 6:1-6)
4.16: Abaho Yesu kachola Nazaleti, hanhu kuyakulile. Mna isiku ya Kubwihila, kengila mng'anda ya kumpula Imulungu kamba viyatendaga. Kema yasome Maandiko Gang'alile.
4.17: Kagweleligwa kitabu cha mtula ndagu wa Imulungu Isaya, kakifungula na kona hanhu handikigwe,
4.18: “Loho wa Mndewa Imulungu kamgati mmwangu, kwavija kanisagula niwagalile wanhu wakiwa Mbuli Inogile. Kanituma niwapetele wagodekigwe kamba olekesigwa, na waja wasuwameso walole, na kuwakombola waja wadununzigwe,
4.19: na kuwalongela kamba saa ivika ya Mndewa kuwakombola wanhu zake.”
4.20: Abaho Yesu kakigubika ikitabu, kakibweza kwa msang'hanaji, abaho kakala hasi. Wanhu wose wakalile mng'anda ya kumpula Imulungu wamulola Yesu bunhuu.
4.21: Nayo kasonga kuwalongela, “Chandikigwe muno, lelo kilawilila kamba vimuhulike.”
4.22: Wose wamtogola na wakanganya mbuli zake zinogile ziyalongile. Walonga, “Vino ino siyo mwanage Yusufu?.”
4.23: Yesu kawalongela, “Nojuwa monongela ulonzi uno, ‘Mganga, ihonye mwenyego! Gose gatuhulike kugatenda ako Kapelinaumu, vivija gatende na hano ukae kumwako.’ ”
4.24: Yesu kagendelela kulonga, “Nowalongela ukweli, kuduhu mtula ndagu yotegelezigwa ukae kumwake.
4.25: “Nhegelezeni, ona kukala na wagane wengi mwiisi ya Izilaeli mna ikipindi cha Eliya. Kipindi acho, mvula haitowile miyaka midatu na nusu, kukala na lufilili lwa nzala mwiisi yose.
4.26: Lakini Eliya hatumigwe bule kwa munhu yoyose iyagwe mwiisi ya Izilaeli, ila kwa mgane imoja yakalile Selepata, mwiisi ya Sidoni.
4.27: Vivija mna ikipindi cha mtula ndagu wa Imulungu Elisha, kukala na wanhu wengi wakalile olumwa utamu wa dikulu mwiisi ya Izilaeli. Lakini kuduhu munhu yoyose iyagwe yahonyigwe, ila Naamani yaiyeka, munhu wa isi ya Siliya.”
4.28: Wanhu wakalile mng'anda ya kumpula Imulungu wagevuzika ng'hani viwahulike avo.
4.29: Wenuka, wamulava kunze kudibuga jao dizengigwe uchanha kukigongo, wamgala mbaka mwiingema ya kigongo acho, walonda kumpigisa hasi.
4.30: Lakini Yesu kabita hagati ya lunhu luja, kalawanya. Munhu yeli na kinyamkela (Maluko 1:21-28)
4.31: Abaho Yesu kachola kudibuga da Kapelinaumu mwiisi ya Galilaya. Mwiisiku ya Kubwihila, kakala yofundiza wanhu.
4.32: Mafundizo gake gawakanganya wanhu wose, kwavija kakala kolonga kwa udahi.
4.33: Mng'anda ya kumpula Imulungu kukala na munhu yeli na kinyamkela. Kalila kwa sauti ng'hulu,
4.34: “Oii! Kolonda kututenda choni, Yesu wa Nazaleti? Vino kwiza kutukoma? Nokujuwa, Gweye kwa ija Yang'alile wa Imulungu!”
4.35: Yesu kamkomhokela ikinyamkela ija, “Nyamala! Mulawe munhu ino!” Kinyamkela kambwanha hasi munhu ija mgameso gao, abaho kamulawa bila kumulumiza.
4.36: Wanhu wose wakanganya ng'hani na wailongela, “Mbuli gani zino? Munhu ino kana nguvu na udahi wa kuwakomhokela vinyamkela, nao omtegeleza!”
4.37: Avo mbuli za Yesu zibwililika kila hanhu mwiisi ija. Yesu kowahonya wanhu wengi (Matayo 8:14-17; Maluko 1:29-34)
4.38: Yesu kalawa kuna ing'anda ya kumpula Imulungu, kachola ukae kumwake Simoni. Mkwe wa kitwanzi wa Simoni kakala yolumwa homa ng'hali, avo wamulongela Yesu yamuhonye.
4.39: Yesu kamcholela, kema behi na lusazi lwa mtwanzi ayo, kaikomhokela homa imulawe. Homa imulawa, bahaja mtwanzi ija kenuka, kasonga kuwasang'hanila.
4.40: Zuwa vidihongile, wanhu wose wakalile na watamu wawagala kwa Yesu, nayo keka makono gake uchanha mwa kila munhu na kuwahonya wose.
4.41: Vinyamkela wawalawa wanhu wengi na kuguta, “Gweye kwa mwana wa Imulungu!” Yesu kawakomhokela na kawagomesa kulonga, kwavija wamjuwa kamba kakala Kilisito. Yesu kowapetela wanhu mzing'anda za kumpula Imulungu (Maluko 1:35-39)
4.42: Imitondo yake, Yesu kasegela kudibuga, kachola hanhu kuduhu wanhu. Wanhu wasonga kumzahila, na viwamone, walonda kumgomesa sikuyachole.
4.43: Lakini Yesu kawalongela, “Vivija nolondigwa kuwapetela wanhu wa mmabuga gayagwe Mbuli Inogile ya Undewa wa Imulungu, kwavija acho kiyanhumile Imulungu kukisang'hana.”
4.44: Avo kawapetela wanhu mzing'anda za kumpula Imulungu mwiisi yose ya Yudea.

5.1: Siku dimoja Yesu kakala yemile mumgwazo wa lamba da Genesaleti. Wanhu wengi wakala oisung'ha sung'ha wategeleze mbuli ya Imulungu.
5.2: Yesu kazona ngalawa mbili zikalile mwiingema ya lamba, zilekigwe na wavula somba, wakalile osunha mizavu yao.
5.3: Yesu kengila mwiingalawa imoja ikalile ya Simoni, kamulonda Simoni yaikwese mgamazi. Abaho Yesu kakala mwiingalawa, kafundiza lunhu luja.
5.4: Viyamambukize kufundiza, kamulongela Simoni, “Kwesa ingalawa mbaka kuna gamazi mengi, abaho gweye na wayago mupigise mizavu yenu muvule somba.”
5.5: Simoni kamwidika, “Go mkulu, tusang'hana ng'hani kilo kigima lakini hatupatile kinhu bule. Lakini kamba gweye kolonga avo, nogela mizavu yangu mgamazi.”
5.6: Wapigisa mizavu yao, somba wengi wanamata mbaka mizavu yao ilonda kudegeka.
5.7: Avo wawakema wayao wakalile mwiingalawa iyagwe weze kuwataza. Wayao weza na wazimemeza ngalawa zose mbili, zose zikala zimemile somba mbaka zilonda kudidimila.
5.8: Simoni Petulo viyachonile kija kilawilile, kamfugamila Yesu mmagulu, kalonga, “Mndewa, segela haulongozi wangu, niye nimema nzambi!”
5.9: Simoni na wayage wakanganya ng'hani mbuli ya somba wengi wawapatile.
5.10: Vivija wayage Simoni, Yakobo na Yohana, wanage Zebedayo, nao wakanganya. Yesu kamulongela Simoni, “Sikuudumbe. Kulawa sambi kokuwa mvulaji wa wanhu.”
5.11: Wazilava ngalawa zao kunze mumgwazo, wavileka vinhu vose, wamkweleleza Yesu. Yesu komuhonya munhu yeli na dikulu (Matayo 8:1-4; Maluko 1:40-45)
5.12: Yesu viyakalile kudibuga dimoja, kukala na munhu imoja yakalile na utamu wa dikulu. Viyamonile Yesu, kaibwanha hasi, kampula, “Go mkulu, wahalonda, kodaha kunihonya!”
5.13: Yesu kagolosa mkono wake, kamkwasa. Kalonga, “Nolonda, hona!” Bahaja utamu wa dikulu umulawa munhu ija.
5.14: Yesu kamulagiza, “Sikuumulongele munhu yoyose, lakini goga inzila mbaka kwa mulava nhosa ukailaguse, abaho kalave nhosa kamba viyalagize Musa ili kutenda kila munhu yatogole kamba kuhonyigwa.”
5.15: Lakini mbuli za Yesu zibwililika kila hanhu. Wanhu wengi weza kumtegeleza na kuhonyigwa mitamu yao.
5.16: Lakini Yesu kachola hanhu kuduhu wanhu na kampula Imulungu. Yesu komuhonya munhu yaholole (Matayo 9:1-8; Maluko 2:1-12)
5.17: Siku dimoja Yesu viyakalile kofundiza, Mafalisayo wayagwe na wafundiza Malagizo ga Musa wakala aho. Wakala walawile kila buga mwiisi ya Galilaya na Yudea na kulawa Yelusalemu. Nguvu ya Mndewa ikala hamoja na Yesu kuwahonya watamu.
5.18: Wanhu wayagwe weza kuno wampapa mulusazi munhu yaholole. Wageza kumwingiza mng'anda wamwike haulongozi wa Yesu.
5.19: Lakini hawapatile nzila ya kumwingiza mng'anda, kwavija kukala na lunhu lwa wanhu. Avo wamsola mtamu wao, wamgala uchanha kukiswili, watobola zonzo. Abaho wamuhumulusa na lusazi lwake mbaka hagati ya lunhu lwa wanhu, wamwika haulongozi wa Yesu.
5.20: Yesu viyone kutamanila kwao, kamulongela munhu ija, “Mbwigangu, nzambi zako zigeligwa kumgongo.”
5.21: Wafundiza Malagizo ga Musa na Mafalisayo wasonga kuiuza, “Munhu gani ino kolonga mbuli za kumuliga Imulungu? Imulungu yaiyeka ayo yodaha kuzigela kumgongo nzambi za wanhu!”
5.22: Yesu kajuwa viwagesile, avo kawalongela, “Habali mogesa avo?
5.23: Choni kibuhile, kulonga, ‘Nzambi zako zigeligwa kumgongo,’ hebu kulonga, ‘Ima utembele’?
5.24: Lakini nolonda mujuwe kamba Mwana wa Munhu kana udahi mwiisi wa kuzigela kumgongo nzambi za wanhu.” Abaho kamulongela munhu ija yaholole, “Nokulongela, ima, papa lusazi lwako, uchole ukae kumwako!”
5.25: Bahaja munhu ija kenuka mgameso ga wanhu, kapapa lusazi lwake mumo muyatambalale, kachola ukae kumwake kuno komtogola Imulungu.
5.26: Wanhu wose wakanganya ng'hani na kudumba! Wamtogola Imulungu walonga, “Lelo tona unzonza!” Yesu komkema Lawi (Matayo 9:9-13; Maluko 2:13-17)
5.27: Abaho Yesu kachola na kamona mbokela kodi yakemigwe Lawi kakala mng'anda ya kusolela kodi. Yesu kamulongela, “Nikweleleze.”
5.28: Lawi kenuka, kaleka kila kinhu, kamkweleleza.
5.29: Abaho Lawi kamtendela Yesu nyimwilinyimwili ng'hulu ukae kumwake. Vivija kukala na wabokela kodi wengi na wanhu wayagwe wagonekigwe.
5.30: Mafalisayo na wafundiza Malagizo ga Musa wayagwe wakalile aho wawauza wanahina wa Yesu, “Habali moja na kung'wa hamoja na wabokela kodi na wanhu otenda nzambi?”
5.31: Yesu kawedika, “Wanhu wagima hawalonda mganga, lakini waja weli watamu omulonda mganga.
5.32: Sizile kuwakema wanhu ogesa wanoga, lakini niza kuwakema waja wene nzambi waleke.” Mbuli ya kufunga kuja (Matayo 9:14-17; Maluko 2:18-22)
5.33: Wanhu wayagwe wamulongela Yesu, “Wanahina wa Yohana Mbatizaji ofunga kuja miyanza mingi na kumpula Imulungu, na wanahina wa Mafalisayo otenda vivo, lakini wanahina zako oja na kung'wa.”
5.34: Yesu kawedika, “Vino mogesa wanhu wagonekigwe kuna idizengele odaha kufunga kuja kipindi munhu yosola kahamoja nao? Havidahika bule!
5.35: Lakini kipindi chokwiza, munhu yosola vonda yasegesigwe kumwao, baho ofunga kuja.”
5.36: Abaho Yesu kawalongela lusimo luno, “Kuduhu munhu yokanha kilaka mkiwalo cha sambi na kukika mkiwalo cha umwaka. Yahatenda avo, kokinanga kija kiwalo cha sambi, na kilaka acho honda kiigale na kiwalo cha umwaka.
5.37: Vivija kuduhu munhu yogida divai ya sambi mna mifuko ya ng'hwembe ya umwaka. Kwavija yahatenda avo, divai ya sambi yoitula mifuko ayo ya umwaka, divai yokwitika, na mifuko yobanangika.
5.38: Divai ya sambi yogidigwa mmifuko ya ng'hwembe ya sambi!
5.39: Kuduhu munhu yolonda divai ya sambi yahamambukiza kung'wa ya umwaka. Kwavija kolonga, ‘Ya umwaka inoga ng'hani.’ ”

6.1: Mna isiku imoja ya Kubwihila, Yesu kakala yobita mmigunda ya uhemba. Wanahina zake wasonga kubena mikungwi ya uhemba, wagafigisa mmakono gao na kuja mhule zake.
6.2: Mafalisayo wayagwe wawauza, “Habali motenda kinhu kigomesigwe mna isiku ya Kubwihila?”
6.3: Yesu kawedika, “Vino mweye hamusomile kija kiyatendile Daudi na wayage viwakalile na nzala?
6.4: Daudi kengila Mng'anda ya Imulungu, kasola magate galavigwe kwa Imulungu, kagaja na vivija kawagwaa wayage. Malagizo gawagomesa wanhu wayagwe kuja magate gago ila kwa walava nhosa waiyeka.”
6.5: Abaho Yesu kamambukiza kwa kulonga, “Mwana wa Munhu ayo Mndewa wa siku ya Kubwihila.” Yesu komuhonya munhu yaholole mkono (Matayo 12:9-14; Maluko 3:1-6)
6.6: Mna isiku iyagwe ya Kubwihila, Yesu kengila mng'anda ya kumpula Imulungu na kafundiza. Baho kukala na munhu imoja, mkono wake wa kudila ukala uholole.
6.7: Wafundiza Malagizo ga Musa na Mafalisayo wayagwe wakala ozahila kilamuso cha kumtagusa Yesu, avo wakala omulola wamone kamba komuhonya munhu mwiisiku ya Kubwihila.
6.8: Lakini Yesu kawajuwa viwagesile, kamulongela munhu ija yaholole mkono, “Ima wize hano haulongozi.” Munhu ija kenuka na kwima hagati.
6.9: Abaho Yesu kawalongela, “Nowauza, vino Malagizo getu gotulonda tutende choni mwiisiku ya Kubwihila? Kutenda ganogile hebu kutenda gehile? Kuhonya ugima wa munhu hebu kuukoma?”
6.10: Yesu kawalola wanhu wose wakalile aho, abaho kamulongela munhu ija, “Golosa mkono wako.” Munhu ija katenda avo, na mkono wake uhona kabili.
6.11: Lakini wanhu wagevuzika ng'hani na wasonga kuilongela wamtende choni Yesu. Yesu kosagula watumigwa longo na wabili (Matayo 10:1-4; Maluko 3:13-19)
6.12: Kipindi kija Yesu kachola kuna ikigongo kumpula Imulungu, kakala ako kilo kigima kompula Imulungu.
6.13: Imitondo yake, kawakema wanahina zake, kawasagula longo na wabili mna idibumbila jao, kawagwaa twaga da watumigwa.
6.14: Watumigwa awo wakala Simoni, ayo Yesu kamkema Petulo na Andeleya mdodo wake, Yakobo na Yohana, Filipo na Batulumayo,
6.15: Matayo na Tomaso na Yakobo mwanage Alufayo na Simoni yakemigwe Zelote,
6.16: Yuda mwanage Yakobo na Yuda Isikaliote yamuhinduke Yesu. Yesu kofundiza na kuhonya wanhu (Matayo 4:23-25)
6.17: Yesu viyahumuluke kukigongo hamoja na watumigwa zake, kema hanhu hagoloke hamoja na wanahina zake wengi. Lunhu mkulu lwa wanhu lukala aho kulawa isi yose ya Yudea na buga da Yelusalemu, na kulawa mwhani ya isi za Tilo na Sidoni.
6.18: Weza kumtegeleza Yesu na kuhonyigwa mitamu yao. Vivija wanhu waja wakalile ogazigwa na vinyamkela weza na wahonyigwa.
6.19: Wanhu wose wageza kumkwasa Yesu, kwavija nguvu ya kuhonya ikala ilawa kumwake na kuwahonya wose. Kudeng'helela na kunyunyuwala (Matayo 5:1-12)
6.20: Yesu kawalola wanahina zake, kalonga, “Mmweda mweye muli wakiwa, kwavija Undewa wa Imulungu uli wenu.
6.21: Mmweda mweye muli na nzala sambi, kwavija mokwiguta! Mmweda mweye mulila sambi, kwavija modeng'helela!”
6.22: “Mmweda mweye kamba wanhu omwihilani, owalema, owaliga na kuwalonga vihile kwa mbuli ya Mwana wa Munhu!
6.23: Deng'heleleni na kucheza vonda galawilile, kwavija mwikiligwa nhunza ng'hulu kuulanga. Kwavija vivo wahenga zao viwawatendele watula ndagu wa Imulungu.
6.24: Lakini mogaya mweye muli matajili sambi, kwavija mmala kupata deng'ho jenu!
6.25: Mogaya mweye mwigute sambi, kwavija mokona nzala! Mogaya mweye museka sambi, kwavija moiyalala na kulila!”
6.26: “Mogaya mweye kamba wanhu wose owagwaa nhogolwa kwavija wahenga zao vivija wawatendela vivo watula ndagu wa uvizi.” Kuwanogela wakwihile (Matayo 5:38-48; 7:12)
6.27: “Lakini nowalongela mweye munitegeleza, wanogeleni wamwihileni, muwatendele ganogile waja owatendela gehile.
6.28: Muwatambikile waja owaduwila, na muwapulile kwa Imulungu waja omonelani.
6.29: Munhu yonda yakutowe kanza dimoja, muleke yakutowe kanza diyagwe vivija, kamba munhu kokuboka koti jako, muleke yasole na shati jako vivija.
6.30: Munhu yahakupula kinhu mgwee, na munhu yokuboka vinhu vako, sikuulonde yakubwezele.
6.31: Avo watendeleni wayagwe gaja gose gomulonda mweye kutendeligwa.”
6.32: “Kamba mweye mowanogela wanhu owanogela mweye waiyeka, vino motenda kilozo gani? Hata wanhu wene nzambi owanogela waja owanogela hewo!
6.33: Na kamba mowatendela ganogile waja owatendela ganogile waiyeka, vino motenda kilozo gani? Hata wanhu wene nzambi otenda vivo!
6.34: Na kamba mowakopesha waja waiyeka mutamanila odaha kuwabwezela, vino motenda kilozo gani? Hata wanhu wene nzambi owakopesha wayao otamanila odaha kuwabwezela kikija kiwawakopeshe!
6.35: Lakini mweye wanogeleni waja omwihileni na muwatendele ganogile, muwakopeshe wanhu bila kutamanila kubwezeligwa. Abaho nhunza yenu yokuwa ng'hulu, na mweye mokuwa wana wa Imulungu yeli Uchanha Ng'hani. Kwavija heyo kanoga kwa waja welibule nhogolwa kumwake na wanhu otenda nzambi.
6.36: Muwe na bazi kamba vija Tataenu viyeli na bazi.” Kuwatagusa wayagwe (Matayo 7:1-5)
6.37: “Sikumuwataguse wayagwe, Imulungu honda yawataguse mweye. Sikumuwalaumu wayagwe, na Imulungu honda yawalaumu mweye. Mugele kumgongo nzambi za wanhu wayagwe, na Imulungu kogela kumgongo nzambi zenu.
6.38: Muwagwee wayagwe, na Imulungu kowagwaa mweye. Na mweye mobokela kibaba kimemile na kusindiligwa mbaka vokwitika mmakono genu, na vose vonda mudahe kuvigoga. Avo, vija vimuwapimila wayagwe, Imulungu nayo kowapimila vivo.”
6.39: Abaho Yesu kawalongela lusimo luno, “Msuwameso hadaha kumulongoza msuwameso miyage. Yahatenda vivo, wose wabili olagalila mdikolombo.
6.40: Kuduhu mwanahina yombanza mfundiza wake. Lakini kila mwanahina yahamambukiza mafunzo gake, koigala na mfundiza wake.
6.41: “Habali kolola kibanzi kili mdisiso da ndugu yako lakini hulola biki dili mdisiso jako?
6.42: Hebu kodahaze kumulongela ndugu yako, ‘Chonde, leka nikulave kibanzi kili mdisiso jako,’ kuno gweye ung'hali hunajona biki dili mdisiso jako mwenyego? Gweye kwa mtapitapi! Tanhu lava biki dili mdisiso jako, abaho kodaha kulola goya na kulava kibanzi kili mdisiso da ndugu yako. Biki na matunda gake (Matayo 7:16-20; 12:33-35)
6.43: “Biki dinogile hadidaha kulela matunda gehile, na biki dihile hadidaha kulela matunda ganogile.
6.44: Kila biki dojuwika kwa matunda gake godilelaga, kwavija hudaha kubawa ngama mumkese hebu kubawa fulu kuna ivisolo va miba.
6.45: Munhu yanogile kolava ganogile mwiingama yake inogile ili muumoyo wake, lakini munhu yehile kolava gehile mwiingama yake ihile ili muumoyo wake. Kwavija munhu kolonga gaja gamemile muumoyo wake. Wazengaji wabili (Matayo 7:24-27)
6.46: “Habali monikema, ‘Mndewa, Mndewa,’ kuno hamugatenda gaja goniwalongela?
6.47: Munhu yoyose yokwiza kumwangu na kutegeleza mbuli zangu na kuzigoga nowalagusila kaigala na choni.
6.48: Kaigala na munhu yozenga ng'anda yake yahimbile hasi ng'hani, keka chandusilo chake mdibwe. Mvula ng'hulu viitowile, mazi gaitowa ing'anda, lakini hagadahile kuitigisa kwavija ikala izengigwe goya.
6.49: Lakini munhu yoyose yotegeleza mbuli zangu na kolema kuzigoga, kaigala na munhu yazengile ng'anda yake bila kuhimba chandusilo. Mvula ng'hulu viitowile, mazi gaitowa ng'anda ija, nayo igwa na kubanangika!”

7.1: Yesu viyamambukize kuwafundiza wanhu, kachola Kapelinaumu.
7.2: Ako kukala na mkulu imoja wa wakalizi gana wa Kilumi yakalile na msang'hanaji wake mtamu ng'hani, na kalonda kufa. Nayo mkulu ayo kakala yomnogela ng'hani msang'hanaji ayo.
7.3: Mkulu ayo viyahulike mbuli za Yesu, kawatuma wavele wayagwe wa Wayahudi wampule Yesu yeze kumuhonya msang'hanaji wake.
7.4: Avo wamcholela Yesu, wampula ng'hani, wamulongela, “Munhu ino kofaya umtaze.
7.5: Kowanogela wanhu na vivija katuzengela ng'anda ya kumpula Imulungu.”
7.6: Avo Yesu kachola nao. Viyakalile behi na ng'anda ya mkulu ija, mkulu ija kawatuma mbwiga zake wamulongele Yesu, “Go mkulu, sikuuigaze kwiza ukae, kwavija niye sifaya gweye wingile mng'anda yangu,
7.7: vivija niiyona sifaya hata kwiza kumwako. Lakini longa mbuli iiyeka, na msang'hanaji wangu kohona.
7.8: Kwavija na niye vivija na hasi ya udahi wa wakulu na nina wakalizi hasi yangu. Nahamulongela ino, ‘Chola!’ nayo kochola, nahamulongela iyagwe, ‘Izo!’ nayo kokwiza, vivija nahamulongela msang'hanaji wangu, ‘Tenda vino!’ nayo kotenda vivo.”
7.9: Yesu viyahulike avo kakanganya ng'hani, kahinduka, kalulongela lunhu lwa wanhu lukalile lomkweleleza, “Nowalongela, sinamona munhu yeli na tamanilo kulu kamba dino, hata mwiisi ya Izilaeli!”
7.10: Wanhu waja watumigwe wabwela kuna ing'anda ya mkulu ija, wamvika msang'hanaji ija kahona. Yesu komzilibula mwana wa mgane
7.11: Kumwande, Yesu kachola kudibuga dimoja dikemigwe Naini. Kailongoza na wanahina zake na lunhu mkulu lwa wanhu.
7.12: Viyakalile habehi na ulwivi mkulu wa kwingilila kudibuga dijo, wanhu wapapile maiti ga mbwanga wakala olawa kunze kudibuga, ochola kuzika. Mbwanga ayo yafile kakala mwana yeli yaiyeka wa mtwanzi yakalile mgane. Wanhu wengi wa buga ijo wakala hamoja na mtwanzi ayo.
7.13: Mndewa Yesu viyamone mtwanzi ayo, kamonela bazi, kamulongela, “Sikuulile.”
7.14: Abaho kagenda, kalukwasa ulusazi luwaitambalize maiti ya mbwanga ija. Wanhu walupapile ulusazi luja wema. Yesu kalonga, “Mbwanga! Nokulongela, lamuka.”
7.15: Mbwanga ija yafile kalamuka, kasonga kulonga. Abaho Yesu kamgwaa mama ija mwanage.
7.16: Wanhu wose wengila bwembwe na wamtogola Imulungu. Walonga, “Mtula ndagu mkulu wa Imulungu katulawilila hamwetu! Imulungu keza kuwakombola wanhu zake!”
7.17: Mbuli zino za Yesu zenela mwiisi yose ya Yudea na isi zili mmabehi. Wasenga kulawa kwa Yohana Mbatizaji (Matayo 11:2-19)
7.18: Wanahina zake Yohana Mbatizaji wamulongela Yohana mbuli zose zino. Nayo kawakema wanahina zake wabili mna iwanahina zake,
7.19: kawatuma wachole kwa Mndewa wakamuuze, “Vino gweye ayo ija iyalongile Yohana Mbatizaji kokwiza, hebu tumbete iyagwe?”
7.20: Viwavikile kwa Yesu, wamulongela, “Yohana Mbatizaji katutuma tukuuze, kamba gweye ayo ija yalongile kokwiza, hebu tumbete iyagwe?”
7.21: Kipindi kikija Yesu kawahonya wanhu wengi wakalile watamu, wakalile ogaya, wakalile na vinyamkela na kawatenda wanhu wengi wakalile wasuwameso walole.
7.22: Avo Yesu kawedika, “Bweleni mkamulongele Yohana gaja gomuhulika na kugona, wasuwameso olola, mbetembete otembela, na weli na utamu wa dikulu ohonyigwa, na wanhu hawahulika ohulika, wafile ozilibuka, na wakiwa opeteligwa Mbuli Inogile.
7.23: Kamweda munhu ija yelibule shaka na niye!”
7.24: Wanahina wa Yohana viwasegele, Yesu kasonga kululongela lunhu luja mbuli ya Yohana, “Vino vimucholile kuluwala, muchola kulola choni? Muchola kulola lusanze vilutigisigwa na beho?
7.25: Vino muchola kulola choni? Muchola kumulola munhu yavalile viwalo vinogile? Wanhu iwovala viwalo vinogile, weli na ugima wa kubwihila okala mzing'anda za wandewa!
7.26: Nongeleni, vino muchola kulola choni? Muchola kumulola mtula ndagu wa Imulungu? Ona, lakini mona vingi ng'hani kubanza mtula ndagu wa Imulungu.
7.27: Kwavija Yohana ayo yalongigwe mna Gamaandiko Gang'alile, ‘Imulungu kalonga, nomtuma msenga wangu yakulongolele, yaitande nzila yako.’ ”
7.28: Yesu kamambukiza kulonga, “Nowalongela, Yohana ni munhu mkulu kubanza munhu yoyose yakalile mwiisi. Lakini yeli mdodo Muundewa wa Imulungu ni munhu mkulu kubanza Yohana.”
7.29: Wanhu wose wamuhulike, hata wabokela kodi, wamtogola Imulungu kamba kanoga na wakala wabatizigwe na Yohana.
7.30: Lakini Mafalisayo na wafundiza Malagizo ga Musa walema kutenda ga Imulungu, kwavija walema kubatizigwa na Yohana.
7.31: Yesu kagendelela kulonga, “Vino niwasimulile kwa lusimo gani wanhu wa lukolo luno? Vino waigala na choni?
7.32: Waigala na wana wadodo wakalile mdigulilo. Kibumbila kimoja chokikemelela kibumbila kiyagwe, ‘Tuwatowela ng'ombe sugu, lakini hamuvinile bule! Tuwembila nyila za kuindilo, lakini hamulilile bule!’
7.33: Yohana Mbatizaji keza, kafunga kuja na hang'wile divai, mweye mulonga, ‘Kana kinyamkela!’
7.34: Mwana wa Munhu keza, kaja na kung'wa, mweye mulonga, ‘Muloleni munhu ino! Mmelo na mulevi, mbwiga wa wabokela kodi na wanhu waja otenda nzambi!’
7.35: Lakini nzewele ya Imulungu yokoneka inoga kwa wanhu waja wose oitogola.” Yesu ukae kumwake Simoni Mfalisayo
7.36: Mfalisayo imoja kamgoneka Yesu yakaje na heyo ndiya ya ichungulo. Avo Yesu kachola kuna ing'anda ya Mfalisayo, kakala na kuja.
7.37: Kudibuga dija kukala na mtwanzi imoja yakalile yotenda nzambi. Kahulika kamba Yesu kakala yoja mng'anda ya Mfalisayo ayo, avo kasola nyhupa ya alabasita imemile mavuta gonung'hila goya ga bei ng'hulu.
7.38: Kema kuchugu, habehi na magulu ga Yesu kolila, mahozi gake galagalila mgamagulu ga Yesu. Abaho kagahangusa magulu ga Yesu kwa mvili zake, kaganonela na kagagidila mavuta.
7.39: Mfalisayo ija viyone avo, kailongela, “Maza munhu ino yakalile mtula ndagu wa Imulungu, yahamjuwile mtwanzi ino yomgoga kavilihi, yahamjuwile kamema nzambi!”
7.40: Yesu kamulongela, “Simoni, nina mbuli ya kukulongela.” Simoni kalonga, “Ona, Mfundiza, nongela.”
7.41: Yesu kasonga kumulongela, “Kukala na wanhu wabili wakopile sente kwa munhu yokopesha sente. Imoja kakopa sente magana matano, na iyagwe kakopa malongo matano.
7.42: Wose wabili hawadahile kumuliha, avo munhu ija kawalekelela wose. Vino nani mna iwanhu waja yonda yamnogele ng'hani munhu ija?”
7.43: Simoni kamwidika, “Vinikona niye kokuwa ija yalekeleligwe sente nyingi.” Yesu kalonga, “Kulonga goya.”
7.44: Abaho kamuhindukila mtwanzi ija na kamulongela Simoni, “Komona mtwanzi ino? Niza kuna ikae yako, hungwelele mazi ga kusunha magulu gangu, lakini mtwanzi ino kagasunha magulu gangu kwa mahozi gake na kagahangusa kwa mvili zake.
7.45: Gweye hunibokele kwa kuninonela, lakini mtwanzi ino halekile kuganonela magulu gangu tangu vinizile.
7.46: Hunibakile pala jangu mavuta, lakini mtwanzi ino kambakaza magulu gangu mavuta gonung'hila goya.
7.47: Nokulongela, nzambi zake nyingi zigeligwa kumgongo, lekaavo kalagusa unogelwa mkulu. Lakini munhu yoyose yeli na nzambi kidogo zigeligwe kumgongo, kolagusa unogelwa mdodo.”
7.48: Abaho Yesu kamulongela mtwanzi ija, “Nzambi zako zigeligwa kumgongo.”
7.49: Wanhu wayagwe wakalile hamoja na Yesu kuna indiya, wasonga kuilongela, “Ino munhu gani yodaha kuzigela kumgongo nzambi za wanhu?”
7.50: Lakini Yesu kamulongela mtwanzi ija, “Kutamanila kwako kukukombola. Genda moyo uholile.”

8.1: Hamwande Yesu kafunga mwanza, kabitila mna gamabuga na vijiji kowapetela wanhu Mbuli Inogile ya Undewa wa Imulungu. Wanahina zake longo na wabili wachola nayo.
8.2: Watwanzi wayagwe wakalile walavigwe vinyamkela na kuhonyigwa mitamu yao vivija wamkweleleza. Watwanzi awo wakala Malia, yakemigwe Magidalena, ija yalavigwe vinyamkela saba,
8.3: Yoana mwehe wake Kuza yakalile msang'hanaji mkulu mna ikae ya mndewa Helode, na Suzana, na watwanzi wayagwe wengi. Watwanzi awo wakala osola vinhu vao na kuwataza Yesu na wanahina zake. Lusimo lwa muhandaji (Matayo 13:1-9; Maluko 4:1-9)
8.4: Wanhu wagendelela kwiza kwa Yesu kulawa kila buga. Lunhu mkulu viluitig'hane hamoja, Yesu kalulongela lusimo luno.
8.5: “Kukala na munhu kachola kuhanda mbeyu mumgunda wake. Viyakalile komiza izimbeyu, mbeyu ziyagwe zilagalila mnzila, wanhu wazibojoga, na ndege wazija.
8.6: Mbeyu ziyagwe zilagalila mdibwe hali na udongo kidogo. Vizotile, zinyala kwavija udongo ukala wabule unyefu.
8.7: Mbeyu ziyagwe zilagalila mna ivisolo va miba. Miba ikula na izizonga zimbeyu.
8.8: Mbeyu ziyagwe zilagalila mna udongo unogile. Zikula na kulela mbeyu nyingi kubanza zija zihandigwe, kila mbeyu ilela miyanza malongo longo.” Yesu viyalongile avo, kalonga kwa sauti ng'hulu, “Munhu yeli na magwiti, yahulike!” Simo zotufunza choni (Matayo 13:10-17; Maluko 4:10-12)
8.9: Wanahina zake Yesu wamuuza fambulo da lusimo luno.
8.10: Yesu kawedika, “Mweye mutendigwa kuzijuwa mbuli zifisigwe za Undewa wa Imulungu. Lakini kwa wanhu wayagwe, nolonga kwa simo, ili walole lakini sikuwone, na wategeleze lakini sikuwajuwe. Yesu kofambula lusimo lwa muhandaji (Matayo 13:18-23; Maluko 4:13-20)
8.11: “Dino ijo fambulo da muhandaji, mbeyu ni mbuli ya Imulungu.
8.12: Zija zilagalile mnzila zolagusa wanhu waja iwohulika mbuli ya Imulungu, lakini Mwenembago kokwiza na kuisola mbuli ayo mmizoyo yao ili waleke kutogola na kukomboligwa.
8.13: Mbeyu zilagalile mdibwe zolagusa wanhu waja oihulika mbuli ya Imulungu na kuibokela kwa kudeng'helela, lakini mbuli ayo haika mizizi mgati mmwao. Oitogola kwa kipindi kidodo, lakini wahagezigwa oileka mbuli ayo.
8.14: Mbeyu zilagalile mvisolo va miba zolagusa wanhu waja ohulika mbuli ya Imulungu, lakini viwogendelela, Mbuli ayo yozongigwa zongigwa na magayo, na utajili, na kudeng'helela vinhu va mwiisi. Wanhu awo hawalela bule matunda gonda gakangale.
8.15: Lakini mbeyu zilagalile hali na udongo unogile zolagusa wanhu waja iwohulika mbuli ya Imulungu na kuika mmizoyo yao na kuitogola, ofunga umoyo mbaka olela matunda. Taa kigubikigwe (Maluko 4:21-25)
8.16: “Wanhu hawabwinha taa na kuigubika na kikalango hebu kuika muuvungu wa lusazi. Lakini oika hana ikingolobweda, ili wanhu viwokwingila wone mulenge.
8.17: “Kinhu chochose kifisigwe chokwikigwa hanhu hazelu, na kinhu chochose kigubikigwe chojuwika na kugaligwa hana umulenge.
8.18: “Avo muiteganye na gaja gomuhulika, kwavija munhu yeli na kinhu kokongezeligwa, lakini ija yelibule kinhu kobokigwa hata kija kidodo kiyogesa kanacho.” Mamake na ndugu zake Yesu (Matayo 12:46-50; Maluko 3:31-35)
8.19: Mamake na ndugu zake Yesu wamcholela, lakini hawadahile kumvikila habehi mbuli ya lunhu lwa wanhu.
8.20: Munhu imoja kamulongela Yesu, “Mamako na ndugu zako wema kunze, olonda kukona.”
8.21: Yesu kawalongela wanhu wose, “Mamangu na ndugu zangu ni waja oihulika mbuli ya Imulungu na kuitenda.” Yesu kodihoza beho kulu (Matayo 8:23-27; Maluko 4:35-41)
8.22: Siku dimoja Yesu kakwela mwiingalawa hamoja na wanahina zake, kawalongela, “Tuloke umwambu.” Avo wasonga umwanza.
8.23: Viwakalile muumwanza, Yesu kawasa. Bahaja nyukwanyukwa da beho disonga kubuma mna idilamba, na ngalawa isonga kumema mazi, avo wose wakala mdizumozumo.
8.24: Wanahina wamgendela Yesu wamulamusa, wamulongela, “Go mkulu! Go mkulu! Tofa!” Yesu kalamuka, kadikomhokela beho na ng'humbi ya mazi. Vose vinyamala na kukala tuluu.
8.25: Abaho kawalongela wanahina zake, “Tamanilo jenu da kwahi?” Lakini awo wakanganya na kudumba, wailongela, “Ino munhu gani? Kodikomhokela beho na ng'humbi, navo vomuhulika!” Yesu komulava munhu vinyamkela (Matayo 8:28-34; Maluko 5:1-20)
8.26: Yesu na wanahina zake wavika kuna imwhani ya isi ya Wagelasi, muumwambu wa lamba kulawa Galilaya.
8.27: Viyahumuluke mwiingalawa, kamting'hana munhu imoja yeli na vinyamkela, yalawile kudibuga. Miyaka mingi munhu ayo kakala havala kiwalo wala hasinya ukae kumwake, lakini kakala yokala kuna gamapanga.
8.28: Viyamone Yesu, kaibwanha mmagulu ga Yesu, kaguta mizangi yolonga, “Gweye Yesu! Mwana wa Imulungu yeli Uchanha Ng'hani! Kolonda kunitenda choni? Nokupula, sikuunidununze!”
8.29: Kalonga avo kwavija Yesu kakala yamulagize ikinyamkela yamulawe munhu ayo. Miyanza mingi kinyamkela ayo kakala yomkumba munhu ayo. Hamoja wanhu wakala omgodeka mng'anda kuno makono gake na magulu gake gagodekigwa minyololo na mhingu, lakini kakala yokanha, na kinyamkela ayo kakala yomkimbiza mbaka kuluwala.
8.30: Yesu kamuuza munhu ija, “Twaga jako nani?” Kamwidika, “Twaga jangu Lunhu.” Kalonga avo kwavija vinyamkela wengi wakala wamkumbile.
8.31: Vinyamkela waja wampula Yesu sikuyawagale kuna dikolombo dikulu.
8.32: Habehi na aho kukala na bumbila kulu da nguluwe wakalile oja kukigongo. Avo vinyamkela wampula Yesu yawatogolele wawakumbe nguluwe. Yesu kawatogolela.
8.33: Vinyamkela wamulawa munhu ija, wawengila nguluwe. Bumbila jose da nguluwe dihumulukila mwiingema ya idilamba, wengila mdilamba, wose wafa mgamazi.
8.34: Wanhu wakalile owadima nguluwe awo wachona acho kilawilile, wakimbila na wazibwililisa mbuli azo kudibuga na mvijiji.
8.35: Wanhu wachola kulola kija kilawilile. Viwavikile kwa Yesu, wamona munhu ija yalavigwe vinyamkela kakala mmagulu ga Yesu, kavala viwalo, kana nzewele zake. Wanhu wose wadumba.
8.36: Na waja wayonile mbuli ayo, wawalongela wanhu vija munhu ayo yakalile na vinyamkela viyahonyigwe.
8.37: Abaho wanhu wose wa isi ija ya Wagelasi wampula Yesu yalawanye, kwavija wakala wadumbile ng'hani. Avo Yesu kakwela mwiingalawa na kulawanya.
8.38: Munhu ija yalavigwe vinyamkela kampula Yesu wachole wose. Lakini Yesu hamtogolele, kamulongela,
8.39: “Bwela ukae kumwako ukawalongele wanhu gose gayakutendele Imulungu.” Avo munhu ija kachola kila hanhu kudibuga dija, kawapetela wanhu mbuli zose ziyatendeligwe na Yesu. Mndele wa Yailo na mtwanzi yakwasile kiwalo cha Yesu (Matayo 9:18-26; Maluko 5:21-43)
8.40: Yesu viyabwelile mwambu uyagwe wa lamba, wanhu wambokela kwa deng'ho kwavija wose wakala ombeta.
8.41: Abaho keza munhu imoja, twaga jake Yailo. Munhu ayo kakala mkulu wa ng'anda ya kumpula Imulungu. Kamfugamila Yesu, kampula yachole ukae kumwake,
8.42: kwavija mndele wake yeli yaiyeka kakala mmabehi kufa. Mndele ayo kakala na miyaka longo na mibili. Yesu viyakalile kochola, wanhu wakala omsung'ha sung'ha kila mwambu.
8.43: Mna dibumbila dija da wanhu, kukala na mtwanzi imoja yakalile na utamu wa kutumika kwa miyaka longo na mibili. Kakala yamambukize vinhu vake vose kwa waganga, lakini kuduhu munhu yadahile kumuhonya.
8.44: Mtwanzi ija kamcholela Yesu kuchugu, kakwasa mhindo ya kiwalo cha Yesu, bahaja kutumika kuleka.
8.45: Yesu kauza, “Nani yanikwasile?” Wanhu wose wabela. Petulo kalonga, “Go mkulu, wanhu wose wakuzunguluka na kukusung'ha sung'ha.”
8.46: Lakini Yesu kalonga, “Kuna munhu kanikwasa, kwavija nihulika nguvu zinilawa.”
8.47: Mtwanzi ija viyone hadaha kuifisa, keza yogwaya, kaibwanha mmagulu ga Yesu. Baho mgameso ga wanhu, kamulongela Yesu habali kakwasa mhindo ya kiwalo chake, na vija viyahonyigwe bahaja.
8.48: Yesu kamulongela, “Mwanangu, kutamanila kwako kukuhonya. Chola moyo uholile.”
