8.49: Yesu viyakalile yang'hali yolonga, msenga kulawa ukae kumwake Yailo keza, kamulongela Yailo, “Mndele wako kamala kufa, avo sikuumgaze Mfundiza.”
8.50: Lakini Yesu viyahulike avo, kamulongela Yailo, “Sikuudumbe, gweye togola tu, mndele wako kohona.”
8.51: Viyavikile kuna ing'anda ya Yailo, Yesu kawagomesa wanhu sikuwengile hamoja nayo, ila kengila na Petulo na Yohana, na Yakobo na tatake na mamake mndele ayo.
8.52: Wanhu wose wakala olila na kumuyalalila imwana. Yesu kawalongela, “Sikumulile, kwavija imwana hafile bule, kawasa tu!”
8.53: Wanhu wose wamseka kwavija wakala wajuwile imwana kakala yafile.
8.54: Lakini Yesu kamgoga mkono, kamulongela, “Mwanangu, lamuka!”
8.55: Ugima wake umbwelela mndele ija, bahaja kalamuka. Abaho Yesu kawalagiza wamgwee ndiya.
8.56: Tatake na mamake wakanganya ng'hani, lakini Yesu kawagomesa sikuwamulongele munhu yoyose kija kilawilile.

9.1: Yesu kawakema hamoja wanahina zake longo na wabili, kawagwaa nguvu na udahi wa kulava vinyamkela na kuwahonya watamu.
9.2: Abaho kawatuma wachole wakawapetele wanhu usenga wa Undewa wa Imulungu na kuhonya watamu.
9.3: Kawalongela, “Sikumusole kinhu chochose muumwanza wenu. Sikumusole mkongoja, wala mkoba, wala ndiya, wala sente, wala viwalo vibili.
9.4: Ng'anda yoyose yonda mwingile na kugonekigwa, kaleni mumo mbaka vonda musegele mna idibuga dijo.
9.5: Wanhu wahalema kuwabokela, segeleni buga dijo na kung'huseni timbwisi dili mmagulu genu kiwe kilaguso kamba wawatendela nzambi.”
9.6: Wanahina wafunga mwanza, wabitila vijiji vose owapetela wanhu Mbuli Inogile na kuwahonya wanhu kila hanhu. Helode konyawanyawa (Matayo 14:1-12; Maluko 6:14-29)
9.7: Helode yakalile mndewa wa Galilaya, kahulika mbuli zose ziyatendile Yesu. Kanyawanyawa ng'hani, kwavija wanhu wakala olonga Yohana Mbatizaji kazilibuka kulawa kwa wafile.
9.8: Wanhu wayagwe walonga Eliya kalawilila, wayagwe walonga imoja wa watula ndagu wa Imulungu wa umwaka kazilibuka kulawa kuna iwanhu wafile.
9.9: Lakini Helode kalonga, “Yohana nimkanha dipala, vino ino ayo nani inihulika mbuli zake?” Nayo kalonda kumona Yesu. Yesu kowagwaa ndiya wanhu wengi (Matayo 14:13-21; Maluko 6:30-44; Yohana 6:1-14)
9.10: Watumigwa waja viwabwelile, wamulongela Yesu kila kinhu wakitendile. Yesu kawasola, kachola nao waiyeka kuna dibuga dikemigwe Betisaida.
9.11: Lakini wanhu viwajuwile avo, wamkweleleza Yesu. Nayo kawabokela, kalonga nao mbuli ya Undewa wa Imulungu na kawahonya waja wakalile watamu.
9.12: Zuwa vidisongile kuhonga, wanahina longo na wabili wamcholela Yesu, wamulongela, “Walongele wanhu wachole kuna ivijiji na migunda ili behi na hano wakazahile ndiya na hanhu ha kuwasa, kwavija hano hatwili twa kuluwala.”
9.13: Lakini Yesu kawalongela, “Mweye wagweleleni ndiya waje.” Lakini wao wamwidika, “Tuna magate matano na somba wabili tu. Kolonda tuchole tukawagulile ndiya lunhu lose luno?”
9.14: Wambigalo waiyeka wakalile hanhu aho wakala ovika elufu tano. Yesu kawalongela wanahina zake, “Walongeleni wanhu wakale mna ivibumbila va wanhu malongo matano.”
9.15: Nao wanahina watenda vivo. Wanhu wose wakala hasi.
9.16: Abaho Yesu kagasola magate matano na somba wabili, kalola uchanha kuulanga, kamgwaa nhogolwa Imulungu, kagabanzula gamagate na iwasomba, kawagwaa wanahina zake wawagwelele wanhu.
9.17: Wanhu wose waja na kwiguta. Wanahina zake wasola vigelo longo na vibili vimemile vinhu visigale. Petulo komtogola Yesu ayo Kilisito (Matayo 16:13-19; Maluko 8:27-29)
9.18: Siku dimoja Yesu kakala yaiyeka kompula Imulungu. Wanahina zake wamcholela, nayo kawauza, “Vino wanhu olonga niye na nani?”
9.19: Wamwidika, “Wanhu wayagwe olonga gweye kwa Yohana Mbatizaji, wayagwe olonga kwa Eliya, kuno wayagwe olonga gweye kwa imoja wa watula ndagu wa Imulungu wa umwaka yazilibuke kulawa kwa wafile.”
9.20: Yesu kawauza, “Na mweye molonga niye na nani?” Petulo kamwidika, “Gweye kwa Kilisito, wa Imulungu.”
9.21: Abaho Yesu kawagomesa wanahina zake sikuwamulongele munhu yoyose mbuli ayo. Yesu kolonga mbuli ya ifa yake (Matayo 16:20-28; Maluko 8:30-9:1)
9.22: Vivija Yesu kawalongela, “Mwana wa Munhu kolondigwa yadununzike ng'hani, na kulemigwa na wavele na wakulu wa walava nhosa na wafundiza Malagizo ga Musa. Kokomigwa lakini siku da kadatu kozilibuka.”
9.23: Abaho Yesu kawalongela wanhu wose, “Munhu yoyose yolonda kunikweleleza, yaileme mwenyego, yaidikwe msalaba wake kila siku, yanikweleleze.
9.24: Kwavija munhu yoyose yolonda kuukombola ugima wake mwenyego kowagiza, lakini munhu yoyose yowagiza ugima wake mbuli ya niye, koukombola.
9.25: Vino munhu yahapata kila kinhu mwiisi, lakini kowagiza ugima wake, munhu ayo kopata choni?
9.26: Kamba munhu konyonela kinyala niye na mafundizo gangu, Mwana wa Munhu nayo yaheza muukulu wake na wa Tatake na wasenga wa kuulanga wang'alile komonela kinyala munhu ayo.
9.27: Lakini nowalongela ukweli, wanhu wayagwe wemile hano honda wafe mbaka wawone Undewa wa Imulungu.” Yesu kogaluka ikihanga (Matayo 17:1-8; Maluko 9:2-8)
9.28: Vizibitile siku nane toka yalonge mbuli azo, Yesu kawasola Petulo na Yohana na Yakobo kachola nao kukigongo kumpula Imulungu.
9.29: Viyakalile kompula Imulungu, kihanga chake kigaluka, viwalo vake vikala vizelu chuwee!
9.30: Bahaja wanhu wabili wakala aho olonga nayo. Nao wakala Musa na Eliya,
9.31: wakoneka muukulu, wakala olonga na Yesu mbuli ya ifa yake yonda yaimambukize ako Yelusalemu.
9.32: Petulo na wayage wakala okuluza. Viwalamuke, wawona ukulu wa Yesu na wanhu wabili wemile nayo.
9.33: Wanhu waja viwakalile osegela, Petulo kamulongela Yesu, “Go mkulu, vinoga siye tukale hano! Tuzenge viheha vidatu, kimoja chako, kimoja cha Musa na kimoja cha Eliya.” Petulo kakala hajuwa bule kija kiyolonga.
9.34: Petulo yang'hali yolonga, wingu dilawilila, diwagubika na kungugu jake, wanahina wadumba ng'hani wingu dijo vidiwagubike.
9.35: Sauti ilonga kulawa mdiwingu, “Ino ayo Mwanangu inimsagule. Mtegelezeni!”
9.36: Sauti ayo viinyamale, Yesu kasigala yaiyeka. Wanahina wanyamala tuluu, na kipindi kija hawamulongele munhu yoyose kija kiwone. Yesu komulava mbwanga imoja kinyamkela (Matayo 17:14-18; Maluko 9:14-27)
9.37: Imitondo yake Yesu na wanahina zake wadatu wahumuluka kukigongo. Lunhu mkulu lwa wanhu luiting'hana na Yesu.
9.38: Munhu imoja mna ulunhu kaguta, “Mfundiza! Nokupula undolele mwanangu, mwanangu yeli yaiyeka!
9.39: Kinyamkela komkumba na komtenda yagute nyangi, komgela kisango kuno kolawa miholovu mmulomo. Kogendelela kumulumiza na hamuleka hima bule!
9.40: Niwapula wanahina zako wamulave kinyamkela ayo, lakini hawadahile bule.”
9.41: Yesu kawalongela, “Mweye lukolo lulibule kutamanila na lwagile! Nokala na mweye mbaka lini? Nogela kitumbe kumgongo mbaka lini?” Abaho kamulongela munhu ija, “Mgale hano mwanago.”
9.42: Mbwanga ija viyakalile komwizila Yesu, kinyamkela kambwanha hasi na kamgela kisango. Lakini Yesu kamkomhokela kinyamkela, kamuhonya mbwanga ija, na kamgwaa tatake.
9.43: Wanhu wose wakanganya kwa udahi mkulu wa Imulungu. Yesu kolonga kabili mbuli ya ifa yake (Matayo 17:22-23; Maluko 9:30-32) Wanhu viwakalile wang'hali okanganya mbuli ziyatendile Yesu, Yesu kawalongela wanahina zake,
9.44: “Sikumuisemwe mbuli inilonda kuwalongela! Mwana wa Munhu kogeligwa mmakono ga wanhu.”
9.45: Lakini wanahina zake hawajuwile fambulo da ulonzi awo. Ukala ufisigwe kumwao avo hawadahile kuujuwa, nao wadumba kumuuza Yesu. Nani yeli munhu mkulu? (Matayo 18:1-5; Maluko 9:33-37)
9.46: Wanahina wa Yesu wasonga kuibamilila wao kwa wao nani yeli munhu mkulu viweli.
9.47: Yesu kakijuwa kiwakalile ogesa, kamsola mwana mdodo, kamwika behi nayo.
9.48: Abaho kawalongela wanahina zake, “Munhu yoyose yombokela mwana ino kwa twaga jangu, konibokela niye, na munhu yoyose yombokela niye, kombokela ija yanhumile. Kwavija munhu yeli mdodo vimwili, ayo munhu mkulu kubanza wose.” Munhu hamwihilani mweye miyenu (Maluko 9:38-40)
9.49: Yohana kamulongela Yesu, “Mndewa, tumona munhu kolava vinyamkela kwa twaga jako. Tumgomesa kwavija halawa mkibumbila chetu.”
9.50: Yesu kamulongela Yohana na wanahina wayagwe, “Sikumumgomese, kwavija munhu yoyose hamwihilani mweye miyenu.” Wanhu wa kijiji cha Samalia olema kumbokela Yesu
9.51: Kipindi cha Yesu kugaligwa kuulanga vikikalile mmabehi, kagangamala, kachola Yelusalemu.
9.52: Kawatuma wasenga wamulongolele wachole kuna ikijiji kili mwiisi ya Samalia kumtandila kila kinhu.
9.53: Lakini wanhu wa kijiji cha Samalia hawambokele Yesu, kwavija wajuwa kamba kakala kochola Yelusalemu.
9.54: Wanahina zake, Yakobo na Yohana viwone avo, walonga, “Mndewa, kolonda tulagize moto kulawa kuulanga uwasakaze wose?”
9.55: Yesu kahinduka kawakomhokela. Kawalongela, “Hamujuwile bule loho gani imulinayo, kwavija Mwana wa Munhu hezile kuubananga ugima wa wanhu lakini keza kuukombola.”
9.56: Abaho Yesu na wanahina zake wachola kuna ikijiji kiyagwe. Wanhu ofaya kumkweleleza Yesu (Matayo 8:19-22)
9.57: Viwakalile mnzila, munhu imoja kamulongela Yesu, “Nokukweleleza kokose konda uchole.”
9.58: Yesu kamulongela, “Vizongo wana mhango na ndege wana mvulu, lakini Mwana wa Munhu kabule hanhu ha kubwihila na kutambalala.”
9.59: Yesu kamulongela munhu iyagwe, “Nikweleleze.” Lakini munhu ija kalonga, “Go mkulu, beta tanhu mbwele ukae hamzike tatangu.”
9.60: Yesu kamwidika, “Waleke wanhu wafile wawazike wanhu wafile wayao. Lakini gweye chola ukawapetele wanhu Undewa wa Imulungu.”
9.61: Munhu iyagwe kalonga, “Go mkulu, nokukweleleza, lakini beta tanhu halulage lukolo lwangu.”
9.62: Yesu kamulongela, “Munhu yoyose yokwaluka kulima abaho kolola kuchugu, hafaya Muundewa wa Imulungu.”

10.1: Abaho Mndewa Yesu kawasagula wanhu wayagwe malongo saba na wabili, kawatuma wabili wabili wamulongolele kila kijiji na kila hanhu kuyalondile kuchola.
10.2: Kawalongela, “Kuna ndiya nyingi lakini wasang'hanaji wadodo. Mpuleni Mndewa wa indiya yawatume wasang'hanaji mumgunda wake.
10.3: Gendeni! Nowatuma mweye kamba ng'hondolo mna iwambwizi.
10.4: Sikumusole mfuko hebu mkoba hebu vilatu. Sikumwime na kumulamusa munhu yoyose mnzila.
10.5: Ng'anda yoyose yonda mwingile, tanhu mulonge, ‘Tindiwalo dikale mng'anda ino.’
10.6: Kamba hana munhu kodinogela tindiwalo, tindiwalo jenu dokala nayo, kamba kuduhu munhu yodinogela tindiwalo, tindiwalo jenu dowabwelela.
10.7: Mkale mng'anda ayo, diyeni na kung'wa chochose chonda wawagwelele, kwavija msang'hanaji kolondigwa yapate malipo gake. Sikumuhamehame kulawa ng'anda imoja kuchola iyagwe.
10.8: Buga jojose donda mwingile na kubokeligwa, diyeni vija vonda wawagwelele.
10.9: Wahonyeni watamu weli kuko, na muwalongele, ‘Undewa wa Imulungu wa behi yenu.’
10.10: Lakini buga jojose donda mwingile na wanhu olema kuwabokela, laweni mumo, na vimubita kuna zinzila zao, mulonge,
10.11: ‘Hata matimbwisi ga buga jenu gatunanahile mmagulu getu togakung'husa kiwe kilaguso kumwenu kamba mututendela gehile. Lakini mujuwe kamba Undewa wa Imulungu wammabehi!’
10.12: Nowalongela ukweli, mna isiku ya nhaguso, Imulungu kolagusa bazi ng'hani kwa wanhu wa buga da Sodoma kubanza wanhu wa buga dijo! Mabuga golema kutogola (Matayo 11:20-24)
10.13: “Kogaya gweye buga da Kolazini! Kogaya gweye buga da Betisaida! Maza unzonza utendigwe kumwenu mweye wahatendigwe mna gamabuga ga Tilo na Sidoni, wanhu zake wahalekile mwaka nzambi zao na kuvala magunia na kuibakaza mitozi, kulagusa kamba waleka nzambi!
10.14: Mwiisiku ya nhaguso, Imulungu kolagusa bazi ng'hani kwa wanhu wa mabuga ga Tilo na Sidoni kubanza mweye.
10.15: Gweye buga da Kapelinaumu, vino kolonda kuinula mwenyego mbaka uchanha kuulanga? Mawe! Kohumulusigwa mbaka kowochola wanhu wafile!”
10.16: Yesu kawalongela wanahina zake, “Munhu yoyose yowategeleza mweye, konhegeleza niye, na yoyose yowalema mweye, kondema niye. Na munhu yoyose yondema niye, komulema ija yanhumile.” Kubwela kwa waja malongo saba na wabili
10.17: Abaho wanhu waja malongo saba na wabili wabwela kuno odeng'helela. Walonga, “Mndewa, hata vinyamkela watutegeleza vituwakomhokele kwa twaga jako!”
10.18: YesTegelezeni! Niwagwaa udahi, avo modaha kukanyaga mgendela hasi na inge na kuzihuma nguvu zose za Mwenembago. Kuduhu kinhu chonda kiwalumize.u kawedika, “Nimona Mwenembago kolagala kulawa kuulanga kamba lumwesa.
10.19: Tegelezeni! Niwagwaa udahi, avo modaha kukanyaga mgendela hasi na inge na kuzihuma nguvu zose za Mwenembago. Kuduhu kinhu chonda kiwalumize.
10.20: Lakini sikumudeng'helele kwavija vinyamkela owategeleza, ila deng'heleleni kwavija matwaga genu gandikigwa kuulanga.” Yesu kodeng'helela (Matayo 11:25-27; 13:16-17)
10.21: Kipindi kija Yesu kadeng'helela kwa udahi wa Loho Yang'alile, kalonga, “Tata, Mndewa wa kuulanga na mwiisi! Nokutogola kwavija kuwafisa mbuli zino wanhu weli na nzewele na ubala, na kuwagubulila wana wadodo. Ona, Tata, vino vivo viulondile.
10.22: “Tatangu kanigwaa vinhu vose. Kuduhu munhu yamjuwile Mwana ila Tata yaiyeka, na kuduhu munhu yamjuwile Tata ila Mwana na waja wose Mwana yawasagule kuwagubulila wamjuwe Tata.”
10.23: Abaho Yesu kawahindukila wanahina zake, kalonga nao kinyelegezi, “Wamweda wanhu wose ovona vinhu vimona mweye!
10.24: Nowalongela ukweli, watula ndagu wengi wa Imulungu na wandewa walonda kuvona vimona mweye, lakini hawavonile bule, na vivija walonda kuhulika vimuhulika mweye, lakini hawahulike bule.” Lusimo lwa Msamalia yanogile
10.25: Munhu imoja yagajuwile goya Malagizo ga Musa, kachola kwa Yesu yamgeze. Avo kamuuza, “Mfundiza, vino nhende choni niupate ugima wa milele?”
10.26: Yesu kamwidika, “Vino, Malagizo golongaze na gweye kogajuwaze?”
10.27: Munhu ija kamwidika, “ ‘Mnogele Mndewa Imulungu wako kwa moyo wako wose, na kwa loho yako yose, na kwa nguvu zako zose, na kwa nzewele zako zose,’ na ‘Umnogele miyago kamba viuinogela mwenyego.’ ”
10.28: Yesu kamwidika, “Kulonga goya, tenda vivo na gweye kokuwa na ugima.”
10.29: Lakini munhu ija kalonda kuilagusa kamba kanoga, avo kamuuza Yesu, “Vino miyangu ayo nani?”
10.30: Yesu kamwidika, “Munhu imoja kakala kolawa Yelusalemu kochola Yeliko. Mnzila, wabavi wamgoga, wamboka vinhu vake, na kumtowa, wamuleka habehi na kufa.
10.31: Abaho mulava nhosa imoja kakala yohumuluka kubitila nzila iija. Viyamone, kainega, kabitila kumgwazo.
10.32: Vivija Mlawi imoja viyavikile aho, kamulola munhu ija, nayo kainega, kabitila kumgwazo.
10.33: Lakini Msamalia imoja yakalile muumwanza kavika aho hayakalile munhu ija. Nayo viyamone, kamonela bazi.
10.34: Kamcholela, kamgela mavuta na divai mna ivilonda vake na kavifunga goya. Abaho kamkweza mumgongo wa kihongwe wake, kamgala mbaka kuna ing'anda ya wageni na kumulolesa goya.
10.35: Imitondo yake kalava sente kamgwaa mwene ng'anda, kamulongela, ‘Mulolese goya munhu ino. Chochose chonda umsang'hanile, nahabwela nokugwaa fungu jako.’ ”
10.36: Abaho Yesu kamuuza, “Viukona gweye, mna iwanhu awo wadatu, nani yakalile miyage munhu ija yatoigwe na wabavi?”
10.37: Munhu ija kamwidika, “Ija yamonele bazi.” Yesu kamulongela, “Na gweye genda ukatende vivo.” Yesu kowatembelela Mata na Malia
10.38: Yesu na wanahina zake viwakalile mnzila, wengila kuna ikijiji kimoja. Mtwanzi imoja twaga jake Mata kambokela ukae kumwake.
10.39: Mata kakala na mdodo wake yakemigwe Malia, yakalile hasi behi na magulu ga Yesu na kutegeleza mafundizo gake.
10.40: Lakini Mata kakala yohunganika na sang'hano nyingi ziyalondeke kusang'hana, avo kamcholela Yesu, kamulongela, “Mndewa, vino hutonga bule kamba mdodo wangu kanilekela sang'hano zose nisang'hane niiyeka? Mulongele yeze yanitaze!”
10.41: Lakini Mndewa kamwidika, “Gwee Mata gwee! Kohunganika na kugaya kwa vinhu vingi,
10.42: lakini kimoja kiiyeka kilondigwa. Malia kasagula kinhu kinogile, na honda kisegesigwe bule kumwake.”

11.1: Siku dimoja Yesu kakala hanhu kompula Imulungu. Viyamambukize, mwanahina wake imoja kamulongela, “Mndewa, tufundize kupula, kamba vija Yohana viyawafundize wanahina zake.”
11.2: Yesu kawalongela, “Mwahampula Imulungu, longeni vino. ‘Tataetu uli kuulanga. Twaga jako ditogoligwe, Undewa wako wize.
11.3: Utugwee lelo ndiya ya kila siku.
11.4: Uzigele kumgongo nzambi zetu, kamba vija siye vituzigela kumgongo nzambi za wanhu. Sikuutugele mmagezo.’ ”
11.5: Abaho Yesu kawalongela wanahina zake, “Munhu gani kumwenu yeli na mbwiga yahamcholela kilo kikulu na kumulongela, ‘Mbwigangu, ng'hopeshe magate madatu,
11.6: kwavija mbwigangu keza, kalawa mwanza, na niye nabule ndiya ya kumgwaa!’
11.7: na ija yeli mng'anda yamwidike, ‘Sikuunigaze! Lwivi luhindigwa mwaka, na niye na wanangu tuwasa, avo sidaha kulamuka kukugwaa kinhu chochose.’
11.8: Nowalongela vino, hata yahalema kulamuka na kumgwaa magate kwavija mbwigake, lakini kwavija kabule kinyala kugendelela kumpula, kolamuka na kumgwaa kila kinhu kiyopula.
11.9: “Avo nowalongela, puleni na mweye mogweleligwa, zahileni na mweye movona, gong'ondeni ulwivi na mweye movugulilwa.
11.10: Kwavija waja wose ompula Imulungu ogweleligwa, na waja ozahila opata, na lwivi lovuguligwa kwa munhu yoyose yogong'onda.
11.11: Vino kuna munhu yoyose kumwenu kamba mwanage yahampula somba, heyo komgwaa zoka?
11.13: Kamba mweye wene nzambi mojuwa kuwagwaa wanenu vinhu vinogile, lakini Tataenu yeli kuulanga kowagwaa ng'hani Loho Yang'alile wanhu waja ompula.” Yesu na Belizebuli (Matayo 12:22-30; Maluko 3:20-27)
11.14: Siku dimoja Yesu kakala komulava kinyamkela yamtendile munhu imoja yalemelwe kulonga. Kinyamkela ayo viyamulawile, munhu ija kasonga kulonga. Lunhu lwa wanhu lukanganya ng'hani,
11.15: lakini wanhu wayagwe walonga, “Belizebuli, mkulu wa vinyamkela, ayo yomgwaa udahi wa kulava vinyamkela.”
11.16: Wanhu wayagwe walonda kumgeza Yesu, avo wampula yatende kilaguso kulawa kuulanga.
11.17: Lakini Yesu kakijuwa kiwakalile okigesa, avo kawalongela, “Undewa wowose wahaigola mna ivibumbila na kuitowa, undewa awo ofa, na lubuga lumoja lwahaigola, lubuga lulo lofa.
11.18: Avo kamba undewa wa Mwenembago wahaigola mvibumbila na kuitowa, undewa awo okwimaze? Mweye molonga niye nolava vinyamkela kwavija Belizebuli konigwaa udahi wa kutenda vivo.
11.19: Kamba nolava vinyamkela kwa udahi wa Belizebuli, avo wanhu wenu olava vinyamkela kwa udahi wa nani? Kwa mbuli ayo wanhu wenu wenyego owatagusa kamba mobananga!
11.20: Lakini kamba nowalava vinyamkela kwa udahi wa Imulungu, avo mujuwe kamba Undewa wa Imulungu uvika mwaka kumwenu.
11.21: “Munhu mwene nguvu viyokaliza ng'anda yake kwa silaha, vinhu vake havisoligwa bule.
11.22: Lakini yaheza munhu mwene nguvu kubanza heyo, komtowa na kumuhuma, komboka silaha zake ziyatamanile na koigolela na wayage vija viyasolile.
11.23: “Munhu yoyose heli ubanzi wangu konilema, na munhu yoyose yolema kunitaza kwika hamoja, ayo kopwililisa. Kubwela kwa kinyamkela (Matayo 12:43-45)
11.24: “Kinyamkela yahamulawa munhu, kochola mwiisi inyalile kuzahila hanhu ha kubwihila. Yahaswela, koilongela, ‘Nobwela ukayangu kunilawile.’
11.25: Yahabwela na kuivika ng'anda ifagiligwa na kila kinhu kikigwa goya,
11.26: baho kobwela na kuwagala vinyamkela wayagwe saba wehile kubanza heyo, awo okwiza na kukala mumo. Avo ugima wa munhu ayo okuwa wiha kubanza aho haichanduso.” Deng'ho da kweli
11.27: Yesu yang'hali yolonga, mtwanzi imoja kulawa kuna ulunhu kamulongela kwa sauti ng'hulu, “Kamweda mtwanzi yakulelile na kukukong'heza!”
11.28: Lakini Yesu kamwidika, “Wamweda ng'hani wanhu wose ohulika mbuli ya Imulungu na kuigoga!” Wanhu olonda unzonza (Matayo 12:38-42)
11.29: Wanhu viwakalile omsung'ha sung'ha, Yesu kagendelela kulonga, “Lukolo luno lwa wanhu otenda nzambi! Lolonda kilaguso, lakini kuduhu kilaguso chochose chonda wagweleligwe, ila kilaguso cha Yona.
11.30: Kamba vija mtula ndagu wa Imulungu Yona viyakalile kilaguso kwa wanhu wa Ninawi, vivo ili kwa Mwana wa Munhu vonda yawe kilaguso kwa wanhu wa lukolo luno.
11.31: Mna isiku ya nhaguso, Malikia wa Sheba kokwima na kuwatagusa mweye kamba mubananga, kwavija heyo kafunga mwanza kulawa mwiisi yake kachola kumtegeleza Mndewa Sulemani na mafundizo gake geli na nzewele. Nowalongela, hano hana munhu mkulu kubanza Sulemani.
11.32: Mna isiku ya nhaguso, wanhu wa Ninawi okwima na kuwatagusa mweye, kwavija awo waleka nzambi Yona viyawapetele. Lakini nowalongela, hano hana munhu mkulu kubanza Yona! Mulenge wa lukuli (Matayo 5:15; 6:22-23)
11.33: “Kuduhu munhu yobwinha taa na kuigubika na kikalango, lakini koika kukingolobweda, ili wanhu okwingila mng'anda wone mulenge.
11.34: Meso gako mulukuli lwako gaigala na taa. Kamba meso gako magima, lukuli lwako lose lokuwa na mulenge, lakini meso gako gahabanangika, lukuli lwako lose lokuwa mdiziza.
11.35: Muiteganye, mulenge uli mgati mmwenu sikuuwe ziza.
11.36: Kamba lukuli lwako lose lwahawa na mulenge, na kuduhu hanhu heli na ziza, lukuli lwako lose lokuwa na lenge eka, kamba vija taa viimwemwesa mulenge wake.” Yesu kowalonga Mafalisayo na wafundiza Malagizo ga Musa (Matayo 23:1-36; Maluko 12:38-40)
11.37: Yesu viyamambukize kulonga, Mfalisayo imoja kamgoneka ukae kumwake wakaje hamoja, avo Yesu kengila mng'anda, kakala hasi, kasonga kuja.
11.38: Mfalisayo ayo kakanganya ng'hani viyamone Yesu koja bila kusunha makono gake.
11.39: Avo Mndewa kamulongela, “Mweye Mafalisayo mosunha vikasi na sahani kwa kunze, lakini mgati mmwenu mmema ubokaji na gehile.
11.40: Mweye mwa wabozi! Vino siyo Imulungu yavitendile va kunze na va mgati vivija?
11.41: Lakini laveni vili mgati na muwagwee wakiwa na kila kinhu chonoga kumwenu.
11.42: “Mogaya mweye Mafalisayo! Kwavija momgwaa Imulungu fungu da longo da majani gonung'hila goya kamba vija binzali na kalafuu, na mboga ziyagwe, lakini moleka kutenda ganogile kwa wanhu na kumnogela Imulungu. Molondigwa kutenda gano na sikumugaleke gago gayagwe.
11.43: “Mogaya mweye Mafalisayo! Kwavija monogelwa kukala kuna ivigoda va haulongozi mzing'anda za kumpula Imulungu na kulamusigwa mna gamagulilo.
11.44: Mogaya mweye! Kwavija muigala na mapanga hagakoneka, wanhu obita uchanha bila kugajuwa.”
11.45: Munhu imoja yagajuwile goya Malagizo ga Musa kamulongela Yesu, “Mfundiza, wahalonga avo, kotuliga siye vivija!”
11.46: Yesu kamwidika, “Vivija mogaya mweye mugajuwile goya Malagizo ga Musa! Kwavija mowapapiza wanhu mizigo mikulu, lakini mweye wenyego hamulonda kugolosa makono kuwataza kupapa.
11.47: Mogaya mweye, kwavija mogazengela goya mapanga ga watula ndagu wa Imulungu, waja wakomigwe na wahenga zenu.
11.48: Mweye wenyego mokitogola kija kiwatendile wahenga zenu, kwavija wao wawakoma watula ndagu wa Imulungu, na mweye mogazengela goya mapanga gao.
11.49: Kwa mbuli ayo, nzewele ya Imulungu ilonga, ‘Nowatuma watula ndagu wa Imulungu na watumigwa, wayagwe owakoma na wayagwe owadununza!’
11.50: Avo wanhu wa lukolo luno otagusigwa mbuli ya kuwakoma watula ndagu wose wa Imulungu, kulawa kuna ichanduso cha isi,
11.51: toka kukomigwa kwa Habili mbaka kukomigwa kwa Zakalia, ija yakomigwe hagati ha upango wa kulavila nhosa na Hanhu Hong'ala. Ona, nowalongela, wanhu wa lukolo luno otagusigwa kwa kuwakoma wao!”
11.52: “Mogaya mweye wafundiza Malagizo ga Musa! Kwavija mofisa luvugulo lwa kuvugulila lwivi lwa ng'anda ya kuifunzila. Mweye wenyego hamwingila bule, abaho muwagomesa waja wakalile olonda kwingila sikuwengile!”
11.53: Yesu viyasegele hanhu aho, wafundiza Malagizo ga Musa na Mafalisayo wasonga kumulonga vihile na kumuuza mbuli nyingi,
11.54: wageza kumnamata kwa mbuli zake zonda yalonge.

12.1: Wanhu wengi waiting'hana hamoja mbaka wanhu wakala oikanyaga. Tanhu Yesu kawalongela wanahina zake, “Iteganyeni na hamila ya Mafalisayo, nao ndo utapitapi.
12.2: Kinhu chochose kigubikigwe chogubuligwa, na kija kifisigwe chojuwika.
12.3: Avo chochose kimulongile mdiziza chohulikigwa mmulenge, na chochose kimunyong'onye mwiiyeka mdigati dihindigwe chopetigwa mkiswili. Ija wa kumdumba (Matayo 10:28-31)
12.4: “Nowalongela mweye mbwiga zangu, sikumuwadumbe wanhu waja oukoma lukuli, abaho hawadaha kutenda kinhu kiyagwe chochose kihile.
12.5: Lakini nowalagusila wa kumdumba, mdumbeni Imulungu, heyo yahakoma, kana udahi wa kumwasa munhu muumoto wa jehanamu. Nowalongeleni, mdumbeni ayo!
12.6: “Vino nhongwa watano hawachuuzigwa kwa sente ndodo mbili? Lakini kuduhu hata imoja yosemwigwa na Imulungu.
12.7: Hata mvili zili mmapala genu zipetigwa zose. Avo sikumudumbe. Mweye munoga ng'hani kubanza nhongwa wengi! Kumtogola na kumulema Kilisito (Matayo 10:32-33; 12:32; 10:19-20)
12.8: “Nowalongeleni ukweli, munhu yoyose yonitogola niye mgameso ga wanhu, Mwana wa Munhu nayo komtogola mgameso ga wasenga wa Imulungu.
12.9: Lakini munhu yoyose yonibela niye mgameso ga wanhu, Mwana wa Munhu nayo kombela mgameso ga wasenga wa Imulungu.
12.10: “Munhu yoyose yomulonga vihile Mwana wa Munhu, nzambi zake zogeligwa kumgongo, lakini munhu yoyose yomuliga Loho Yang'alile, nzambi zake honda zigeligwe kumgongo bule.
12.11: “Wahawagala haulongozi wa ng'anda za kumpula Imulungu, na mgameso ga wakulu wa isi na wandewa, sikumunyawenyawe vija vonda mwidike hebu kija chonda mulonge.
12.12: Kwavija Loho Yang'alile kowafundiza saa iija gaja gomulondigwa kulonga.” Lusimo lwa tajili mbozi
12.13: Munhu imoja muulunhu kamulongela Yesu, “Mfundiza, mulongele ndugu yangu tuigolele uhazi wa tataetu.”
12.14: Yesu kamwidika, “Mbwigangu, nani yanigwelele udahi wa kuwalamula hebu kuwagolela uhazi wenu?”
12.15: Abaho kagendelela kuwalongela wose, “Muiteganye na ugila! Kwavija ugima wa munhu hautamanila wingi wa vinhu viyelinavo.”
12.16: Abaho Yesu kawalongela lusimo luno, “Kukala na munhu imoja yakalile na mgunda uli na ndiya nyingi.
12.17: Kasonga kugelegeza mwenyego, ‘Nabule hanhu ha kwika ndiya yangu yose. Nhendeze?’
12.18: Abaho kailongela, ‘Notenda vino, nogatula makanho gangu na kuzenga makulu ng'hani. Mumo nokwika ndiya yangu na vinhu vangu viyagwe.
12.19: Abaho noilongela, gweye moyo wangu! Kuna vinhu vose vinogile kwa miyaka heleketwaa. Bwihila, diya, ing'wa, na kudeng'helela!’
12.20: Lakini Imulungu kamulongela, ‘Gweye kwa mbozi! Kilo cha lelo noulonda ugima wako, abaho vinhu vose vino viuikile vokuwa va nani?’ ”
12.21: Abaho Yesu kamambukiza kulonga, “Vino vivo ili kwa waja oikila vinhu vao wenyego, lakini haweka vinhu vao kwa Imulungu.” Kumtamanila Imulungu (Matayo 6:25-34)
12.22: Abaho Yesu kawalongela wanahina zake, “Nowalongela, sikumuigaiye ndiya imulonda ili muwe wagima, hebu viwalo vimulonda kwa ng'huli zenu.
12.23: Kwavija ugima unoga kubanza ndiya, na lukuli lunoga kubanza viwalo.
12.24: Waloleni bondwa, hawahanda, hawasenga, wabule makanho, lakini Imulungu kowadima! Vino Imulungu hawanogela ng'hani mweye kubanza iwabondwa?
12.25: Nani kumwenu kwa kuigaza ng'hani kodaha kwengeza hata saa dimoja da ugima wake?
12.26: Kamba hamudaha kutenda mbuli ndodo kamba ino, habali moigaza kwa mbuli ziyagwe?
12.27: Galoleni maluwa vigokula. Hagasang'hana hebu hagaisonela viwalo. Lakini nowalongela kweli, hata mndewa Sulemani, hamoja na utajili wake wose kakala kabule viwalo vinogile viigalile na maluwa gano.
12.28: Kamba Imulungu heyo yodivaza jani da kumuhulo, lelo dabahano na mayo dokwasigwa muumoto, vino hondayawavaze ng'hani mweye? Mweye wanhu mutamanila kidogo!
12.29: “Avo sikumuigaze moja choni, hebu mong'wa choni.
12.30: Kwavija vinhu avo, vivo voogaiya wanhu haweli Wayahudi. Tataenu yeli kuulanga kojuwa molonda vinhu vose avo.
12.31: Lakini uzahileni tanhu Undewa wa Imulungu, nayo kowagwaa vinhu avo. Utajili wa kuulanga (Matayo 6:19-21)
12.32: “Sikumudumbe mweye kibumbila kidodo cha wanahina zangu, kwavija Tataenu kanogelwa kuwagwaa mweye Undewa.
12.33: Chuuzeni vose vimulinavo na muwagwelele wakiwa zisente. Muitendele mikoba hailala, na muikile ngama yenu kuulanga. Ako hondaihunguke, kwavija kuduhu wabavi odaha kuhavika na kuduhu ng'hobo odaha kuibananga.
12.34: Kwavija kuko kuili ngama yako, vivija kuko kondauwe moyo wako. Wasang'hanaji welimeso
12.35: “Muitande na kuifunga mikwiji mvigudi, na taa zenu ziwe zokwaka,
12.36: kamba wasang'hanaji viwombetela mkulu wao yabwele kulawa kuna idizengele. Yahabwela na kugong'onda ulwivi, himahima omvugulila.
12.37: Wamweda wasang'hanaji waja mkulu wao yahabwela kowavika meso! Nowalongeleni ukweli, mkulu ayo kosaula koti jake, kowalongela wakale hasi hana indiya na heyo kowasang'hanila.
12.38: Wamweda wasang'hanaji waja mkulu wao kowavika wang'hali meso, hata kamba yahabwela kilo kikulu hebu nzogolo zikwika!
12.39: Lakini mujuwe vino, kamba mwene ng'anda yahajuwile saa ya kwiza mbavi, yahakalile meso, na sambi yaileke ng'anda yake ituligwe na mbavi.
12.40: Na mweye vivija molondigwa mwiitande, kwavija Mwana wa Munhu kokwiza mna isaa hamuigesile.” Msang'hanaji yotamaniligwa na hatamaniligwa (Matayo 24:45-51)
12.41: Petulo kamulongela, “Mndewa, vino lusimo luno kutulongela siye twiiyeka, hebu kuwalongela wanhu wose?”
12.42: Mndewa kamwidika, “Vino msang'hanaji gani yotamaniligwa na yeli na nzewele? Ayo ija mkulu wake komwika yalolese wasang'hanaji wayagwe, na yawagwee ndiya mna isaa inogile.
12.43: Kamweda msang'hanaji ija mkulu wake yahabwela komvika kosang'hana vivo!
12.44: Nowalongela ukweli, mkulu wake komwika msang'hanaji ayo yawe mulolesaji wa vinhu vake vose.
12.45: Lakini msang'hanaji ija yahailongela mwenyego, ‘Mkulu wangu kokawa ng'hani kubwela.’ Baho kosonga kuwatowa wasang'hanaji wayagwe, wa kitwanzi na wa kimbigalo, kuno koja na kung'wa mbaka kokoligwa.
12.46: Abaho mkulu wake kobwela mna isiku msang'hanaji ija haigesile na mna isaa haijuwile bule. Mkulu ayo komtowa ng'hani na kumwika hamoja na wanhu hawatogola.
12.47: “Msang'hanaji ija yajuwile kija kiyolonda mkulu wake yakisang'hane, lakini hakisang'hana bule msang'hanaji ayo kotowigwa ng'hani.
12.48: Lakini msang'hanaji ija hakijuwile kiyolonda mkulu wake, abaho kotenda kinhu kihile, msang'hanaji ayo kotowigwa kidogo. Munhu yagweleligwe vingi kodaigwa vingi, na munhu yagweleligwe vingi ng'hani kodaigwa vingi ng'hani. Yesu kowatenda wanhu waigole (Matayo 10:34-36)
12.49: “Niza kubwinha moto mwiisi, vinondile niye wahakile mwaka!
12.50: Nina ubatizo nolondigwa niubokele, na niye nougaiya ng'hani mbaka umale!
12.51: Vino mweye mogesa niza kugala tindiwalo mwiisi? Bule! Sizile kugala tindiwalo, lakini kuwagola wanhu.
12.52: Kulawa sambi, wanhu watano wa ng'anda imoja oigola, wadatu kwa wabili, na wabili kwa wadatu.
12.53: Tata koigola na mwanage, na mwana koigola na tatake. Mama koigola na mndele wake, na mndele koigola na mamake. Mama mkwe koigola na mkwe wake wa kitwanzi, na mkwe wa kitwanzi koigola na mama mkwe wake.” Kujuwa vipindi (Matayo 16:2-3)
12.54: Yesu kawalongela wanhu kabili, “Mwahajona wingu dolawilila mwambu wa kudihongela zuwa, baho molonga, ‘Mvula kotowa,’ na kweli kotowa.
12.55: Na mwahajona beho da kusini nyukwanyukwa molonga, ‘Hokuwa na vuke,’ na yokuwa vivo.
12.56: Mweye mwa watapitapi! Modaha kulola isi na ulanga na kulagula kamba mvula kotowa hebu hatowa, habali hamujuwile fambulo da kipindi kino? Ilumbe na munhu yakwihile (Matayo 5:25-26)
12.57: “Habali hamudaha kujuwa wenyego mbuli zinogile za kusang'hana?
12.58: Kamba munhu kokugala mkitala, vinoga uilumbe nayo mung'hali mnzila. Wahalemelwa, kokugala kwa msemi, nayo msemi kokugala mmakono ga wakalizi, nao okugodeka mkifungo.
12.59: Nokulongela, mumo humulawa ng'o, mbaka ulihe sente yose!”

13.1: Kipindi kikija wanhu wayagwe wakala aho, wamulongela Yesu mbuli ya Wagalilaya wakomigwe na Pilato kipindi viwakalile omulavila nhosa Imulungu.
13.2: Yesu kawedika, “Vino mogesa Wagalilaya awo wakala na nzambi nyingi kubanza Wagalilaya wayagwe lekaavo wadununzika vivo?
13.3: Bule! Nowalongela kweli, na mweye vivija mwahalema kuleka nzambi zenu, mose mofa kamba awo.
13.4: Hebu mogesa wanhu waja longo na wanane wafile kwa kulagaliligwa na lingo ako Siloamu wakala na nzambi nyingi kubanza wanhu wose kudibuga da Yelusalemu?
13.5: Bule! Nowalongela, mwahalema kuleka nzambi, mose mofa kamba awo.” Lusimo lwa biki hodilelaga matunda
13.6: Abaho Yesu kawalongela lusimo luno, “Munhu imoja kahanda biki da matunda mumgunda wake wa mizabibu. Kachola kuzahila matunda, lakini hapatile tunda jojose bule.
13.7: Avo kamulongela msang'hanaji wake, ‘Lola, mwaka uno wa kadatu nokwiza hano kuzahila matunda mdibiki dino, lakini sipata chochose. Udikanhe! Habali digendelele kuibananga isi?’
13.8: Lakini msang'hanaji wake kamwidika, ‘Go mkulu, dileke mwaka uno wiiyeka, nodihalilila na kudikila mbolea.
13.9: Abaho kamba dahalela vinoga, lakini dahaleka kulela, kodaha kudikanha!’ ” Yesu komuhonya mtwanzi siku ya Kubwihila
13.10: Siku dimoja da Kubwihila, Yesu kakala yofundiza mng'anda ya kumpula Imulungu.
13.11: Baho kukala na mtwanzi imoja. Mtwanzi ayo kakala na kinyamkela yamtendile yalumwe miyaka longo na nane. Kakala yaveduke mgongo na hadahile kuigolosa bule.
13.12: Yesu viyamone, kamkema, kamulongela, “Mama, kuhonyigwa utamu wako!”
13.13: Yesu kamwikila makono, bahaja lukuli lwake lugoloka, nayo kamgwaa nhogolwa Imulungu.
13.14: Lakini mkulu wa ng'anda ya kumpula Imulungu kagevuzika kwavija Yesu kamuhonya munhu mwiisiku ya Kubwihila. Avo kawalongela wanhu, “Mnazo siku sita za kusang'hana. Mzisiku azo, mwize muhonyigwe, lakini sikumwize kudisiku da Kubwihila!”
13.15: Mndewa kamwidika, “Mweye mwa watapitapi! Vino, nani kumwenu yoleka kumfungula ng'ombe wake hebu kihongwe wake kulawa mdizizi na kumulongoza yachole kung'wa mazi mwiisiku ya Kubwihila?
13.16: Mtwanzi ino kolawa mulukolo lwa Abulahamu. Nayo kakala yagogigwe na Mwenembago kwa miyaka longo na nane. Vino halondeke kulekesigwa mwiisiku ya Kubwihila?”
13.17: Mbuli azo ziyalongile Yesu ziwatenda waja wamwihile wagwe kinyala, lakini wanhu wayagwe wakala odeng'helela kwa mbuli zose za unzonza ziyasang'hane Yesu. Lusimo lwa mbeyu ndodo ya haladali (Matayo 13:31-32; Maluko 4:30-32)
13.18: Abaho Yesu kawauza, “Vino Undewa wa Imulungu uigala na choni? Vino niusimulile kwa lusimo gani?
13.19: Uigala na kija kilawilile kwa munhu yasolile mbeyu ndodo ya haladali na kuihanda mumgunda wake. Mbeyu ayo yota na kuwa biki kulu, na ndege wazenga mvulu zao mna gamatambi gake.” Lusimo lwa hamila (Matayo 13:33)
13.20: Yesu kawauza kabili, “Vino Undewa wa Imulungu uigala na choni?
13.21: Uigala na kija kilawilile kwa mtwanzi yasolile hamila na kuitibwiliza hamoja na madebe mabili ga usage, abaho usage wose ugongomoka.” Mulango msisili (Matayo 7:13-14, 21-23)
13.22: Yesu kagendelela na mwanza wake kuchola Yelusalemu, kubitila kuna gamabuga na vijiji kowapetela wanhu.
13.23: Munhu imoja kamuuza, “Go mkulu, vino onda wakomboligwe wanhu wadodo waiyeka?” Yesu kawedika,
13.24: “Gangamaleni mwingile kubitila ulwivi msisili, kwavija wanhu wengi olonda kwingila lakini honda wadahe bule.
13.25: Mwene ng'anda kokwinuka na kuhinda ulwivi. Mweye mokwima kunze na kusonga kugong'onda ulwivi molonga, ‘Mndewa, tuvugulile!’ Nayo kowedika, ‘Sikujuwile kumulawa!’
13.26: Mweye momwidika, ‘Tuja na kung'wa hamoja na gweye, na gweye kutufundiza kudibuga jetu!’
13.27: Lakini heyo kolonga kabili, ‘Sikujuwile kumulawa! Segeleni kumwangu, mweye mose mutenda nzambi!’
13.28: Baho molila na kudafuna meno mwahawona Abulahamu na Isaka na Yakobo na watula ndagu wose wa Imulungu muundewa wa Imulungu, kuno mweye wenyego mwasigwa kunze!
13.29: Wanhu okwiza kulawa mwambu wa kudilawila zuwa na mwambu wa kudihongela zuwa, kulawa mwambu wa kasikazini na mwambu wa kusini, okala hasi hana indiya muundewa wa Imulungu.
13.30: Abaho wanhu waja weli wa ikimambukizo sambi okuwa wa ichanduso, na waja weli wa ichanduso sambi okuwa wa ikimambukizo.” Yesu koinogela Yelusalemu (Matayo 23:37-39)
13.31: Kipindi kikija Mafalisayo wayagwe wamcholela Yesu, wamulongela, “Segela hanhu hano uchole hanhu hayagwe, kwavija Helode kolonda kukukoma.”
13.32: Yesu kawedika, “Gendeni mkamulongele vino ija kizongo, ‘Nolava vinyamkela na kuhonya watamu lelo na mayo, na siku da kadatu nomambukiza sang'hano yangu!’
13.33: Hata avo lelo, mayo, na kisindo nogendelela na mwanza wangu, kwavija hailondigwa mtula ndagu wa Imulungu yafile kunze ya buga da Yelusalemu.
13.34: “Gweye Yelusalemu! Gweye Yelusalemu! Kowakoma watula ndagu wa Imulungu na kuwatowa kwa mabwe waja Imulungu yawatumile kumwako! Miyanza mingapi nilonda kuwahagata wanago kwa makono gangu, kamba vija nguku viyovihagata vinziya vake mna gamabawa gake, lakini hulondile bule!
13.35: Sambi lola, Ng'anda yenu ya Imulungu ilekigwa vihame! Na niye nowalongela, hondamumbone kabili mbaka siku dija vondamulonge, ‘Imulungu yamtambikile ija yokwiza kwa twaga da Mndewa!’ ”

14.1: Mwiisiku imoja ya Kubwihila, Yesu kachola kuja ndiya mng'anda ya mkulu imoja wa Mafalisayo, wanhu wakala omulola goya Yesu.
14.2: Munhu imoja yakalile na utamu wa kuvimba lukuli keza kwa Yesu.
14.3: Yesu kawauza wafundiza Malagizo ga Musa na Mafalisayo, “Vino, vinoga kumuhonya munhu mwiisiku ya Kubwihila hebu havinogile bule?”
14.4: Lakini wao hawalongile mbuli yoyose bule. Yesu kamsola mtamu ija, kamuhonya, abaho kamuleka yachole.
14.5: Abaho kawauza, “Vino nani kumwenu yeli na mwana hebu ng'ombe, yahadumbukila mdikolombo mwiisiku ya Kubwihila, hamulava mwiisiku ayo?”
14.6: Lakini wao hawadahile kumwidika mbuli ino. Uhole na moyo unogile
14.7: Yesu kawona wanhu waja wagonekigwe viwakalile osagula vigoda va kuulongozi. Avo kawalongela wose lusimo luno,
14.8: “Munhu yahakugoneka kuna idizengele, sikuukale mvigoda va haulongozi, kwavija kodaha kwiza munhu yagonekigwe yeli munhu mkulu kubanza gweye,
14.9: na munhu yawagoneke mose wabili kokwizila na kukulongela, ‘Segela aho haukalile umulekele miyago.’ Baho kogwa kinyala mgameso ga wanhu na kobwela kukala kuvigoda va kuchugu.
14.10: Lakini wahagonekigwa kuna indiya, genda ukakale kuvigoda va kuchugu, ili munhu yakugoneke yaheza yakulongele, ‘Mbwigangu, izo ukale kuvigoda va haulongozi.’ Baho kopata nhogolwa mgameso ga wanhu wose wagonekigwe.
14.11: Kwavija waja wose oitenda wenyego wanhu wakulu otendigwa wanhu wadodo, na waja oitenda wenyego wanhu wadodo otendigwa wanhu wakulu.”
14.12: Abaho Yesu kamulongela ija yamgoneke, “Kamba kowatanda wanhu ndiya ya imisi hebu ya ichungulo, sikuuwagoneke mbwiga zako, hebu ndugu zako, hebu matajili hebu wanhu weli behi na gweye. Kwavija wahatenda vivo, na hewo nao okugoneka na avo okuliha vija viuwatendele hewo.
14.13: Lakini kamba wahatenda nyimwilinyimwili, wagoneke wakiwa,, mbetembete, waholole, na waja wasuwameso,
14.14: na gweye kotambikiligwa, kwavija awo hawadaha kukuliha. Imulungu kokuliha mwiisiku ya kuzilibuligwa kwa wanhu wanogile.” Lusimo lwa nyimwilinyimwili ng'hulu (Matayo 22:1-10)
14.15: Munhu imoja mna iwaja wakalile hana indiya viyahulike avo, kamulongela Yesu, “Wamweda waja onda waje ndiya ya nyimwilinyimwili muundewa wa Imulungu!”
14.16: Yesu kamulongela, “Munhu imoja katenda nyimwilinyimwili ng'hulu, kawagoneka wanhu wengi.
14.17: Viivikile saa ya nyimwilinyimwili, kamtuma msang'hanaji wake yakawalongele wanhu wagonekigwe weze, kwavija kila kinhu kitandigwa.
14.18: Lakini kila munhu kalava kitala chake. Munhu wa ichanduso kamulongela msang'hanaji ija, ‘Nigula mgunda, avo nolondigwa nikaulole. Chonde, ndeka nyhole.’
14.19: Iyagwe kalonga, ‘Nigula ng'ombe longo wa kulimila, avo vino na muumwanza, nochola kuwageza. Chonde, ndeka nyhole.’
14.20: Iyagwe kalonga, ‘Sambi sambi nisola mwehe, avo sidaha kwiza.’
14.21: “Msang'hanaji ija kabwela na kumulongela mbuli zose zino mkulu wake. Mkulu wake kagevuzika ng'hani, kamulongela msang'hanaji wake, ‘Lopola ugende mzinzila mhanda na mna gamabuga, uwagale hano wanhu wakiwa, waholole, wasuwameso na mbetembete.’
14.22: Bahaja msang'hanaji ija kamulongela, ‘Go mkulu, gago gose gasang'hanigwa, lakini kuna gati disigala.’
14.23: Avo mkulu ija kamulongela msang'hanaji wake, ‘Lawa kunze uchole mzinzila na mna gamakulugumbi ukawalongele wanhu weze, ili ng'anda yangu imeme.
14.24: Nowalongela kweli, kuduhu hata munhu imoja mna iwaja wagonekigwe walemile kwiza yonda yalanze ndiya yangu!’ ” Kudununzika sama ya kuwa mwanahina (Matayo 10:37-38)
14.25: Baho lunhu lwa wanhu vilukalile lomkweleleza, Yesu kahinduka, kawalongela,
14.26: “Munhu yoyose yokwiza kumwangu na kuno kowanogela ng'hani tatake na mamake na mwehe wake na wanage na lumbu zake na ndugu zake na vivija kamba kounogela ng'hani ugima wake mwenyego kubanza kumnogela Kilisito, hadaha kuwa mwanahina wangu.
14.27: Na munhu yoyose haupapa msalaba wake na kunikweleleza, hadaha kuwa mwanahina wangu.
14.28: “Vino nani kumwenu yahalonda kuzenga lingo, tanhu hakala hasi na kugelegeza sente za kudizengela, ili yajuwe kamba kana sente za kumambukiza sang'hano yake?
14.29: Buleavo, yahamambukiza kuzenga chandusilo, kolemelwa kumambukiza kuzenga dilingo, na wose wachone acho kilawilile omseka,
14.30: olonga, ‘Munhu ino kasonga kuzenga, lakini kalemelwa kumambukiza sang'hano yake!’
14.31: “Hebu mndewa gani yahaitanda kuchola kuitowa na mndewa iyagwe, tanhu hakala hasi na kugelegeza kamba heyo na wakalizi zake elufu kumi kodaha kuitowa na mndewa miyage yeli na wakalizi elufu ishilini?
14.32: Kamba yahona hadaha, kowatuma wasenga zake wakaiting'hane na mndewa iyagwe, wampule wailumbe yang'hali kutali.”
14.33: Yesu kamambukiza kulonga, “Vivo ili kumwenu, kuduhu munhu yodaha kuwa mwanahina wangu mbaka yaleke kila kinhu kiyali nacho. Mkele ubanangike (Matayo 5:13; Maluko 9:50)
14.34: “Mkele unoga, lakini wahagiza ukali wake, kuduhu nzila ya kuubweza kabili.
14.35: Haufaya kwa isi hebu mna imbolea, lakini okwasigwa. Yeli na magwiti yahulike!”

15.1: Siku dimoja wabokela kodi wengi na wanhu wayagwe otenda nzambi wachola kumtegeleza Yesu.
15.2: Mafalisayo na wafundiza Malagizo ga Musa wasonga kunung'unika, “Munhu ino kowabokela wanhu otenda nzambi na kuja nao!”
15.4: “Vino kamba imoja wenu kana ng'hondolo gana, abaho ng'hondolo imoja kapotela, vino kotenda choni? Kowaleka waja malongo tisa na tisa kuluwala, na kuchola kumzahila ija yapotele mbaka yampate.
15.5: Yahampata, kodeng'helela na kumwika mmaega gake,
15.6: na kumgala ukae. Abaho kowakema hamoja mbwiga zake na wanhu weli behi nayo na kowalongela, ‘Miyenu nodeng'helela kwavija nimpata ng'hondolo wangu yapotele. Avo tudeng'helele hamoja!’
15.7: Nowalongela, avo vonda iwe, hokuwa na ndeng'helelo ng'hulu kuulanga mbuli ya munhu imoja mwene nzambi yahaleka nzambi zake, kubanza waja malongo tisa na tisa ogesa wanoga na hawalonda kuzileka nzambi zao.” Lusimo lwa sente ipotele
15.8: “Hebu mtwanzi yeli na sente longo yahagiza imoja, kotendaze? Kobwinha taa, kofagila ng'anda yake, na kulola goya kila hanhu mbaka yaipate.
15.9: Yahaipata, kowakema hamoja mbwiga zake na wanhu weli behi yake, kowalongela, ‘Nodeng'helela ng'hani kwavija niipata sente yangu ipotele. Avo tudeng'helele hamoja!’
15.10: Vivija nowalongela, wasenga wa Imulungu odeng'helela mbuli ya munhu imoja mwene nzambi yahaleka nzambi zake.” Lusimo lwa mwana yapotele
15.11: Yesu kagendelela kulonga, “Kukala na munhu imoja yakalile na wana wabili.
15.12: Ija imdodo kamulongela tatake, ‘Tata, nigwelele uhazi wangu sambi.’ Avo munhu ija kawagolela uhazi wao wanage awo wabili.
15.13: Hazibitile siku nyingi, ija imdodo kachuuza uhazi wake. Abaho kafunga mwanza na sente ziyapatile, kachola isi ya kutali, ako kazinanga sente zose ziyapatile.
15.14: Kamambukiza kila kinhu kiyakalile nacho. Abaho lufilili lwa nzala lulawilila mwiisi ija, nayo kakala kabule kinhu chochose kisigale.
15.15: Avo kachola kusang'hana kibaluwa kwa munhu imoja wa isi ija, munhu ayo kamtuma mumgunda wake yasusile nguluwe.
15.16: Kakala kosulukila kuja maganda gawadile nguluwe, lakini kuduhu munhu yamgwelele kinhu chochose chakuja.
15.17: Abaho kagelegeza na kulonga, ‘Tatangu kana wasang'hanaji wengi, oja mbaka osigaza na niye hano nofa na nzala!
15.18: Nosegela na kuchola kwa tatangu na kumulongela, Tata, nimtenda Imulungu nzambi, na vivija nikutendela gweye nzambi.
15.19: Sifaya kukemigwa mwanago. Nhende kamba imoja wa wasang'hanaji zako.’
15.20: Avo kafunga mwanza wa kubwela kwa tatake. “Viyakalile yang'hali kutali, tatake kamona. Kamonela bazi mwanage, avo kamkimbilila, kamuhagatila na kamnonela.
15.21: Mwanage kamulongela, ‘Tata, nimtenda Imulungu nzambi, na vivija nikutendela gweye. Sifaya kukemigwa mwanago.’
15.22: Lakini tatake kawakema wasang'hanaji zake. Kawalongela, ‘Lopoleni! Galeni kiwalo kinogile mumvaze. Mvazeni pete mkidole chake na vilatu mmagulu gake.
15.23: Abaho choleni mdigale bofu da ng'ombe dinonile mudichinje, wose tuje na kudeng'helela!
15.24: Kwavija mwanangu ino kakala yafile lakini sambi mgima. Kakala yapotele lakini sambi koneka.’ Avo wasonga kudeng'helela.
15.25: “Kipindi acho mwanage imkulu kakala kumgunda. Viyakalile behi na ing'anda, kahulika nyila na wanhu ocheza.
15.26: Avo kamkema msang'hanaji imoja, kamuuza, ‘Ako kuna choni?’
15.27: Msang'hanaji ayo kamwidika, ‘Mdodo wako kabwela ukae, na tatako kamchinjila bofu da ng'ombe dinonile, kwavija kabwela mgima!’
15.28: “Ija imwana mkulu kagevuzika ng'hani, avo kalema kwingila mng'anda. Tatake kalawa kunze na kumpula yengile mng'anda.
15.29: Lakini kamwidika tatake, ‘Lola, miyaka yose ino niye nokusang'hanila kamba msang'hanaji, na silemile lagizo jako jojose. Kungwaa choni? Hunigwelele hata mbuzi nideng'helele na mbwiga zangu!
15.30: Lakini mwanago ino kananga vinhu vako mbuli ya ugoni, na viyabwelile ukae kumchinjila bofu da ng'ombe dinonile!’
15.31: Tatake kamwidika, ‘Mwanangu, kipindi chose kukala na niye, na vinhu vose vinilinavo vako.
15.32: Lakini tolondigwa tudeng'helele na kusekelela, kwavija mdodo wako kakala yafile lakini sambi mgima, kakala yapotele lakini sambi koneka!’ ”

16.1: Yesu kawalongela wanahina zake, “Kukala na tajili imoja yakalile na mulolesaji wa vinhu vake. Tajili ayo kalongeligwa kamba mulolesaji ayo konanga sente zake.
16.2: Avo kamkema mng'anda, kamuuza, ‘Mbuli gani zimhulika kumwako? Mhetela vinhu vose viubokele na vija viulavile, kwavija hudaha kuwa mulolesaji wa vinhu vangu kabili.’
16.3: Mulolesaji ija kailongela, ‘Mkulu wangu konilekesa sang'hano. Notenda choni? Kulima sidahile bule, na kupula nokona kinyala.
16.4: Sambi nojuwa choni chonda nhende ili nahalavigwa mna isang'hano, niwe na mbwiga wa kunibokela mzikae zao!’
16.5: “Avo kawakema wanhu wose wakalile odaigwa na mkulu wake. Kamuuza wa ichanduso, ‘Kodaigwa choni na mkulu wangu?’
16.6: Nayo kamwidika, ‘Madebe gana gamavuta.’ Mulolesaji ija kamulongela, ‘Sola cheti chako, kala hasi, lopola wandike malongo matano.’
16.7: Abaho kamuuza iyagwe, ‘Na gweye kodaigwa choni?’ Nayo kamwidika, ‘Viloba gana va ngano.’ Mulolesaji ija kamulongela, ‘Sola cheti chako, wandike malongo nane.’
16.8: “Mkulu wa ija mulolesaji mbala kamtogola kwavija katenda vinhu kwa ubala. Kwavija wanhu wa mwiisi ino wabala ng'hani mna zimbuli zao kubanza wanhu wa kumulenge.”
16.9: Yesu kagendelela kulonga, “Avo nowalongeleni, itendeleni umbwiga kubitila vinhu va mwiisi, ili vahamala mudahe kubokeligwa kuna ikae ya ugima wa milele.
16.10: Munhu yoyose yotamaniligwa mna ivinhu vidodo, kotamaniligwa mna ivinhu vikulu. Na munhu yoyose hatamaniligwa mna ivinhu vidodo, vivija hatamaniligwa mna ivinhu vikulu.
16.11: Avo kamba mweye hamutamaniligwa kulolesa mali za mwiisi, modahaze kutamaniligwa kulolesa mali za kuulanga?
16.12: Na kamba hutamaniligwa kulolesa vinhu va munhu iyagwe, nani yonda yakugwee vinhu vako mwenyego?
16.13: “Kuduhu msang'hanaji yodaha kuwasang'hanila wakulu wabili. Kwavija komwihila imoja na kumnogela iyagwe, hebu koilumba na imoja na kumbeza iyagwe. Hamudaha kumsang'hanila Imulungu hamoja na mali.” Ulonzi uyagwe wa Yesu (Matayo 11:12-13; 5:31-32; Maluko 10:11-12)
16.14: Mafalisayo viwazihulike mbuli zino zose, wamzeha Yesu, kwavija wakala onogelwa na sente.
16.15: Yesu kawalongela, “Mweye awo wanhu muitenda munoga mgameso ga wanhu, lakini Imulungu kaijuwa mizoyo yenu. Kwavija vinhu vikoneka vinoga ng'hani kwa wanhu, mgameso ga Imulungu vokoneka viha.
16.16: “Malagizo ga Musa na maandiko ga watula ndagu wa Imulungu vikala vipetigwa mbaka kipindi cha Yohana Mbatizaji. Kusongela aho, Mbuli Inogile ya Undewa wa Imulungu yopetigwa, na kila munhu kowamba kokwingila.
16.17: Lakini vibuha ng'hani kwa ulanga na isi kupotela, kubanza kinhu kidodo ng'hani kupotela mna Gamalagizo.
16.18: “Mbigalo yoyose yomwasa mwehe wake na kusola mtwanzi iyagwe, kotenda ugoni. Na mbigalo yomsola mtwanzi ija yasigwe, nayo kotenda ugoni vivija. Munhu tajili na Lazalo
16.19: “Kukala na tajili imoja yavalile viwalo va sente nyingi ng'hani na kuja goya kila siku.
16.20: Vivija kukala na munhu imoja mkiwa yakemigwe Lazalo, kamema vilonda lukuli lose, kakala yokwikigwa muulwivi lwa tajili ija.
16.21: Lazalo kakala yosulukila kuja vilagale muimeza ya tajili ayo. Na umbwa wakala okwiza na kumulambita mvilonda vake.
16.22: “Abaho mkiwa ija kafa na kasoligwa na wasenga wa kuulanga mbaka behi ya Abulahamu. Tajili ayo nayo kafa na kazikigwa.
16.23: Ako kowochola wanhu wafile, kakala kodununzika ng'hani. Kenula meso gake, kamona Abulahamu kwa kutali na Lazalo kakala behi yake.
16.24: Avo kamkema kwa sauti ng'hulu, ‘Tata Abulahamu! Nyonele bazi! Mtume Lazalo yazabike kidole chake mgamazi, yaluhoze lulimi lwangu, kwavija nogaya ng'hani muumoto uno!’
16.25: “Lakini Abulahamu kamulongela, ‘Mwanangu, kumbuka muugima wako kubokela vinhu vinogile, nayo Lazalo kabokela vihile. Lakini sambi Lazalo kobwihila, na gweye kodununzika.
16.26: Hata avo, hagati yetu siye na mweye hekigwa kolombo kulu, ili munhu yolonda kuloka kulawa kuno kwiza kumwenu sikuyadahe, hebu munhu yoyose kulawa kumwenu sikuyaloke kwiza kumwetu!’
16.27: Tajili ija kalonga, ‘Nokupula gweye, tata Abulahamu, umtume Lazalo kuna ikae ya tatangu,
16.28: ako kuna ndugu zangu watano. Muleke yachole yakawazume ili sikuweze hanhu hano ha kudununzika!’
16.29: “Abulahamu kalonga, ‘Ndugu zako wanago maandiko ga Musa na ga watula ndagu wa Imulungu ga kuwazuma. Wawategeleze wao kiwolonga!’
16.30: Tajili ija kamwidika, ‘Bule tata Abulahamu! Lakini kamba munhu yahazilibuka kulawa kwa wafile na kuwacholela, baho ozileka nzambi zao!’
16.31: Lakini Abulahamu kamulongela, ‘Kamba hawagagoga maandiko ga Musa na watula ndagu wa Imulungu, honda wategeleze hata kamba munhu yahazilibuka kulawa kwa wafile!’ ”

17.1: Yesu kawalongela wanahina zake, “Vinhu vonda viwatende wanhu watende nzambi volawilila, lakini kogaya munhu ija yovitenda vilawilile!
17.2: Yokuwa vinoga kwa munhu ayo yagodekigwe dibwe kulu da kudugila msingo na yasigwe mbahali, kubanza kumuhonza imoja wa wadodo wano yatende nzambi.
17.3: Avo iteganyeni! “Ndugu yako yahakutendela nzambi, umzume. Yahatogola, gela kumgongo.
17.4: Yahakutendela nzambi miyanza saba kwa siku dimoja, na kila yaheza kumwako kolonga, ‘Ng'hosa,’ kolondigwa ugele kumgongo.” Tamanilo
17.6: Mndewa kawedika, “Maza tamanilo jenu dahakuwile kulu kamba mbeyu ndodo ya haladali, mwahadahile kudilongela biki dino da mkuyu, ‘Ng'oka ukaihande mbahali!’ najo dahawatogolele. Sang'hano ya msang'hanaji
17.7: “Vino nani kumwenu yeli na msang'hanaji yomulimila hebu kosusila ng'hondolo, yahabwela kumgunda, komulongela yalopole kuja ndiya yake?
17.8: Bule. Lakini komulongela, ‘Uitande, nitandile ndiya yangu, unisang'hanile mbaka ng'homeleze kuja na kung'wa, abaho na gweye koja na kung'wa.’
17.9: Vino komgwaa nhogolwa msang'hanaji ayo kwavija kasang'hana gaja galagilizigwe?
17.10: Vivo ili kumwenu mweye, mwahatenda vose vimulagilizigwe, longeni, ‘Siye twa wasang'hanaji wadodo, tusang'hana kija kitulondigwe kusang'hana!’ ” Yesu kowahonya wanhu longo
17.11: Yesu viyakalile mnzila kochola Yelusalemu, kabitila mzimbaka za vijiji va Samalia na Galilaya.
17.12: Viyakalile kokwingila mna ikijiji kimoja, mumo kukala na wanhu longo wakalile na utamu wa dikulu, wemile kutali.
17.14: Yesu kawona, kawalongela, “Gendeni mkailaguse kwa walava nhosa.” Viwakalile mnzila ochola, wahona.
17.15: Imoja wao viyone kahona, kabweleganya kwa Yesu kuno komgwaa nhogolwa Imulungu kwa sauti ng'hulu.
17.16: Kamgwila Yesu mmagulu kingubanguba, kamtogola. Munhu ayo kakala Msamalia.
17.17: Yesu kalonga, “Vino hawakalile wanhu longo wahonyigwe? Wayagwe tisa wa kwahi?
17.18: Vino kuduhu iyagwe yabwelile kumgwaa nhogolwa Imulungu, ila munhu ino hali muyahudi?”
17.19: Abaho Yesu kamulongela munhu ija, “Ima na uchole. Kutamanila kwako kukuhonya.” Kwiza kwa Undewa wa Imulungu (Matayo 24:23-28, 37-41)
17.20: Mafalisayo wayagwe wamuuza Yesu Undewa wa Imulungu vonda wize. Yesu kawedika, “Undewa wa Imulungu hawiza kwa kukoneka kwa meso.
17.21: Kuduhu munhu yonda yalonge, ‘Lola, uno hano!’ hebu ‘Uja haja!’ Kwavija Undewa wa Imulungu wa mgati mmwenu.”
17.22: Abaho kawalongela wanahina zake, “Kipindi chokwiza vonda mulonde kuyona siku imoja mwiizisiku za Mwana wa Munhu, lakini hondamuyone bule.
17.23: Baho wanhu owalongela, ‘Loleni kakuja!’ hebu ‘Loleni, kahano!’ Sikumuwakweleleze.
17.24: Kwavija kamba vija lumwesa vilulawilila kuulanga na kumwemwesa kulawa mwambu umoja mbaka mwambu uyagwe, vivo vonda yawe Mwana wa Munhu mwiisiku yake.
17.25: Lakini tanhu kolondigwa yadununzike ng'hani na kulemigwa na wanhu wa lukolo luno.
17.26: Kamba viikalile mna ikipindi cha Nuhu, vivo vonda iwe mzisiku za Mwana wa Munhu.
17.27: Kila munhu kakala koja na kung'wa, kusola na kusoligwa mbaka siku ija Nuhu viyengile mdisafina. Mvula ng'hulu itowa na kuwakoma wanhu wose.
17.28: Vivija kamba viilawilile mna ikipindi cha Lutu. Wanhu wagendelela kuja na kung'wa, kugula na kuchuuza, kuhanda na kusenga.
17.29: Lakini siku ija Lutu viyasegele Sodoma, moto na mabwe gokwaka vilagala hasi na kuwakoma wose.
17.30: Vivo vonda iwe mwiisiku Mwana wa Munhu vonda yagubuligwe.
17.31: “Mwiisiku ayo, munhu yeli mkiswili cha ng'anda yake sikuyahumuluke mng'anda kusola vinhu vake, vivija munhu yeli kumgunda sikuyabwele ukae.
17.33: Munhu yoyose yolonda kuukombola ugima wake mwenyego, kowagiza, na yoyose yowagiza ugima wake, koukombola.
17.34: Nowalongela, kilo acho wanhu wabili wawasile mulusazi lumoja, imoja kosoligwa na iyagwe kolekigwa.
17.35: Watwanzi wabili oduga sembe hamoja, imoja kosoligwa na iyagwe kolekigwa.
17.36: Wanhu wabili okuwa kumgunda, imoja kosoligwa na iyagwe kolekigwa.”
17.37: Wanahina zake wamuuza, “Vino, kwahi Mndewa?” Yesu kawedika, “Kokose kuli na mzoga, baho honda waiting'hane mhungu.”

18.1: Abaho Yesu kawafundiza wanahina zake kwa lusimo kamba siku zose olondigwa kumpula Imulungu na sikuwadonhe.
18.2: Kalonga, “Kudibuga dimoja kukala na msemi yakalile hamdumba Imulungu hebu kuwatonga wanhu.
18.3: Vivija kudibuga dijo, kukala na mgane imoja yakalile komgendela msemi ayo baho kwa baho, kampula, ‘Ngwelele haki yangu kulawa kwa munhu yanitendele gehile.’
18.4: Siku nyingi msemi ayo hamtegeleze mgane ayo, lakini kumwande kailongela, ‘Hata kamba simdumba Imulungu hebu kuwatonga wanhu,
18.5: lakini kwavija mgane ino konigaza, nomgwaa haki yake, kwavija nahaleka, kogendelela kwiza hano na kunigaza!’ ”
18.6: Abaho Mndewa kagendelela kulonga, “Tegelezeni kiyalongile msemi ija yehile.
18.7: Vino, Imulungu honda yawagwee haki wanhu zake yawasagule, omulilila imisi na ikilo? Vino kokawa kuwategeleza?
18.8: Nowalongela, kowagwaa haki yao himahima. Lakini Mwana wa Munhu vonda yeze, vino kodivika tamanilo mwiisi?” Lusimo lwa Mfalisayo na mbokela kodi
18.9: Abaho Yesu kawalongela lusimo luno wanhu waja wakalile oitapa wanoga na kuwabeza wayagwe.
18.10: “Kukala na wanhu wabili wacholile kumpula Imulungu kuna Ing'anda ya Imulungu. Imoja kakala Mfalisayo na iyagwe kakala mbokela kodi.
18.11: “Mfalisayo ayo kainega kumgwazo na kumpula Imulungu, ‘Go Imulungu, nokugwaa nhogolwa kwavija niye sili kamba wanhu wayagwe, wabokaji, otenda gehile, hebu wagoni. Wala sili kamba ino mbokela kodi.
18.12: Niye nofunga kuja miyanza mibili mzisiku saba, na nolava fungu da longo da vinhu vangu vose vinipata!’
18.13: “Lakini ija mbokela kodi kema kutali, hadahile hata kwinula meso gake kuulanga, lakini kaitowa mhambaga yake kwa usungu, kalonga, ‘Go Imulungu, nyonele bazi, niye na mwene nzambi!’
18.14: Nowalongela, mbokela kodi ija kachola ukae kumwake kuno katendigwa kanoga mgameso ga Imulungu kubanza ija Mfalisayo. Kwavija wose oitenda wanhu wakulu ohumulusigwa, na waja oihumulusa otendigwa wanhu wakulu.” Yesu kowatambikila wana wadodo (Matayo 19:13-15; Maluko 10:13-16)
18.15: Wanhu wayagwe wamgalila Yesu wana wadodo yawekile makono. Wanahina viwone avo, wawakomhokela.
18.16: Lakini Yesu kawakema iwana, kalonga, “Walekeni wana wadodo weze kumwangu, sikumuwagomese, kwavija Undewa wa Imulungu wa wanhu kamba wano.
18.17: Nowalongeleni ukweli! Munhu yoyose yolema kuubokela Undewa wa Imulungu kamba mwana mdodo, honda yengile ng'o!” Munhu tajili (Matayo 19:16-30; Maluko 10:17-31)
18.18: Mkulu imoja kamuuza Yesu, “Mfundiza Unogile, nhende choni niupate ugima wa milele?”
18.19: Yesu kamuuza, “Habali kong'hema, ‘unogile’? Kuduhu yanogile, ila Imulungu yaiyeka.
18.20: Kugajuwa Malagizo, ‘Sikuutende ugoni, sikuukome, sikuwibe, sikuulonge uvizi, wategeleze tatako na mamako.’ ”
18.21: Munhu ija kedika, “Gago gose nigagoga toka haudodo.”
18.22: Yesu viyahulike avo, kamulongela, “Kuhungukiligwa na kinhu kimoja. Chuuza vose viulinavo, uwagwee sente wanhu wakiwa, na gweye kokuwa na ngama yako kuulanga. Abaho wize unikweleleze.”
18.23: Lakini munhu ayo viyahulike avo, kanyunyuwala kwavija kakala tajili ng'hani.
18.24: Yesu viyamone kanyunyuwala, kalonga, “Vino avo vonda iwe vidala kwa wanhu matajili kwingila Muundewa wa Imulungu!
18.25: Kwavija vibuha kwa ngamiya kubita mna ikizonzo cha sanzia, kubanza tajili kwingila muundewa wa Imulungu.”
18.26: Wanhu wamuhulike, wamuuza, “Avo lelo nani yonda yadahe kukomboligwa?”
18.27: Yesu kawedika, “Vinhu havidahika kwa wanhu, kwa Imulungu vodahika.”
18.28: Abaho Petulo kalonga, “Lola! Siye tuvileka vinhu vetu vose, tukukweleleza gweye.”
18.29: Yesu kawalongela, “Nowalongela kweli, munhu yoyose yoleka kae yake hebu mwehe wake hebu ndugu zake hebu tatake na mamake hebu wanage mbuli ya Undewa wa Imulungu,
18.30: kobokela vinhu vingi ng'hani mna ikipindi kino na kobokela ugima wa milele mna ikipindi chonda kize.” Yesu kolonga lwa kadatu mbuli ya ifa yake (Matayo 20:17-19; Maluko 10:32-34)
18.31: Yesu kawagala hamgwazo wanahina zake longo na wabili, kawalongela, “Tegelezeni! Tochola Yelusalemu. Kuko kila kinhu chandikigwe na watula ndagu wa Imulungu mbuli ya Mwana wa Munhu cholawilila.
18.32: Kwavija kogeligwa mmakono ga wanhu haweli Wayahudi, nao omzeha, omuliga, na omtemela mate.
18.33: Omtowa mbalati na kumkoma, lakini siku da kadatu kozilibuka.”
18.34: Lakini wanahina hawazijuwile bule mbuli azo, kwavija wakala wafisigwe na hawakijuwile kija kiyakalile yokilonga Yesu. Yesu komuhonya msuwameso (Matayo 20:29-34; Maluko 10:46-52)
18.35: Yesu viyakalile behi na kuvika Yeliko, munhu imoja yakalile msuwameso kakala hamgwazo mnzila, kopula.
18.36: Munhu ayo viyahulike lunhu lwa wanhu lobita, kauza, “Kuna choni?”
18.38: Nayo kakemelela, “Yesu! Mwana wa Daudi! Nyonele bazi!”
18.39: Wanhu walongole wamkomhokela, wamulongela yanyamale. Lakini heyo kagendelela kukemelela ng'hani, “Mwana wa Daudi! Nyonele bazi!”
18.40: Avo Yesu kema, kalagiza munhu ija yagaligwe kumwake. Viyavikile behi, Yesu kamuuza,
18.41: “Kolonda nikutendele choni?” Nayo kamwidika, “Go mkulu, nolonda kulola.”
18.43: Bahaja munhu ija kadaha kulola, kamkweleleza Yesu kuno komgwaa nhogolwa Imulungu. Wanhu wose viwone avo, wamgwaa nhogolwa Imulungu.

19.1: Yesu kachola kudibuga da Yeliko, na kakala yobita mzinzila za buga dijo.
19.2: Kuko kukala na mkulu imoja wa wabokela kodi yakemigwe Zakayo, nayo kakala tajili.
19.3: Kakala kolonda kumona Yesu, lakini hadahile mbuli ya lunhu lwa wanhu na kwavija kakala mguhi.
19.4: Avo kakimbila haulongozi wa lunhu luja, kakwela mdibiki da mkuyu ili yamone Yesu, yakalile yochola kubitila nzila ija.
19.5: Yesu viyavikile hanhu aho, kalola uchanha, kamulongela, “Zakayo, himahima humuluka hasi, kwavija lelo nolondigwa kukala mng'anda yako.”
19.6: Zakayo kahumuluka himahima, kamgoneka Yesu kwa kudeng'helela.
19.7: Wanhu wose wagone ago, wasonga kunung'unika, walonga, “Munhu ino kachola kukala mng'anda ya munhu mwene nzambi!”
19.8: Zakayo kema, kamulongela Yesu, “Go Mkulu, tegeleza! Nowagwaa wakiwa nusu ya vinhu vangu, na kamba nimboka munhu yoyose kinhu, nombwezela miyanza mine.”
19.9: Yesu kamulongela, “Lelo ukombola uvika kwa wanhu wa lubuga luno, kwavija munhu ino na heyo kolawa mulukolo lwa Abulahamu.
19.10: Kwavija Mwana wa Munhu keza kuwazahila na kuwakombola waja wapotele.” Lusimo lwa wasang'hanaji longo (Matayo 25:14-30)
19.11: Wanhu viwakalile otegeleza gago, Yesu kagendelela kuwalongela lusimo. Baho kakala mmabehi na Yelusalemu, nao wagesa kamba Undewa wa Imulungu wammabehi kulawilila.
19.12: Avo kawalongela, “Kukala na munhu imoja wa lukolo lwa kindewa yafungile mwanza kuchola isi ya kutali yakatendigwe mndewa, abaho yabwele ukae kumwake.
19.13: Avo yang'hali hanasegela, kawakema wasang'hanaji zake longo, kila imoja kamgwaa sente sawa, abaho kawalongela, ‘Tendeni biyashala mbaka vondambwele.’
19.14: Lakini wanhu wa isi yake wakala wamwihile. Avo wawatuma wasenga wagende kwa wanhu waja wakalonge, ‘Hatumulonda munhu ino yawe mndewa wetu.’
19.15: “Munhu ija kaupata undewa, kabwela ukae kumwake. Baho kawalagiza wasang'hanaji zake yawagwelele sente wachole kumwake yapate kujuwa kija kiwapatile.
19.16: Msang'hanaji wa ichanduso keza, kalonga, ‘Go mkulu, sente zako ziunigwelele zilela miyanza longo.’
19.17: Kamulongela, ‘Kutenda goya msang'hanaji unogile! Kwavija kutenda vinogile kulolesa mna ivinhu vidodo, nokutenda uwe munhu mkulu wa mabuga longo.’
19.18: Msang'hanaji wa kabili keza, kalonga, ‘Go mkulu, sente zako ziunigwelele zilela miyanza mitano.’
19.19: Nayo kamulongela, ‘Kokuwa munhu mkulu wa mabuga matano.’
19.20: “Msang'hanaji iyagwe keza, kalonga, ‘Go mkulu, sola sente zako. Nikala nizifungile goya mkikumbi.
19.21: Nikudumba, kwavija kuna gahigahi. Kosola vinhu va wayago kwa uvizi na kosenga vija huvihandile.’
19.22: Mkulu ija kamulongela, ‘Gweye kwa msang'hanaji yehile! Nokutagusa kwa mbuli zako mwenyego! Kunijuwa nina gahigahi, nisolaga vinhu va wayangu na kusenga vija sivihandile.
19.23: Habali huzikile sente zangu kwa wanhu okwika sente ili vimbwelile nyambulile zongezeke?’
19.24: “Abaho kawalongela waja wemile aho, ‘Mbokeni ayo zisente, mumgwelele msang'hanaji ija yapatile sente miyanza longo ya zija ziyagweleligwe.’
19.25: Lakini wao wamulongela, ‘Go mkulu, lakini heyo kanazo sente miyanza longo!’
19.26: Nayo kawedika, ‘Munhu yeli na kinhu kokongezelwa, lakini ija yeliduhu kinhu, kobokigwa hata kija kidodo kiyelinacho.
19.27: Na sambi, waja wanihile, ondema niye niwe mndewa wao, wagaleni hano, muwakome bahano mgameso gangu!’ ” Yesu kokwingila Yelusalemu kwa deng'ho (Matayo 21:1-11; Maluko 11:1-11; Yohana 12:12-19)
19.28: Yesu viyamambukize kulonga avo, kawalongolela kuchola Yelusalemu.
19.29: Viyakalile behi na kuvika Betifage na Betania, habehi na Lugongo lwa Mizeituni, kawatuma wanahina zake wabili,
19.30: kawalongela, “Gendeni kuna ikijiji kili kuulongozi wenu. Mwahengila, momvika mwana wa kihongwe kafungigwa, nayo yang'hali hanakweligwa na munhu. Mfunguleni mumgale hano.
19.31: Munhu yoyose yahawauza habali momfungula, mulongeleni, ‘Mndewa komulonda.’ ”
19.32: Wanahina waja wachola, wamvika kamba vija Yesu viyawalongele.
19.33: Viwakalile omfungula imwana wa kihongwe, wenyego wawauza, “Habali momfungula?”
19.35: Wamgala imwana wa kihongwe kwa Yesu. Abaho watandika viwalo vao mumgongo wa imwana wa kihongwe, na wamtaza Yesu kukwela.
19.36: Yesu viyakalile kochola, wanhu wanzanza viwalo vao mnzila.
19.37: Viyakalile behi na kuvika Yelusalemu, hanhu hali na mtelemuko wa Lugongo lwa Mizeituni, lunhu mkulu lwa wanahina zake lusonga kudeng'helela na kumgwaa nhogolwa Imulungu kwa sauti ng'hulu mbuli ya unzonza wauwonile.
19.38: Walonga, “Imulungu yamtambikile Mndewa yokwiza kwa twaga da Imulungu, tindiwalo kuulanga na ukulu kwa Imulungu!”
19.39: Baho Mafalisayo wayagwe wakalile muulunhu wamulongela Yesu, “Mfundiza, walagize wanahina zako wanyamale!”
19.40: Yesu kawedika, “Nowalongeleni, wahanyamala wano, mabwe goguta.” Yesu kowalilila wanhu wa buga da Yelusalemu
19.41: Yesu viyavikile behi na buga da Yelusalemu na viyawone wanhu wa buga dijo, kawalilila,
19.42: kalonga, “Maza lelo mwahajuwile mbuli zilondigwa kugala tindiwalo! Lakini sambi zifisigwa mgameso genu!
19.43: Kwavija kipindi chokwiza, wanhu wakwihile vonda wakuzengele senyenge, okuzunguluka na kukusung'ha sung'ha kila mwambu.
19.44: Okuhondahonda gweye na wanhu zako weli muuluwa wako. Kuduhu hata dibwe dimoja donda disigazigwe uchanha ya diyagwe, kwavija hukijuwile kipindi kiyezile Imulungu kukukombola!” Yesu kokwingila Mng'anda ya Imulungu (Matayo 21:12-17; Maluko 11:15-19; Yohana 2:13-22)
19.45: Abaho Yesu kengila Mng'anda ya Imulungu, kasonga kuwawinga wanhu wakalile ochuuza vinhu,
19.46: kawalongela, “Yandikigwa mna Gamaandiko Gang'alile, Imulungu kalonga, ‘Ng'anda yangu yokuwa ng'anda ya kupulila.’ Lakini mweye muitenda mhango ya wabavi!”
19.47: Kila siku Yesu kakala kofundiza Mng'anda ya Imulungu. Wakulu wa walava nhosa, wafundiza Malagizo ga Musa, na vilongozi wa wanhu walonda kumkoma,
19.48: lakini hawadahile bule kutenda avo, kwavija wanhu wose wakala omtegeleza goya, hawalondile kuswela mbuli.

20.1: Siku dimoja Yesu kakala Mng'anda ya Imulungu kowafundiza wanhu na kuwapetela Mbuli Inogile. Wakulu wa walava nhosa na wafundiza Malagizo ga Musa hamoja na wavele weza,
20.2: wamulongela, “Tulongele, vino kotenda mbuli zino kwa udahi wa nani? Nani yakugwelele udahi uno?”
20.3: Yesu kawedika, “Beteni na niye niwauze mbuli imoja. Nongeleni,
20.4: vino udahi wa Yohana wa kubatiza ulawa kuulanga hebu kwa wanhu?”
20.5: Wagesa, “Tulonge choni? Twahalonga, ‘Ulawa kuulanga,’ kotuuza, ‘Habali, hamumtogole Yohana?’
20.6: Na twahalonga, ‘Ulawa kwa wanhu,’ lunhu lose luno lotutowa mabwe, kwavija wose otogola kamba Yohana kakala mtula ndagu wa Imulungu.”
20.8: Yesu kawalongela, “Na niye siwalongela bule notenda mbuli zino kwa udahi wa nani.” Lusimo lwa walimaji mumgunda wa mizabibu (Matayo 21:33-46; Maluko 12:1-12)
20.9: Abaho Yesu kawalongela wanhu lusimo luno, “Kukala na munhu imoja yahandile mizabibu mumgunda wake. Kawakodisha walimaji, abaho kachola mwiisi iyagwe na kakala siku nyingi.
20.10: Msimu wa kubawa zabibu viuvikile, munhu ija kamtuma msang'hanaji wake yachole kwa walimaji wamgwelele zabibu. Lakini walimaji waja wamtowa msang'hanaji ija, wamuwinga makono gaiyeka.
20.11: Avo kamtuma msang'hanaji iyagwe, lakini walimaji wamtowa vivija na kumuliga, wamuwinga makono gaiyeka.
20.12: Abaho kamtuma msang'hanaji wa kadatu. Ino nayo walimaji wamulumiza, wamwasa kunze.
20.13: Abaho mwene mgunda ija kalonga, ‘Nhende choni? Nomtuma mwanangu nimnogele. Lamda ino omtegeleza!’
20.14: Lakini walimaji viwamone, wailongela, ‘Ino ayo muhazi wake. Tumkome na uhazi wake okuwa wetu.’
20.15: Avo wamulava kunze ya mgunda uja, wamkoma.” Yesu kawauza, “Vino, mwene mgunda kowatenda choni waja walimaji?
20.16: Kokwiza na kuwakoma walimaji wose awo na kowakodisha walimaji wayagwe mgunda awo wa mizabibu.” Wanhu viwahulike mbuli ayo, walonga, “Bule! Sikuilawilile avo!”
20.17: Lakini Yesu kawalola, kawauza, “Vino, ulonzi uno fambulo jake choni? ‘Dibwe wadilemile wazengaji kamba hadifaya, digalamuka dibwe kulu da kutamanila kubanza gose!’
20.18: Munhu yoyose yonda yaikwale mdibwe ajo kobeneka beneka na munhu donda dimulagalile domuhonda tipitipi.” Mbuli ya kuliha kodi (Matayo 22:15-22; Maluko 12:13-17)
20.19: Wafundiza Malagizo ga Musa na wakulu wa walava nhosa wajuwa kamba lusimo ulo kakala kowafumbila wao. Avo bahaja walonda kumgoga Yesu, lakini wawadumba wanhu.
20.20: Avo wazahila kipindi kinogile. Wawahonga wanhu wayagwe waitende wanoga, wawatuma wamgeze Yesu kwa kumuuza, ili wadahe kumgoga na kumgala kwa mkulu wa Lumi.
20.21: Wanhu awo wamulongela Yesu, “Mfundiza, tokujuwa gweye kofundiza na kulonga ukweli, wala hutonga ukulu wa munhu, lakini kofundiza nzila za Imulungu mna ikweli.
20.22: Tulongele, vino vinoga kuliha kodi kwa mndewa mkulu wa Lumi hebu havinogile bule?”
20.23: Lakini Yesu kaujuwa mwaka ubala wao, kawalongela,
20.24: “Ndagusileni isente. Vino, kihanga kino na twaga dino va nani?” Wamwidika, “Va mndewa mkulu wa Lumi.”
20.25: Yesu kawalongela, “Vinoga. Vinhu va mndewa wa Lumi mgweleleni mndewa wa Lumi, na va Imulungu mgweleleni Imulungu.”
20.26: Avo, mgameso ga wanhu hawadahile kumgoga kwa mbuli yoyose. Wakanganya ulonzi wake, wanyamala tuulu. Mbuli ya kuzilibuka kwa wafile (Matayo 22:23-33; Maluko 12:18-27)
20.27: Abaho Masadukayo, wanhu olonga kamba kuduhu kuzilibuka kulawa kwa wafile. Wayagwe wamcholela Yesu, wamulongela,
20.28: “Mfundiza, Musa katwandikila, ‘Munhu yahafa na kuleka mwehe wake bila wana, ndugu yake munhu ayo kolondigwa yamsole imgane, yamulelele ndugu yake yafile wana.’
20.29: Kukala na ndugu saba. Ija imkulu kasola mwehe, lakini kafa bila kulela wana.
20.30: Wa kabili kamsola mtwanzi ija, lakini nayo kafa bila wana.
20.31: Abaho wa kadatu kamsola. Vivo ilawilile kwa wose saba wamsola, lakini wafa bila wana.
20.33: Lelo mwiisiku ya kuzilibuka, mtwanzi ayo kokuwa mwehe wa nani? Kwavija kakala yasoligwe na wose saba.”
20.34: Yesu kawedika, “Wanhu wa mwiisi ino osola na kusoligwa,
20.35: lakini waja wasaguligwe kuzilibuka kulawa kwa wafile na kuupata ugima onda wize, hawasola hebu kusoligwa.
20.36: Oigala na wasenga wa kuulanga, na hondawafe bule. Wao ni wana wa Imulungu kwavija wazilibuka kulawa kwa wafile.
20.37: Lakini kwa mbuli ya kuzilibuka kwa wanhu wafile, hata Musa kalagusa avo mna imbuli ya ikisolo kikwaka baho kamkema Mndewa, ‘Imulungu wa Abulahamu na Imulungu wa Isaka na Imulungu wa Yakobo.’
20.38: Heyo ni Imulungu wa wanhu wagima, siyo wa wanhu wafile. Kwavija kumwake heyo wose wagima.”
20.39: Wafundiza Malagizo ga Musa wayagwe walonga, “Mfundiza, kulonga goya!”
20.40: Avo hawadahile kumuuza mbuli ziyagwe. Mbuli ya Kilisito Mkombola (Matayo 22:41-46; Maluko 12:35-37)
20.41: Yesu kawauza, “Vino habali wanhu olonga kamba Kilisito Mkombola kolawa mulukolo lwa Daudi?
20.42: Kwavija Daudi mwenyego kolonga mna ikitabu cha Zabuli, ‘Mndewa Imulungu kamulongela Mndewa wangu, Kala hano mwambu wangu wa mkono wa kudila,
20.43: mbaka niwahume wanhu wakwihile na niweke hasi mmagulu gako.’
20.44: Daudi mwenyego kamkema, ‘Mndewa.’ Yodahika vilihi Kilisito Mkombola yalawe mulukolo lwa Daudi?” Yesu kowazuma wafundiza Malagizo ga Musa (Matayo 23:1-36; Maluko 12:38-40)
20.45: Wanhu wose viwakalile omtegeleza, Yesu kawalongela wanahina zake,
20.46: “Muiteganye na wafundiza Malagizo ga Musa. Wao onogelwa kwanga kuno wavala mikanzu mitali, na kulamusigwa na wanhu mna gamagulilo na kukala mna ivigoda va haulongozi mzing'anda za kumpula Imulungu na mna izinyimwilinyimwili.
20.47: Owonela wagane kwa kusola vinhu vao, na kuitenda wanoga kwa kumpula Imulungu kwa kulonga mbuli nyingi! Awo nhaguso yao yobanza ng'hani!”

21.1: Yesu kenula meso gake kawona matajili viwogela nhunza zao mkigelo cha kulavila nhunza.
21.2: Abaho kamona mgane mkiwa imoja kagela sente mbili ndodo.
21.3: Yesu kalonga, “Nowalongela ukweli, mgane ino kalava kinhu kikulu kubanza wose.
21.4: Kwavija matajili walava vija visigale muutajili wao, lakini mgane ino hamoja na ukiwa wake, kalava vose viyotamanila muugima wake.” Yesu kolonga mbuli ya kubanangigwa kwa Ng'anda ya Imulungu (Matayo 24:1-2; Maluko 13:1-2)
21.5: Wanahina wayagwe wakala olonga mbuli ya Ng'anda ya Imulungu, viizengigwe kwa mabwe ganogile na sadaka za wanhu zilavigwe kwa Imulungu. Lakini Yesu kalonga,
21.6: “Mogona gano gose! Siku yokwiza kuduhu dibwe donda disigale uchanha ya diyagwe, mabwe gose gobomoligwa.” Kugaya na kudununzika (Matayo 24:3-14; Maluko 13:3-13)
21.7: Wamuuza, “Mfundiza, vinhu avo volawilila lini? Choni chondakitendeke kulagusa kipindi cha kulawilila vinhu avo cha mmabehi?”
21.8: Yesu kawedika, “Muiteganye, munhu sikuyawavizile. Kwavija wanhu wengi okwiza kwa twaga jangu, na kulonga, ‘Niye ayo Kilisito!’ na ‘Kipindi cha mmabehi!’ Lakini sikumuwakweleleze.
21.9: Mwahahulika ng'hondo na zumozumo, sikumudumbe, kwavija vinhu avo volondigwa tanhu vilawilile, lakini kimambukizo king'hali hakinavika.”
21.10: Yesu kagendelela kulonga, “Wanhu wa isi imoja oitowa na wanhu wa isi iyagwe, undewa umoja oitowa na undewa uyagwe.
21.11: Kila hanhu hokuwa na migudemo mikulu ya isi, lufilili lwa nzala na mitamu, volawilila vinhu va kugela bwembwe na vilaguso kulawa kuulanga.
21.12: Lakini gang'hali haganalawila gano gose, mogogigwa na kudununzigwa. Mogaligwa mzing'anda za kumpula Imulungu na kuwagodeka mkifungo, mogaligwa haulongozi wa wandewa na wakulu wa isi mbuli ya twaga jangu.
21.13: Kino chokuwa kipindi chenu kinogile cha kuwapetela wanhu Mbuli Inogile.
21.14: Gangamaleni, sikumunyawenyawe mbuli ya vija vonda mwidike,
21.15: kwavija niye nowagwaa ubala na mbuli za kulonga. Kuduhu munhu mna iwanhu wamwihileni yodaha kuwahuma hebu kulema chonda mulonge.
21.16: Mohindukigwa na tata zenu na mama zenu na ndugu zenu na wanhu wa mulukolo, na mbwiga zenu, na wayagwe vimwili owakoma.
21.17: Wanhu wose owehila mweye mbuli ya twaga jangu.
21.18: Lakini kuduhu hata luvili lumoja lwa mmapala genu londa lupotele.
21.19: Mwahagangamala, moihonya wenyego. Yesu kolonga mbuli ya kubanangigwa kwa Yelusalemu (Matayo 24:15-21; Maluko 13:14-19)
21.20: “Mwahajona buga da Yelusalemu dizungulukigwa na wakalizi, baho mujuwe kipindi cha kubanangigwa cha mmabehi.
21.21: Baho, waja weli Yudea wakimbilile kuvigongo, waja weli kudibuga walawanye, waja weli kumigunda sikuwabwele kudibuga.
21.22: Kwavija kino acho kipindi cha nhaguso kutenda gaja gandikigwe galawilile.
21.23: Mna izisiku azo ogaya watwanzi weli na zinda na waja okong'heza! Kwavija hokuwa na magayo ng'hani mwiisi, na ng'hasiliki ya Imulungu yokuwa mna iwanhu wano.
21.24: Wayagwe okomigwa kwa panga, na wayagwe osoligwa na kugodekigwa mziisi zose, na wanhu haweli Wayahudi odihondahonda buga da Yelusalemu, mbaka kipindi chao vonda kimale. Kwiza kwa Mwana wa Munhu (Matayo 24:29-31; Maluko 13:24-27)
21.25: “Hokuwa na vilaguso mna dizuwa, mna imbalamwezi, na mna zinhondo. Isi zose zokuwa mna ukugaya, odumba mvumo wa bahali na ng'humbi.
21.26: Wanhu osinduka kwa bwembwe, kwa kubetela chondakilawilile mwiisi, kwavija vinhu vili kuulanga votigisika.
21.27: Kipindi acho omona Mwana wa Munhu kokwiza, mna gamawingu kwa nguvu ng'hulu na ukulu.
21.28: Avo vinhu vino vahasonga kulawilila, mwime na mwinule mapala genu uchanha, kwavija kukomboligwa kwenu kwa mmabehi.” Fundizo da biki da mtini (Matayo 24:32-35; Maluko 13:28-31)
21.29: Abaho Yesu kawalongela lusimo luno, “Geseni biki da mtini na mibiki yose iyagwe.
21.30: Mwahagona majani gake gosonga kuzuka, mojuwa kamba vuli da mmabehi.
21.31: Vivija, mwahavona vinhu avo volawilila, mujuwe kamba Undewa wa Imulungu wammabehi.
21.32: “Nowalongeleni ukweli, wanhu wa lukolo luno hawafa wose mbaka gano gose galawilile.
21.33: Ulanga na isi vobita, lakini mbuli zangu hondazibite. Kaleni meso
21.34: “Iteganyeni! Mizoyo yenu sikuigogigwe na unovu wa mwiisi ino, kukoligwa, na kugaya mbuli ya ugima uno, kwavija siku ayo yowasinhusa
21.35: kamba mtego. Kwavija yowezila wanhu wose okala kila hanhu mwiisi.
21.36: Muiteganye na mupule siku zose, ili mudahe kuhonyeka mna zimbuli zose zino zondazilawilile na kwima haulongozi wa Mwana wa Munhu.”
21.37: Kila siku Yesu kakala kofundiza Mng'anda ya Imulungu, na yahavika ichungulo, kacholaga kuna Ulugongo lwa Mizeituni na kakala kuko kilo kigima.
21.38: Imitootondo ng'hani wanhu wose wakala ochola kuna Ing'anda ya Imulungu kumtegeleza.

22.1: Kipindi cha Nyimwilinyimwili ya Magate hagageligwe Hamila, kikemigwe Pasaka kikala behi.
22.2: Wakulu wa walava nhosa na wafundiza Malagizo ga Musa wakala ozahila nzila ya kumkoma Yesu, lakini wawadumba wanhu. Yuda kotogola kumuhinduka Yesu (Matayo 26:14-16; Maluko 14:10-11)
22.3: Mwenembago kamkumba Yuda Isikaliote, imoja wa wanahina longo na wabili.
22.4: Yuda kachola kwa wakulu wa walava nhosa na wakulu wa wakalizi wa Ng'anda ya Imulungu, kawalongela vija vonda yamuhinduke Yesu kumwao.
22.5: Nao wadeng'helela na waitogolela kumgwaa sente.
22.6: Yuda katogola, na kasonga kuzahila nzila ya kumgela Yesu mmakono gao kwa kinyelegezi. Yesu koitanda kuja ndiya ya Pasaka (Matayo 26:17-25; Maluko 14:12-21; Yohana 13:21-30)
22.7: Siku ya Magate hagageligwe Hamila ivika. Siku ayo bofu da ng'hondolo da Pasaka dolavigwa nhosa.
22.8: Avo Yesu kawatuma Petulo na Yohana, kawalongela, “Choleni mkatutandile ndiya ya Pasaka tuje.”
22.9: Nao wamuuza, “Kolonda tukakutandile kwahi indiya ya Pasaka?”
22.10: Yesu kawedika, “Mwahengila kudibuga, mnzila momting'hana mbigalo yapapile nongo ya mazi. Mkwelelezeni mbaka mng'anda yonda yengile,
22.11: na mulongeleni mwenekae, ‘Mfundiza kokuuza, dakwahi gati dondanidile ndiya ya Pasaka niye na wanahina zangu?’
22.12: Nayo kowalagusila gati kulu da uchanha dihambigwe, mumo mtutandile kila kinhu.”
22.13: Wasegela wavika kila kinhu kamba vija Yesu viyawalongele, nao watanda ndiya ya Pasaka. Ndiya ya Mndewa (Matayo 26:26-30; Maluko 14:22-26; 1 Wakolinto 11:23-25)
22.14: Saa viivikile, Yesu kakala hana indiya na watumigwa zake.
22.15: Kawalongela, “Nisulukila ng'hani kuja ndiya ino ya Pasaka hamoja na mweye ning'hali sinadununzika!
22.16: Avo nowalongela, honda nije kabili mbaka vonda ilawilile Muundewa wa Imulungu.”
22.17: Abaho Yesu kasola kikasi cha divai, kamgwaa nhogolwa Imulungu, kalonga, “Soleni kino mung'wile mose.
22.18: Nowalongela kulawa sambi, honda ning'we divai ino mbaka vonda wize Undewa wa Imulungu.”
22.19: Abaho kasola gate, kamgwaa nhogolwa Imulungu, kadibanzula, kawagwaa, kalonga, “Uno ulo lukuli lwangu, ulavigwe mbuli ya mweye. Tendeni vino kwa kung'humbuka niye.”
22.20: Vivija, viwamambukize kuja indiya ya ichungulo, kawagwaa kikasi, kalonga, “Kino acho kikasi cha lagano da sambi dilagusigwa kwa damu yangu, ikwitika mbuli ya mweye.
22.21: “Lakini, loleni! Munhu yonihinduka kabahano na niye hana indiya!
22.22: Mwana wa Munhu kofa kamba Imulungu viyalondile, lakini kogaya munhu ija yomuhinduka!”
22.23: Abaho wasonga kuiuza, nani viweli yonda yatende vivo. Kuibamilila mbuli ya ukulu
22.24: Wanahina wakala oibamilila wao kwa wao nani yokoneka munhu mkulu kubanza wose.
22.25: Yesu kawalongela, “Wandewa wa wanhu haweli Wayahudi wana udahi kwa wanhu, vilongozi oikema, ‘Mbwiga wa wanhu.’
22.26: Lakini kumwenu mweye haili vivo bule, munhu mkulu kumwenu yawe kamba munhu mdodo, na kilongozi yawe kamba msang'hanaji.
22.27: Vino, nani yeli munhu mkulu, ija yakalile mmeza koja, hebu ija yotanda indiya? Ona, ayo ija yakalile mmeza koja. Lakini niye na hagati yenu kamba munhu yosang'hana.”
22.28: “Mweye mukala na niye kipindi chose cha kugezigwa kwangu,
22.29: kamba Tatangu viyanigwelele Undewa na niye nowagwaa Undewa awo.
22.30: Moja na kung'wa mmeza yangu mna Undewa wangu, na mokala mna ivigoda va Undewa kugatawala makabila longo na mabili ga Izilaeli.” Yesu kolagula kamba Petulo kombela (Matayo 26:31-35; Maluko 14:27-31; Yohana 13:36-38)
22.31: Yesu kalonga, “Simoni, Simoni! Tegeleza! Mwenembago kampula Imulungu kuwageza mweye, kuwabagula wanogile na wehile, kamba vija mfolaji viyobagula fuya na hemba.
22.32: Lakini nikupulila kwa Imulungu gweye Simoni, ili kumtamanila kwako Imulungu sikukupotele. Na vondaunibwelele, uwagangamize ndugu zako.”
22.33: Petulo kamwidika, “Mndewa, notogola kugodekigwa na gweye mkifungo na kufa!”
22.34: Yesu kalonga, “Petulo, nokulongela ukweli, kilo cha lelo nzogolo yang'hali hanakwika, konibela miyanza midatu.” Kipindi cha kugaya
22.35: Abaho Yesu kawauza wanahina zake, “Vino, kipindi kija viniwatumile kuno mduhu kibindo hebu mkoba hebu vilatu, muhungukiligwa na kinhu chochose?” Wamwidika, “Aka, hatuhungukiligwe na kinhu.”
22.36: Yesu kawalongela, “Lakini sambi, munhu yoyose yeli na kibindo, hebu mkoba yausole, na munhu yoyose yelibule panga yakachuuze koti jake yakagule.
22.37: Kwavija nowalongela Maandiko Gang'alile galongile, ‘Kekigwa mdibumbila dimoja na wabananzi,’ golondigwa gavikizwe. Nowalongela, gaja gandikigwe mbuli ya niye golawilila.”
22.38: Wanahina walonga, “Mndewa, lola, hano hana mapanga mabili!” Nayo kawedika, “Yotosha!” Yesu kompula Imulungu kuna Ulugongo lwa Mizeituni (Matayo 26:36-46; Maluko 14:32-42)
22.39: Yesu kasegela kudibuga dija kachola kuna Ulugongo lwa Mizeituni, kamba viyazowele, na wanahina zake wamkweleleza.
22.40: Viyavikile kuko, kawalongela, “Mpuleni Imulungu, sikumwingile mna ukugezigwa.”
22.41: Abaho kawaleka, kachola utali wa kwasa dibwe, kafugama, kampula Imulungu.
22.42: Kalonga, “Tata, wahalonda, unisegesele kikasi kino cha madununzo. Siyo kamba vinilonda niye, lakini kamba viulonda gweye.”
