22.44: Kwa usungu mkulu uyakalile nao kampula ng'hani, mbaka fuguti dimulawa, fuguti jake dikala kamba madwendwe ga damu golagala hasi.
22.45: Viyamambukize kumpula Imulungu, kabwela kwa wanahina zake, kawavika okuluza kwavija wakala wadonhile mbuli ya kunyunyuwala.
22.46: Kawalongela, “Habali mowasa? Lamukeni mumpule Imulungu, sikumwingile mna ukugezigwa.” Yesu kogogigwa (Matayo 26:47-56; Maluko 14:43-50; Yohana 18:3-11)
22.47: Yesu viyakalile yang'hali kolonga, lunhu lwa wanhu luvika lulongozigwe na Yuda, imoja wa wanahina zake longo na wabili. Yuda kamcholela Yesu kamulamusa kwa kumnonela.
22.48: Lakini Yesu kamulongela, “Yuda, komuhinduka Mwana wa Munhu kwa kumnonela?”
22.49: Wanahina wakalile hamoja na Yesu viwonile gaja gonda galawilile, wauza, “Mndewa, tuwakanhe na mapanga getu?”
22.50: Imoja wao kambiga kwa panga msang'hanaji wa Mkulu wa walava nhosa na kamkanha digwiti da mkono wa kudila.
22.51: Lakini Yesu kalonga, “Bule sikumutende avo!” Kadikwasa digwiti da munhu ija, kamuhonya.
22.52: Abaho Yesu kawalongela wakulu wa walava nhosa na wakulu wa wakalizi wa Ng'anda ya Imulungu na wavele wezile kumgoga, “Habali, mwiza kungoga kwa mapanga na malungu, kamba nambavi?
22.53: Siku zose ng'hala na mweye Mng'anda ya Imulungu hamngogile bule. Lakini kino acho kipindi chenu cha kusang'hana, muundewa wa ziza.” Petulo kombela Yesu (Matayo 26:57-58; Maluko 14:53-54, 66-72; Yohana 18:12-18, 25-27)
22.54: Baho wamgoga Yesu, wengila nayo mng'anda ya mkulu wa walava nhosa. Petulo kamkweleleza kwa kutali.
22.55: Wabwinha moto hagati hana uluwa, wakala hamoja na Petulo kakala hamoja nao.
22.56: Msang'hanaji imoja wa kitwanzi viyamone Petulo kakala aho haumoto, kamulola bunhuu, kalonga, “Vivija munhu ino kakala hamoja na Yesu!”
22.57: Lakini Petulo kabela, kalonga, “Gwee, mtwanzi gwe, simjuwile bule!”
22.58: Hamwande kidogo munhu iyagwe kamona Petulo, kalonga, “Vivija na gweye kwa imoja wao!” Lakini Petulo kamwidika, “Gwee munhu gwe, siyo niye!”
22.59: Vidibitile saa dimoja, munhu iyagwe kagangamiza ng'hani, “Kweli munhu ino kakala hamoja na Yesu, kwavija nayo mwenekae wa Galilaya!”
22.60: Lakini Petulo kamwidika, “Munhu gweye, sikijuwile kiulonga!” Bahaja, viyakalile yang'hali kolonga, nzogolo keka.
22.61: Mndewa kahinduka, kamulola Petulo, nayo Petulo kakumbuka Mndewa viyamulongele, “Kilo cha lelo nzogolo yang'hali hanakwika, konibela miyanza midatu.”
22.62: Petulo kalawa kunze kalila kwa usungu. Yesu kozehigwa na kutowigwa (Matayo 26:67-68; Maluko 14:65)
22.63: Wanhu wakalile omkaliza Yesu, wakala omzeha na kumtowa,
22.65: Vivija walonga mbuli ziyagwe nyingi za kumuliga. Yesu kogaligwa mkitala (Matayo 26:59-66; Maluko 14:55-64; Yohana 18:19-24)
22.66: Imitondo yake, wavele, wakulu wa walava nhosa na wafundiza Malagizo ga Musa waiting'hana hamoja na Yesu kagaligwa mkitala acho.
22.67: Walonga, “Tulongele! Vino, gweye ayo Kilisito Mkombola?” Yesu kawedika, “Nahawalongela, honda munitogole bule,
22.68: na nahawauza mbuli, honda mwidike bule.
22.69: Lakini kusongela sambi, Mwana wa Munhu kokala muukulu mwambu wa mkono wa kudila wa Imulungu yeli na Udahi.”
22.70: Wose walonga, “Vino gweye kwa Mwana wa Imulungu?” Yesu kawedika, “Vivo vimulonga.”
22.71: Walonga, “Hatulonda usindila uyagwe! Siye wenyego tumuhulika viyalongile!”

23.1: Abaho wanhu wose wenuka, wamgala Yesu kwa Pilato,
23.2: wasonga kumulavila vitala, walonga, “Tumvika munhu ino kowagiza wanhu zetu, kowagomesa wanhu sikuwalihe kodi kwa mndewa mkulu wa Lumi na koikema heyo ayo Kilisito Mkombola na koikema Mndewa.”
23.3: Pilato kamuuza, “Gweye ayo Mndewa wa Wayahudi?” Yesu kamwidika, “Vivo viulonga.”
23.4: Abaho Pilato kawalongela wakulu wa walava nhosa na ulunhu lwa wanhu, “Siyonile mbuli ya kumtagusa munhu ino.”
23.5: Lakini wao wagangamiza ng'hani, walonga, “Kwa mafundizo gake kowading'hula wanhu wose wa mwiisi ya Yudea. Kasongela Galilaya na sambi keza hano.” Yesu kogaligwa kwa Helode
23.6: Pilato viyahulike avo kauza, “Vino munhu ino mwenekae wa Galilaya?”
23.7: Viyajuwile kamba Yesu kalawa mwiisi ilongozigwa na Helode, kamgala kwa Helode, yakalile Yelusalemu kipindi acho.
23.8: Helode viyamone Yesu kadeng'helela ng'hani, kwavija kahulika mbuli zake na toka mwaka kakala yolonda kumona. Kakala kobetela kona unzonza utendigwa na Yesu.
23.9: Avo Helode kamuuza Yesu mbuli nyingi, lakini hamwidike mbuli.
23.10: Wakulu wa walava nhosa na wafundiza Malagizo ga Musa walawilila kuulongozi wamulavila vitala Yesu vikulu vikulu.
23.11: Helode na wakalizi zake wamzeha Yesu na kumbezeli, abaho wamvaza kiwalo cha undewa wambweza kwa Pilato.
23.12: Kipindi kikija Helode na Pilato wakala mbwiga, kwavija ako umwaka wakala waihile. Yesu kotagusigwa yafe (Matayo 27:15-26; Maluko 15:6-15; Yohana 18:39-19:16)
23.13: Pilato kawakema hamoja wakulu wa walava nhosa, vilongozi na wanhu,
23.14: kawalongela, “Mumgala munhu ino kumwangu mulonga kakala kowagiza wanhu. Lelo nimuuza mgameso genu na siyonile mbuli yoyose ihile yumumtagusile.
23.15: Vivija Helode hachonile kiyabanange, lekaavo kambweza kumwetu. Kwavija kuduhu mbuli yoyose yaitendile munhu ino imtende yakomigwe.
23.16: Avo nolagiza yatoigwe mbalati na kumuleka yachole.”
23.17: Chahavikaga kipindi cha Nyimwilinyimwili ya Pasaka, Pilato kalondigwa yamfungulile mfungwa imoja.
23.18: Lunhu lose lukemelela, “Mkome munhu ayo! Tufungulile Balaba!”
23.19: Balaba kakala yagodekigwe mkifungo mbuli ya kuwading'hula wanhu kudibuga, na mbuli ya ukomaji.
23.20: Pilato kalonda kumulekesa Yesu, avo kalulongela ulunhu kabili.
23.21: Lakini wagendelela kukemelela, “Muwambe mumsalaba! Muwambe mumsalaba!”
23.22: Pilato kawalongela mwanza wa kadatu, “Vino, mbuli gani ihile yaitendile munhu ino? Siyonile mbuli yoyose yaitendile munhu ino imtende yakomigwe! Nolagiza yatoigwe mbalati na kumulekesa.”
23.23: Wagendelela kukemelela ng'hani, olonga Yesu yawambigwe mumsalaba, kukimambukizo nyangi zao zihuma.
23.24: Avo Pilato katogola kija kiwalondile kumtendela Yesu.
23.25: Kamfungulila munhu iwamulondile, ija yagodekigwe mbuli ya kuwading'hula wanhu na ukomaji, na kamgela Yesu mmakono gao wamtendele kamba viwalondile. Yesu kowambigwa mumsalaba (Matayo 27:32-44; Maluko 15:21-32; Yohana 19:17-27)
23.26: Wakalizi wamulongoza Yesu, viwakalile omgala, wamting'hana munhu imoja kulawa Kilene, twaga jake Simoni, kakala kolawa kumgunda, wamgoga wamdikwa umsalaba, na wamulagiza yaupape hachugu ha Yesu.
23.27: Lunhu mkulu lwa wanhu lumkweleleza, mmwanza awo wakala watwanzi wayagwe wakalile omulilila na kuiyalala.
23.28: Yesu kahinduka kawalongela, “Mweye kina mama wa Yelusalemu! Sikumunililile niye, lakini ililileni wenyego na wanenu.
23.29: Kwavija kipindi chokwiza wanhu olonga, ‘Wamweda watwanzi hawalelile wana na hawakong'heze!’
23.30: Kipindi acho wanhu ovilongela vigongo, ‘Tulagalile!’ na ovilongela visugulu, ‘Tufiseni!’
23.31: kwavija kamba wanhu otenda mbuli zino kipindi biki ding'hali bisi, vino yokuwaze kipindi biki dahanyala?”
23.32: Wanhu wabili wayagwe wakalile wabananzi, wagaligwa wakomigwe hamoja na Yesu.
23.33: Viwavikile hanhu hakemigwe, “Fumvu da Pala,” wamuwamba Yesu mumsalaba, hamoja na waja wabananzi wabili, imoja mwambu wa mkono wake wa kudila na iyagwe mwambu wa mkono wake wa kumoso.
23.34: Yesu kalonga, “Tata, gela kumgongo nzambi zao, kwavija hawakijuwa kiwotenda.” Waigolela viwalo vake kwa kubwanha simbi.
23.35: Wanhu wema aho olola, kuno wakulu wa Wayahudi omzeha Yesu, walonga, “Kawakombola wayagwe, leka yaikombole mwenyego, kamba heyo ayo Kilisito, yasaguligwe na Imulungu!”
23.36: Vivija wakalizi wamzeha, wamcholela wamgwaa divai ya ugwadu,
23.37: kuno olonga, “Kamba gweye kwa Mndewa wa Wayahudi, ikombole mwenyego!”
23.38: Uchanha ya msalaba wake wandika vino, “Ino ayo Mndewa wa Wayahudi.”
23.39: Imoja wa waja wabananzi yawambigwe mumsalaba, kamuliga Yesu, kalonga, “Vino gweye siyo Kilisito Mkombola? Ikombole mwenyego na siye!”
23.40: Lakini ija iyagwe kamkomhokela miyage, kalonga, “Vino, gweye humdumba Imulungu bule? Na gweye kutagusigwa kamba heyo.
23.41: Gweye na niye totagusigwa goya, kwavija tobokela fungu da sang'hano zetu, lakini munhu ino hatendile mbuli yoyose ihile.”
23.42: Abaho munhu ija kamulongela Yesu, “Yesu, ung'humbuke wahengila Muundewa wako!”
23.43: Yesu kamulongela, “Nokulongela ukweli, lelo kokuwa na niye Paladiso.” Ifa ya Yesu (Matayo 27:45-56; Maluko 15:33-41; Yohana 19:28-30)
23.44: Ikala saa sita imisi, ziza diigubika isi yose mbaka saa tisa,
23.45: kwavija zuwa dileka kumwemwesa. Panziya da Ng'anda ya Imulungu digola gati da Ng'anda ya Imulungu na hanhu hong'ala ng'hani, didegeka mhande mbili.
23.46: Yesu kalila kwa sauti ng'hulu, “Tata, noika mmakono gako loho yangu!” Viyalongile avo, kafa.
23.47: Mkulu wa wakalizi wa Lumi viyagone gago galawilile, kamgwaa nhogolwa Imulungu, kalonga, “Munhu ino kweli kakala yanogile!”
23.48: Wanhu wose wakalile waiting'hane aho kulola mbuli azo, viwagone gago galawilile, wabwela ukayao, kuno otowa mhambaga zao kwa kunyunyuwala.
23.49: Wanhu wose wamjuwile Yesu na watwanzi wamuwinzile kulawa Galilaya, wema kwa kutali olola mbuli azo. Yesu kozikigwa (Matayo 27:57-61; Maluko 15:42-47; Yohana 19:38-42)
23.50: Kukala na munhu imoja twaga jake Yusufu, munhu wa Mkitala, kakala munhu yanogile na kutenda goyolonda Imulungu.
23.51: Keza kulawa Yudea buga da Alimataya na kakala kobeta kwiza kwa Undewa wa Imulungu. Hamoja kakala imoja wa wakulu wa mkitala, hagatogole gaja gawalondile wayage na gaja gawakalile otenda.
23.52: Kachola kwa Pilato, kampula lukuli lwa Yesu.
23.53: Abaho kaluhumulusa hasi ulukuli, kaluzingiliza sitili, kalwika mdipanga disongoligwe mdibwe, dikalile hadinazikiligwa munhu.
23.54: Ikala ijumaa, siku ayo ikala siku ya kuitanda siku ya Kubwihila ikalile behi kusonga.
23.55: Watwanzi waja wamkweleleze Yesu kulawa Galilaya wachola na Yusufu, na wajona dipanga na vija vilwikigwe lukuli lwa Yesu.
23.56: Abaho wabwela ukae, watanda mavuta gonung'hila goya walubake lukuli lwa Yesu. Mna isiku ya Kubwihila wabwihila kamba Malagizo ga Musa vigalagize.

24.1: Jumapili imitootondo ng'hani, watwanzi waja wachola kudipanga, kuno wasola mavuta gonung'hila goya gawatandile.
24.2: Wadivika idibwe dibimbilisigwa hamgwazo wa umulomo wa dipanga,
24.3: avo wengila mdipanga, lakini hawaluwone lukuli lwa Mndewa Yesu.
24.4: Wema aho kuno oikanganya mbuli ayo, bahaja wanhu wabili wavalile viwalo vizelu chuwee wema behi nao.
24.5: Kuno wamema bwembwe, watwanzi waja waidulika hasi, wanhu waja wawalongela, “Habali momzahila munhu yeli mgima mna iwanhu wafile?
24.6: Hano kahaduhu, kazilibuka. Kumbukeni vija viyawalongele viyakalile Galilaya.
24.7: ‘Mwana wa Munhu kolondigwa yageligwe mmakono ga wanhu otenda nzambi, awo omuwamba mumsalaba, na siku ya kadatu kozilibuka!’ ”
24.8: Baho watwanzi waja wazikumbuka mbuli zake,
24.9: Walawa mdipanga, na wawalongela wanahina longo na imoja mbuli zose zino na wanhu wayagwe.
24.10: Watwanzi awo wakala, Malia Magidalena, Yoana na Malia mamake Yakobo, awo hamoja na watwanzi wayagwe wawalongela watumigwa mbuli azo.
24.11: Lakini watumigwa wagesa kamba mbuli zilongigwe na iwatwanzi waja za ubozi, na hawawatogolele bule.
24.12: Lakini Petulo kenuka na kakimbila mbaka kudipanga, kasungulila mgati, kayona sitili iiyeka. Abaho kabwela ukae kuno kokanganya kija kilawilile. Mwanza wa kuchola Emau (Maluko 16:12-13)
24.13: Siku didija wanahina wabili wa Yesu wakala ochola kuna ikijiji kimoja kikemigwe Emau, kikala utali wa kilometa longo na imoja kulawa Yelusalemu,
24.14: wakala osimulila usheha wa mbuli zose zilawilile.
24.15: Viwakalile osimulila, Yesu mwenyego kakwesa behi kailongoza nao.
24.17: Yesu kawalongela, “Mosimulila usheha gani kuno mogenda?” Nao wema wanyamala tuluu, na vihanga vao vigela bazi kwa kunyunyuwala.
24.18: Imoja wao yakemigwe Kileopa, kamuuza, “Vino, gweye wiiyeka ayo huli mwenekae wa Yelusalemu hujuwile mbuli zilawilile kuko sambi sambi?”
24.19: Kawauza, “Mbuli gani?” Nao wamwidika, “Mbuli zimulawilile Yesu wa Nazaleti, munhu ayo kakala mtula ndagu wa Imulungu na kakala yokoneka mgameso ga Imulungu na wanhu wose kamba kana udahi kwa kila kinhu kiyalongile na kiyatendile.
24.20: Wakulu wa walava nhosa na vilongozi zetu wamgela mmakono yatagusigwe kufa, na yawambigwe mumsalaba.
24.21: Na siye tutamanila kamba heyo ayo yonda yawakombole wanhu wa Izilaeli! Lakini lelo siku ya kadatu toka zilawilile mbuli zino.
24.22: Watwanzi wayagwe wa mdibumbila jetu watukanganya, imitootondo wachola kuna dipanga,
24.23: lakini hawaluvikile lukuli lwake. Wabwela walonga wawona wasenga wa kuulanga wawalongela kamba, Yesu mgima.
24.24: Abaho wanhu wayagwe wa mkibumbila chetu wachola kuna dipanga na wavika vivija viwawalongele watwanzi awo, lakini hawamonile bule.”
24.25: Yesu kawalongela, “Mweye mwa wabozi, na mizoyo yenu midala kutogola gose galongigwe na watula ndagu wa Imulungu!
24.26: Vino, halondigwa Kilisito Mkombola yadununzike kamba avo, abaho yengile muukulu wake?”
24.27: Yesu kawasimulila gaja galongigwe na Maandiko Gang'alile mbuli yake mwenyego, kusongela mna ivitabu va Musa na maandiko ga watula ndagu wose wa Imulungu.
24.28: Viwavikile behi na ikijiji kiwakalile ochola, Yesu kaitenda kamba kogendelela na mwanza,
24.29: lakini wamgoma ng'hani, olonga, “Ukale na siye, zuwa dihonga na ziza dokwingila.” Avo kagenda na kukala nao.
24.30: Kakala hasi na kuja nao, kasola gate, kamgwaa nhogolwa Imulungu, abaho kadibanzula kawagwaa.
24.31: Bahaja, meso gao gagubuligwa na wamjuwa, lakini kapotela mgameso gao.
24.32: Wailongela, “Vino, mizoyo yetu hayakile na kimuhemuhe vitukalile mnzila kotulongela na kotusimulila Maandiko Gang'alile?”
24.33: Bahaja wenuka wabweleganya Yelusalemu, kuko wawavika wanahina longo na imoja wakala hamoja na wanhu wayagwe,
24.35: Wanhu waja wawasimulila kija kiwalawilile mnzila, na vija viwamjuwile Yesu viyadibanzule gate. Yesu kowalawilila wanahina zake (Matayo 28:16-20; Maluko 16:14-18; Yohana 20:19-23; Sang'hano 1:6-8)
24.36: Wanhu waja viwakalile wang'hali owasimulila mbuli azo, bahaja Yesu kema hagati yao, kawalongela, “Zihozeni.”
24.37: Wasinhuka na kudumba wagesa okona mzimu.
24.38: Lakini Yesu kawalongela, “Habali modumba na kunyawanyawa?
24.39: Loleni makono gangu na magulu gangu, na mojuwa kamba ayo niye. Mbabaseni mojuwa, kwavija mzimu wabule lukuli na mizege, kamba vimnyona niye.”
24.40: Viyalongile avo, kawalagusila makono gake na magulu gake.
24.41: Wakala wang'hali hawatogola, kwavija wakala odeng'helela na kukanganya, avo Yesu kawauza, “Mna kinhu chochose chakuja hano?”
24.44: Abaho kawalongela, “Mbuli zino azo ziniwalongeleni ving'halile hamoja na mweye, kamba gose gandikigwe mbuli ya niye mna Gamalagizo ga Musa, na gandikigwe na watula ndagu wa Imulungu, na Zabuli galondigwa galawilile.”
24.45: Baho kazigubula nzewele zao wadahe kugajuwa Maandiko Gang'alile.
24.46: Kawalongela, “Vino avo yandikigwe, Kilisito Mkombola kolondigwa yadununzike na siku da kadatu kozilibuka kulawa kwa wafile,
24.47: kwa twaga jake, usenga opetigwa kwa wanhu wa isi zose, kusongela Yelusalemu, ili waleke nzambi zao na Imulungu yazigele kumgongo.
24.48: Na mweye awo wasindila wa mbuli azo.
24.49: Na niye nowagalila ija iyalongile Tatangu. Lakini beteni kudibuga mbaka nguvu vonda iwezileni kulawa uchanha.” Yesu kogaligwa kuulanga (Maluko 16:19-20; Sang'hano 1:9-11)
24.50: Abaho kawalongoza kunze kudibuga mbaka Betania, ako kenula makono gake, kawatambikila.
24.52: Wamtambikila na wabwela Yelusalemu kwa deng'ho kulu,
24.53: kipindi chose wakala Mng'anda ya Imulungu na kumgwaa nhogolwa Imulungu.

1.1: Baho kunaichanduso vinhu vose ving'hali havinalumbigwa kukala imoja yakemigwe Mbuli. Ayo kakala na Imulungu na ayo kakala Imulungu.
1.2: Toka kunaichanduso Mbuli kakala hamoja na Imulungu.
1.3: Kubitila heyo, Imulungu kaumba vinhu vose. Kuduhu kinhu chochose kiumbigwe bila heyo.
1.4: Mgati mmwake mumo ukalile mwanduso wa ugima, na ugima awo ukala mulenge kwa wanhu.
1.5: Mulenge awo okwaka mdiziza, najo ziza hadiudaha kuuzima bule.
1.6: Kulawilila munhu imoja yatumigwe na Imulungu, twaga jake Yohana.
1.7: Ayo keza kuwalongela wanhu mbuli ya umulenge ili wanhu wose wahulike na watogole.
1.8: Heyo mwenyego hakalile awo umulenge bule, lakini keza kuwalongela wanhu mbuli ya umulenge.
1.9: Uno ukala mulenge kweli, mulenge wizile mwiisi kuwamwemwesela wanhu wose.
1.10: Mbuli kakala mwiisi, na kubitila heyo Imulungu kaumba isi yose, lakini wanhu wa mwiisi hawamjuwile bule.
1.11: Keza mwiisi yake mwenyego, lakini wanhu zake mwenyego hawambokele bule.
1.12: Lakini waja wambokele na kumtogola, Imulungu kawatogolela kuwa wanage.
1.13: Si wana wa Imulungu bule kwa kuleligwa, hebu viwolonda wanhu hebu kwa udahi wa mbigalo yoyose, lakini Imulungu mwenyego heyo Tatao.
1.14: Na heyo yakemigwe Mbuli kawa munhu, kakala hamoja na siye, na siye tuwona ukulu wake, ukulu uyagweleligwe na Imulungu Tatake, nayo kamema ng'hekewa na ukweli.
1.15: Yohana kalava usindila uno yolonga, “Ino ayo iniwalongeleni kokwiza kuchugu kumwangu yeli mkulu kubanza niye, kwavija kakala kuko toka umwaka niye sinavumbuka.”
1.16: Kwa ng'hekewa imemile iyelinayo, siye wose tumweda ng'hani.
1.17: Imulungu kalava Malagizo kubitila Musa, lakini Yesu Kilisito katugalila ng'hekewa na ukweli.
1.18: Kuduhu munhu yamonile Imulungu, lakini Imwana yaiyeka yaigalile na Imulungu na kuilumba na Tata, ayo yatutendile tumjuwe Imulungu. Usenga wa Yohana Mbatizaji (Matayo 3:1-12; Maluko 1:1-8; Luka 3:1-18)
1.19: Wakulu wa Wayahudi kudibuga da Yelusalemu wawatuma walava nhosa na Walawi wachole kwa Yohana wakamuuze, “Gweye kwa nani?”
1.20: Yohana halemile bule kuwedika, lakini kalonga fulu ipile, “Niye sili Kilisito Mkombola.”
1.21: Wamuuza, “Gweye kwa nani? Kwa Eliya?” Yohana kawedika, “Ka, sili Eliya bule.” Wamuuza, “Gweye kwa mtula ndagu wa Imulungu?” Kawedika, “Ka, sili niye.”
1.22: Wamulongela, “Tulongele, gweye kwa nani? Tolonda tukawedike waja watutumile. Vino gweye mwenyego koikemaze?”
1.23: Yohana kawedika kwa kulonga gaja gayalongile mtula ndagu wa Imulungu Isaya, “Niye na ‘imoja yokema kuluwala. Tendeni goya nzila ya Mndewa, goloseni nzila yonda yabite!’ ”
1.24: Wasenga waja watumigwe na kibumbila cha Mafalisayo
1.25: wamuuza Yohana, “Kumbe gweye huli Kilisito, hebu huli Eliya, hebu huli mtula ndagu wa Imulungu, habali kobatiza wanhu?”
1.26: Yohana kawedika, “Niye nowabatiza mweye kwa mazi, lakini kabaho imoja kema hagati yenu, mweye hamumjuwile bule.
1.27: Kokwiza kuchugu kumwangu, lakini niye sifaya hata kudohola nzabi za vilatu vake.”
1.28: Mbuli zose zino zilongigwa ako Betania mwambu wa kudilawila zuwa wa lwanda lwa Yolidani, kuyakalile Yohana yobatiza wanhu. Yesu ayo Mwanang'hondolo wa Imulungu
1.29: Imitondo yake Yohana kamona Yesu komwizila, kalonga, “Loleni, Mwanang'hondolo wa Imulungu yosegesa nzambi za wanhu wa mwiisi!
1.30: Ino ayo inilongile mbuli zake, ‘Kokwiza munhu kuchugu kumwangu yeli munhu mkulu kubanza nene, kwavija kakala kuko toka umwaka niye sinavumbuka.’
1.31: Niye mwenyego simjuwile viyali, lakini niza kuwabatiza kwa mazi ili kutenda yajuwigwe na wanhu wa Izilaeli.”
1.32: Yohana kalava usindila kwa kulonga, “Nimona Loho Yang'alile kohumuluka kuulanga kamba huwa na kwima uchanha yake.
1.33: Niye nikala sijuwile kamba ayo heyo, lakini Imulungu, yanhumile kuwabatiza kwa mazi kanongela, ‘Munhu yonda umone Loho Yang'alile komuhumulukila kulawa kuulanga na kwima uchanha kwa munhu ayo, heyo ayo yonda yawabatize kwa Loho Yang'alile.’ ”
1.34: Abaho Yohana kalonga, “Nichona kinhu acho, na nowalongeleni ukweli, heyo ayo Mwana wa Imulungu.” Wanahina wa ichanduso wa Yesu
1.35: Imitondo yake, Yohana kakala kabili hanhu aho na wanahina zake wabili.
1.36: Viyamone Yesu kobita, kalonga, “Loleni, ino ayo Mwanang'hondolo wa Imulungu!”
1.37: Wanahina awo wabili viwamuhulike Yohana kolonga avo, wamkweleleza Yesu.
1.38: Yesu kahinduka, kawona omkweleleza, kawauza, “Mozahila choni?” Wamwidika, “Labi, kokala kwahi?” Labi fambulo jake, “Mfundiza.”
1.39: Kawalongela, “Izoni mulole.” Avo wachola hamoja nayo na kuhona hayakalile yokala. Ikala saa kumi ya imisi, na wasinda nayo.
1.40: Andeleya, ndugu yake Simoni Petulo, kakala imoja wa awo iwabili wamuhulike Yohana na kumkweleleza Yesu.
1.41: Bahaja Andeleya viyamone Simoni ndugu yake, kamulongela, “Tumona Masihi.” Masihi fambulo jake “Kilisito Mkombola.”
1.42: Abaho Andeleya kamgala Simoni kwa Yesu. Yesu kamulola, kamulongela, “Twaga jako Simoni mwanage Yohana, lakini kokemigwa Kefa.” Kefa kwa Kigiliki Petulo, na Petulo fambulo jake dibwe. Yesu komkema Filipo na Nasanaeli
1.43: Imitondo yake Yesu kachola isi ya Galilaya, kamvika Filipo, kamulongela, “Ng'holeleze!”
1.44: Filipo kakala mwenekae wa Betisaida kudibuga diwakalile Andeleya na Petulo.
1.45: Filipo kamvika Nasanaeli, kamulongela, “Tumona munhu ayo yandikigwe na Musa mna ikitabu cha Malagizo, na watula ndagu wa Imulungu wengi wandika mbuli zake. Heyo Yesu mwanage Yusufu, mwenekae wa Nazaleti.”
1.46: Nasanaeli kamuuza, “Vino mbuli yoyose inogile yodaha kulawa kudibuga da Nazaleti?” Filipo kamwidika, “Izo ulole.”
1.47: Yesu viyamone Nasanaeli komwizila, kasimulila, “Ino Mwiizilaeli kweli, mgati yake mduhu uvizi!”
1.48: Nasanaeli kamuuza, “Vino gweye kunjuwaze?” Yesu kamwidika, “Filipo yang'hali hanakukema viukalile hasi hana dibiki da mtini, niye nikona.”
1.49: Nasanaeli kedika, “Mfundiza, gweye kwa Mwana wa Imulungu! Gweye kwa Mndewa wa Izilaeli!”
1.50: Yesu kamulongela Nasanaeli, “Vino kotogola kwavija nikulongela nikona viukalile hana dibiki da mtini? Kokwiza kuvona vinhu vingi ng'hani kubanza vino!”
1.51: Yesu kawalongela, “Nowalongeleni ukweli, mouwona ulanga ugubuka na wasenga wa kuulanga okwela na kuhumuluka uchanha ya Mwana wa Munhu.”

2.1: Siku da kadatu kukala na zengele kudibuga da Kana mwiisi ya Galilaya. Mamake Yesu kakala aho,
2.2: Yesu na wanahina zake vivija wagonekigwa kudizengele.
2.3: Divai viimalile, mamake kamulongela Yesu, “Divai imala.”
2.4: Yesu kamwidika, “Mama, habali unongela vivo. Saa yangu hainavika.”
2.5: Abaho mamake Yesu kawalongela waja wasang'hanaji, “Chochose chonda yawalongele sang'haneni.”
2.6: Kukala na nongo sita za mabwe, kila nongo yomema madumu matano, zikigwa aho kamba viikalile mila ya Wayahudi ya kunawa.
2.7: Yesu kawalongela awo iwasang'hanaji, “Memezeni mazi nongo zose.” Nao wazimemeza mbaka uchanha.
2.8: Abaho Yesu kawalongela, “Deheni kidogo mumgalile mkulu wa dizengele.” Nao wamgalila.
2.9: Mkulu wa dizengele viyagalanzile gaja gamazi, gagaluka divai. Hajuwile kuilawile, lakini waja iwasang'hanaji wadehile gamazi wajuwa. Avo mkulu wa dizengele kamkema ayo yosola mwehe,
2.10: kamulongela, “Kila munhu kagolaga divai inogile hana ichanduso. Wanhu wagonekigwe wahang'wa ng'hani, kolava divai igwaduke wang'we, lakini gweye kuika divai inogile mbaka sambi!”
2.11: Yesu kasang'hana unzonza uno wa ichanduso ako Kana mwiisi ya Galilaya. Kuko kalagusa ukulu wake, na wanahina zake wamtogola.
2.12: Vigabitile gago, Yesu hamoja na mamake, ndugu zake, na wanahina zake wachola kudibuga da Kapelinaumu wakala aho siku ndodo. Yesu kokwingila Mng'anda ya Imulungu (Matayo 12:12-13; Maluko 11:15-17; Luka 19:45-46)
2.13: Siku da Pasaka ya Wayahudi dikala behi, avo Yesu kachola Yelusalemu.
2.14: Kawavika wanhu Mng'anda ya Imulungu ochuuza ng'ombe, ng'hondolo, njiwa, na wayagwe wakala mmeza ovunja sente.
2.15: Yesu kabota balati da luzabi, kawawinga wose ng'hondolo, ng'ombe, na vivija kazibidula meza za wanhu wakalile ovunja sente na kuzipwililisa sente zao.
2.16: Abaho kawalongela wose wakalile ochuuza njiwa, “Wasegeseni hano! Lekeni kuitenda ng'anda ya Tatangu kamba gulilo!”
2.17: Wanahina zake wakumbuka kamba Maandiko Gang'alile golonga, “Unogelwa wangu wa ng'anda yako ya kutambikila, osoma mgati mmwangu kamba moto.”
2.18: Wakulu wa Wayahudi wamuuza Yesu, “Vino unzonza gani onda utende kutulagusila gweye kuna udahi wa kutenda gano gose?”
2.19: Yesu kawedika, “Tuleni Ng'anda ino ya Imulungu, na niye noizenga kabili kwa siku ndatu.”
2.20: Wayahudi wamuuza, “Ng'anda ino ya Imulungu izengwa kwa miyaka malongo mane na sita. Vino, gweye koizenga kwa siku ndatu?”
2.21: Lakini Ng'anda ya Imulungu iyakalile yolonga Yesu ikala lukuli lwake.
2.22: Viyazilibuke kulawa kwa wafile, wanahina zake wakumbuka kamba Yesu kawalongela mbuli ayo, wanahina zake wagatogola Maandiko Gang'alile na gaja gayalongile Yesu. Yesu kojuwa magesa ga wanhu
2.23: Yesu viyakalile kudibuga da Yelusalemu kuna inyimwilinyimwili ya Pasaka, wanhu wengi wamtogola viwonile mbuli nyingi za unzonza ziyatendile.
2.24: Lakini Yesu kakala hawatamanila bule, kwavija kawajuwa wanhu wose.
2.25: Halondile munhu yoyose yamulongele mbuli za wanhu awo, kwavija heyo mwenyego kagajuwa gaja gakalile mmizoyo yao.

3.1: Kukala na kilongozi imoja wa Wayahudi twaga jake Nikodemo, kakala imoja mna ikibumbila cha Mafalisayo.
3.2: Siku dimoja ikilo kamcholela Yesu na kamulongela, “Labi, tojuwa gweye kwa mfundiza kutumigwa na Imulungu. Kwavija kuduhu munhu yodaha kutenda unzonza kamba viutenda gweye kamba Imulungu hali hamoja nayo.”
3.3: Yesu kamwidika, “Nokulongela ukweli, kuduhu munhu yodaha kuwona Undewa wa Imulungu bila kuleligwa mwanza wa kabili.”
3.4: Nikodemo kamuuza, “Vino munhu mkulu kodahaze kuleligwa mwanza wa kabili? Havidahika bule munhu mkulu kwingila mna iinda ya mamake na kuleligwa mwanza wa kabili!”
3.5: Yesu kamwidika, “Nokulongela ukweli, kuduhu munhu yodaha kwingila Muundewa wa Imulungu bila kuleligwa kwa mazi na kwa Loho Yang'alile.
3.6: Munhu koleligwa kwa lukuli na tatake na mamake, lakini koleligwa kiloho na Loho Yang'alile.
3.7: Sikuukanganye kwavija nokulongela molondigwa mweye mose muleligwe mwanza wa kabili.
3.8: Beho dobuma kokose kudilonda, kodihulika, lakini hudijuwa dolawa kwahi hebu dochola kwahi. Vivo viili kwa munhu yoyose yaleligwe na Loho Yang'alile.”
3.9: Nikodemo kauza, “Avo gano godahikaze?”
3.10: Yesu kamwidika, “Gweye kwa mfundiza mkulu wa Waizilaeli, huijuwile vilihi mbuli ino?
3.11: Nokulongela ukweli, tolonga kija tukijuwile tosimulila acho tuchonile, lakini haduhu munhu yoyose kumwenu yotogola usenga wetu.
3.12: Hamnhogola viniwalongeleni mbuli za mumuno mwiisi, vino monhogolaze nahawalongela mbuli za ako kuulanga?
3.13: Kuduhu munhu yoyose yacholile kuulanga ila Mwana wa Munhu, yezile kulawa kuko.”
3.14: Kamba Musa viyamwinule mdibiki nyoka wa shaba kuja kuluwala, vivo vonda yenuligwe Mwana wa Munhu,
3.15: avo munhu yoyose yonda yamtogole yawe na ugima wa milele.
3.16: Avo, Imulungu kawanogela wanhu wa mwiisi mbaka kamulava Mwanage yeli yaiyeka, ili munhu yoyose yonda yamtogole sikuyapotele lakini yawe na ugima wa milele.
3.17: Imulungu hamtumile mwanage yeze mwiisi yawataguse wanhu, lakini kamtuma yeze kuwakombola.
3.18: “Wanhu wose onda wamtogole Mwana honda watagusigwe bule, lakini wose omulema watagusigwa mwaka, kwavija hawamtogole Mwana yaiyeka yanogeligwe na Imulungu.
3.19: Vino vivo nhaguso vonda iwe, mulenge wiza mwiisi, lakini wanhu wanogelwa na ziza kubanza mulenge, kwavija gago gowosang'hana ganyolodoka.
3.20: Wanhu wose otenda gehile hawaulonda mulenge na haweza kumulenge, kwavija hawalonda gehile gao gowotenda goneke.
3.21: Lakini wanhu otenda ganogile okwiza kumulenge ili oneke osang'hana goyolonda Imulungu.” Yesu na Yohana Mbatizaji
3.22: Vigabitile gago, Yesu na wanahina zake wachola kuna iisi ya Yudea, kuko kakala nao siku ndodo na kabatiza wanhu.
3.23: Nayo Yohana kakala kobatiza ako Ainoni, siyo kutali ng'hani kulawa Salimu, kwavija hanhu aho kukala na mazi mengi. Wanhu wakala omcholela, na heyo kawabatiza.
3.24: Gano gose gatendigwa Yohana yang'hali hanagodekigwa mkifungo.
3.25: Wanahina wayagwe wa Yohana wasonga kuibamilila na Muyahudi mbuli ya jadi ya kunawa ili wamtambikile Imulungu.
3.26: Avo wamcholela Yohana na kumulongela, “Mfundiza, vino komkumbuka munhu ija yuukalile nayo mwambu wa kudilawila zuwa wa lwanda lwa Yolidani, ija yuulongile mbuli zake? Hambe sambi kobatiza na kila munhu komcholela heyo!”
3.27: Yohana kawedika, “Kuduhu munhu yodaha kuwa na kinhu chochose kamba Imulungu hamgwelele.
3.28: Mweye wenyego awo wasindila zangu kamba nonga, ‘Niye sili Kilisito Mkombola, lakini nhumigwa nimulongolele.’
3.29: Mtwanzi yosoligwa ni wa mbigalo yosola. Lakini mbwiga wa mbigalo yosola, yemile na kutegeleza, kodeng'helela yahahulika sauti ya mbigalo yosola. Vivo ili kumwangu, deng'ho jangu divika.
3.30: Heyo kolondigwa yawe mkulu na niye niwe mdodo.” Heyo yezile kulawa kuulanga
3.31: Heyo yolawa uchanha ni mkulu kubanza wose. Heyo yolawa mwiisi ni wa mwiisi na kolonga mbuli za mwiisi, lakini heyo yolawa kuulanga ni mkulu wa gose.
3.32: Heyo kolonga mbuli ziyone na zija ziyahulike, lakini kuduhu munhu yotogola mbuli zake.
3.33: Lakini munhu yoyose yozitogola mbuli zake kosindila kamba Imulungu kolonga ukweli.
3.34: Heyo yatumigwe na Imulungu kolonga mbuli za Imulungu, kwavija Imulungu kamgwaa ng'hani Loho wake Yang'alile.
3.35: Tata kamnogela Mwanage na keka kila kinhu mmakono gake.
3.36: Munhu yoyose yomtogola Mwana kana ugima wa milele, na munhu yoyose yomulema Mwana kabule ugima, lakini kosigala mwiinhaguso ya Imulungu.

4.1: Mafalisayo wahulika kamba Yesu kakala kopata na kobatiza wanahina wengi kubanza Yohana,
4.2: lakini ukweli Yesu hambatize munhu yoyose ila wanahina zake wao wabatize.
4.3: Yesu viyahulike avo, kasegela mwiisi ya Yudea na kubwela mwiisi ya Galilaya.
4.4: Mmwanza wake kalondigwa yabitile Samalia.
4.5: Kavika mwiisi ya Samalia kudibuga da Sikali, behi na mgunda wa Yakobo uyamgwelele mwanage yakemigwe Yusufu.
4.6: Hanhu aho kukala na sima da Yakobo. Yesu viyadonhile na mwanza mtali, kakala aho kudisima. Ikala imisi.
4.7: Mtwanzi wa kisamalia keza kudeha mazi. Yesu kamulongela, “Nigwelele mazi ning'we.”
4.8: Kipindi acho wanahina zake wakala wacholile kudibuga kugula chakuja.
4.9: Mtwanzi ayo kamwidika, “Gweye kwa Muyahudi na niye na Msamalia. Kodahaze kumhula mazi ga kung'wa?” Kwavija Wayahudi hawajaga hamoja na Wasamalia.
4.10: Yesu kamwidika, “Maza ujuwile choolava Imulungu, na maza ujuwile nani yokupula mazi ga kung'wa, wahampulile, nayo yahakugwelele mazi gogala ugima.”
4.11: Mtwanzi ayo kamulongela, “Go mkulu, gweye kwabule doo, na sima dino dingila ng'hani. Wahagapatile kwahi mazi gago gogala ugima?
4.12: Vino gweye kwa mkulu kubanza tata yetu Yakobo yatugwelele sima dino? Heyo mwenyego hamoja na wanage na fugo yake yose wang'wa mazi ga mdisima dino!”
4.13: Yesu kamwidika, “Wanhu wose ong'wa mazi gano okona ng'hilu kabili,
4.14: lakini munhu yoyose yong'wa mazi gonda nimgwelele, honda yone ng'hilu kabili. Mazi gonda nimgwelele niye gokuwa nzasa ya mazi gogala ugima wa milele mgati mmwake.”
4.15: Mtwanzi ayo kalonga, “Go mkulu, nigwee mazi gago ili sikuniwe na ng'hilu kabili, na ndeke kwiza hano kudeha mazi.”
4.16: Yesu kamulongela, “Genda kamkeme mkasano wako, na wize nayo.”
4.17: Mtwanzi ayo kamwidika, “Nabule mkasano.” Yesu kamulongela, “Kulonga goya kuduhu mkasano.
4.18: Kusoligwa na wakasano watano, na mbigalo yuukala nayo sambi siyo mkasano wako. Kunongela goya.”
4.19: Mtwanzi ayo kalonga, “Go mkulu, vinikona gweye kwa mtula ndagu.
4.20: Wahenga zetu wamtambikila Imulungu kulugongo luno, lakini mweye Wayahudi molonga Yelusalemu aho hanhu holondigwa tumtambikile Imulungu.”
4.21: Yesu kamulongela, “Mama, togola gano gonikulongela, kipindi chokwiza baho wanhu honda wamtambikile Tata kulugongo luno hebu ako Yelusalemu.
4.22: Mweye Wasamalia hamumjuwile goya ayo imumtambikila, lakini siye Wayahudi tumjuwa itumtambikila, kwavija ukombola olawa kwa Wayahudi.
4.23: Lakini kipindi chokwiza na sambi chabahano, aho awo otambikaga kweli, omtambikila Tata kwa loho na kweli, kwavija Tata kolonda wanhu omtambikila kamba vivo.
4.24: Imulungu ni Loho, avo wanhu omtambikila olondigwa wamtambikile kwa loho na kweli.”
4.25: Mtwanzi ayo kamulongela Yesu, “Nojuwa Mkombola kokwiza, yokemigwa Kilisito, yaheza kotulongela mbuli zose.”
4.26: Yesu kamwidika, “Iyo nene, inilonga na gweye.”
4.27: Kipindi acho wanahina zake Yesu wabwela, wakanganya ng'hani viwamvikile Yesu kolonga na mtwanzi ayo. Lakini kuduhu imoja wao yamuuzile mtwanzi ayo, “Kolonda choni?” hebu yamuuze Yesu, “Habali kolonga na mtwanzi ino?”
4.28: Abaho mtwanzi ayo kaleka nongo yake ya mazi, kabweleganya kudibuga na kuwalongela wanhu,
4.29: “Izoni mumulole munhu yanongele gaja gose ganhendile. Vino hadaha kuwa Kilisito Mkombola?”
4.30: Avo wanhu wasegela kudibuga na kumgendela Yesu.
4.31: Mna ikipindi kikija wanahina zake wamnanahiza Yesu, “Mfundiza, chonde, diya tanhu!”
4.32: Lakini Yesu kawedika, “Ninao ndiya mweye hamuijuwile.”
4.33: Avo wanahina wasonga kuiuza, “Vino hana munhu kamgalila chakuja?”
4.34: Yesu kawalongela, “Ujaji wangu, ni kutenda goyolonda ija yanhumile na kuimambukiza sang'hano iyanigwelele.
4.35: Mweye mulongaga vino, ‘Ing'hali miyezi mine tosonga kusenga.’ Lakini nowalongeleni, inuleni meso genu mulole mmigunda! Vihandigwe vikangala volondigwa visengigwe!
4.36: Msengaji kolihigwa, na kwika hamoja indiya kwa ugima wa milele. Avo muhandaji na msengaji wose wadeng'helele hamoja.
4.37: Ulonzi uno wa kweli, ‘Imoja kohanda iyagwe kosenga.’
4.38: Niwatuma mkasenge mumgunda kinhu kija hamkisang'hanile, wanhu wayagwe awo wasang'hane, na mweye momweda kwa sang'hano yao.”
4.39: Wasamalia wengi wa buga dija wamtogola Yesu kwa gaja gayalongile mtwanzi ayo, “Kanongela gose ganhendile.”
4.40: Avo Wasamalia viwamcholele Yesu, wampula yakale nao. Yesu kakala nao siku mbili.
4.41: Wanhu wengi watogola mbuli ya usenga wa Yesu.
4.42: Wamulongela mtwanzi ayo, “Sambi totogola, siyo mbuli ya gaja gaulongile gaiyeka, lakini siye wenyego tumuhulika, na tojuwa heyo ayo Mkombola wa wanhu wa mwiisi yose.” Yesu komuhonya mwana wa mkulu imoja
4.43: Vizibitile siku mbili, Yesu kachola isi ya Galilaya.
4.44: Kwavija Yesu mwenyego kalonga, “Mtula ndagu hapata nhogolwa mwiisi yake.”
4.45: Viyavikile mwiisi ya Galilaya, wanhu wengi wambokela, kwavija wakala wacholile kuna indiya ya Pasaka mwiisi ya Yelusalemu na wachona kila kinhu kiyatendile kipindi cha Pasaka.
4.46: Yesu kachola kabili kudibuga da Kana mwiisi ya Galilaya, aho hayagaluse mazi kuwa divai. Aho kukala na mkulu imoja yakalile na mbwanga wake mtamu kudibuga da Kapelinaumu.
4.47: Mkulu ayo viyahulike kamba Yesu keza kulawa mwiisi ya Yudea kwiza mwiisi ya Galilaya, kamcholela Yesu, kampula yachole kudibuga da Kapelinaumu yakamuhonye mbwanga wake, yakalile kolonda kufa.
4.48: Yesu kamulongela, “Kuduhu munhu yoyose hagati yenu yotogola mbaka yone unzonza na vilaguso.”
4.49: Mkulu ayo kamulongela, “Go mkulu, tuchole wose mwanangu yang'hali hanakufa.”
4.50: Yesu kamulongela, “Genda, mwanago kohona!” Munhu ayo katogola mbuli za Yesu, kachola.
4.51: Mnzila ya kuchola ukae kumwake kawating'hana wasang'hanaji zake wamulongela, “Mbwanga wako kahona!”
4.52: Kawauza mna ikipindi gani mwanage viyahonile, wamwidika, “Ikala jana saa saba imisi vivo homa viimulekile.”
4.53: Bahaja tata ayo kakumbuka ikala kipindi acho Yesu viyamulongele, “Mwanago kohona.” Avo heyo na wanhu wa mng'anda yake wamtogola Yesu.
4.54: Uno ukala unzonza wa kabili yautendile Yesu viyalawile isi ya Yudea kwiza isi ya Galilaya.

5.1: Vigabitile gano, Yesu kachola kudibuga da Yelusalemu kuna inyimwilinyimwili ya Wayahudi.
5.2: Ako Yelusalemu behi na mulango ukemigwe Mulango wa Ng'hondolo kukala na kolombo dikemigwe kwa Kiebulania Betisaza. Mumgwazo wa kolombo dijo kukala na vihelengo vitano.
5.3: Lunhu mkulu lwa wanhu olumwa lukala lutambalala mvihelengo vivo, wanhu wasuwameso, mbetembete na wanhu waholole. Wakala obetela mazi gatibuligwe,
5.4: kwavija kuna kipindi msenga wa kuulanga kezaga na kugatibula gaja gamazi geli kudikolombo, na mtamu yoyose yahalongola kwingila mazi gahamala kutibuligwa, kohona utamu wowose uyali nao.
5.5: Aho kukala na munhu imoja mtamu kwa miyaka malongo madatu na nane.
5.6: Yesu viyamone katambalala aho, kajuwa kamba munhu ayo kana utamu wa siku nyingi, avo Yesu kamuuza, “Kolonda kuhona?”
5.7: Mtamu ayo kamwidika, “Go mkulu. Kuduhu munhu wa kuningiza kudikolombo mazi gahatibuligwa. Kila vinigeza kwingila, munhu iyagwe konilongolela.”
5.8: Abaho Yesu kamulongela, “Winuke, papa mkeka wako, utembele.”
5.9: Bahaja munhu ayo kahona, kapapa mkeka wake, kasonga kutembela. Mbuli ino ilawilila mwiisiku ya Kubwihila,
5.10: avo wakulu wa Wayahudi wamulongela munhu ija yahonyigwe, “Lelo ni siku ya Kubwihila, Malagizo getu gogomesa gweye sikuupape mkeka wako.”
5.11: Munhu ayo yahonyigwe kawedika, “Munhu heyo yanihonyile kanilongela nipape mkeka wangu nigende.”
5.12: Wamuuza, “Munhu gani heyo yakulongele utende vivo?”
5.13: Lakini munhu ayo yahonyigwe kakala hamjuwile Yesu viyali, kwavija hanhu aho kukala na lunhu, na Yesu kakala yasegele.
5.14: Abaho, Yesu kamvika munhu ayo yamuhonyile Mwiing'anda ya Imulungu. Kamulongela, “Tegeleza, gweye sambi kuhona. Sikuutende nzambi kabili, ili sikugakupate gehile kubanza gano.”
5.15: Abaho munhu ayo kasegela, kachola kwa iwakulu wa Wayahudi, kawalongela, “Yesu ayo yanihonyile.”
5.16: Abaho Wayahudi wasonga kumwihila Yesu kwavija kamuhonya munhu siku ya Kubwihila.
5.17: Yesu kawedika, “Tatangu kosang'hana siku zose, na niye vivija nosang'hana.”
5.18: Ulonzi uno uwatenda wakulu wa Wayahudi wazahile nzila kwa nguvu zose wadahe kumkoma Yesu. Watenda avo siyo kwavija kabena lagizo da siku ya Kubwihila diiyeka, lakini vivija kamkema Imulungu Tatake, avo kaitenda kamba kaigala na Imulungu. Udahi wa Mwana wa Imulungu
5.19: Yesu kawedika, “Nowalongeleni ukweli, Mwana hatenda mbuli yoyose heyo mwenyego, kotenda gaja goyomona Tatake kotenda. Gaja goyotenda Tata, Mwana nayo kotenda.
5.20: Avo Tata komnogela Mwanage na komulagusila gaja gose goyotenda mwenyego. Komulagusila mbuli ng'hulu ng'hani kubanza zino, na mweye mose mokanganya.
5.21: Kamba vija Tata viyowazilibula wanhu wafile na kuwagwaa ugima, vivo ili kwa Mwana nayo kowagwaa ugima waja wose yawalondile.
5.22: Tata hamtagusa munhu yoyose. Kamgwelela Mwanage udahi wose wa kutagusa,
5.23: avo wanhu wose wamtegeleze Mwana, kamba vija viwomtegeleza Tata. Munhu yoyose yolema kumtegeleza Mwana kolema kumtegeleza Tata yamtumile.”
5.24: “Nowalongeleni ukweli, wanhu wose ozihulika mbuli zangu na kumtogola heyo yanhumile wanao ugima wa milele. Awo honda watagusigwe bule, kwavija wamala kubita mkufa kwiza muugima.
5.25: Nowalongeleni ukweli, kipindi chokwiza tena kipindi kimala kwiza, baho waja wafile oihulika sauti ya Mwana wa Imulungu, na waja oihulika okuwa wagima.
5.26: Kamba Tata mwenyego viyali chanduso cha ugima, vivo ili kwa Mwanage, kamtenda yawe chanduso cha ugima.
5.27: Kamgwelela Mwana udahi wa kutagusa, kwavija heyo ayo Mwana wa Munhu.
5.28: Sikumuikanganye mbuli ino, kipindi chokwiza baho waja wose wafile oihulika sauti yake
5.29: na olawa mna gamapanga gao. Waja wose watendile ganogile ozilibuka na kupata ugima, na waja watendile gehile ozilibuka ili watagusigwe.” Ukweli mbuli ya Yesu
5.30: “Niye mwenyego sitenda mbuli yoyose kwa udahi wangu, lakini notagusa kamba Imulungu viyonongela, avo notagusa goya, kwavija sitenda kija kinonda, lakini kija kiyolonda heyo yanhumile.”
5.31: “Nahalonga mbuli zangu mwenyego, ulonzi wangu okuwa wa uvizi.
5.32: Lakini kabaho imoja yosindila mbuli ya niye, na niye nojuwa gaja goyolonga gaukweli.
5.33: Mweye mutuma wasenga kwa Yohana, na mbuli ziyalongile mbuli yangu ni za ukweli.
5.34: Siulonda usindila wa munhu, lakini nonga vino ili mukomboligwe.
5.35: Yohana kakala kamba kiwenge kikwaka yangaduu, na mweye muudeng'helela mulenge wake kwa kipindi kidodo.
5.36: Lakini niye mwenyego ninao usindila mkulu kubanza wa Yohana, kija kinhenda acho kiyanigwelele Tatangu nikitende, gano gose golagusa kamba Tata ayo yanhumile.
5.37: Tata mwenyego yanhumile, vivija kosindila mbuli ya niye. Mweye hamunaihulika sauti yake hebu kuchona kihanga chake,
5.38: na mweye muilema mbuli yake kwavija hamumtogole ija iyamtumile.
5.39: Mogasoma Maandiko Gang'alile kwavija mogesa kulawa mumo moupata ugima wa milele. Na kuno Maandiko gago gago gandika mbuli zangu!
5.40: Lakini hamulonda kwiza kumwangu mupate ugima.
5.42: Lakini niye niwajuwa. Nojuwa mna imizoyo yenu hamumnogela Imulungu.
5.43: Niza kwa twaga da Tatangu, lakini hamunibokele, ila munhu iyagwe yaheza kwa twaga jake mwenyego, mombokela.
5.44: Munogelwa kubokela nhogolwa kulawa mweye kwa mweye, lakini hamulonda kupata nhogolwa kulawa kwa heyo yeli Imulungu yaiyeka, vino modahaze kunhogola niye?
5.45: Sikumugese nowalongeleza kwa Tatangu, lakini Musa, yumumtamanila ayo yonda yawalongeleze.
5.46: Kamba kweli mumtogola Musa, mwahanhogole na niye, kwavija Musa kandika mbuli zangu.
5.47: Kamba hamgatogole gaja gayandike Musa, modahaze kutogola gano gonilonga?”

6.1: Abaho, Yesu kaloka mwambu wa lamba da Galilaya, vivija dokemigwa Lamba da Tibelia.
6.2: Lunhu mkulu lumkweleleza, kwavija luwona unzonza wake wa kuhonya watamu.
6.3: Yesu kakwela mbaka uchanha kukigongo kakala hasi na wanahina zake.
6.4: Kipindi cha nyimwilinyimwili ya Wayahudi ikemigwe Pasaka kikala behi.
6.5: Yesu viyalolile kaluwona lunhu mkulu lomwizila, avo kamuuza Filipo, “Tukagule kwahi vinhu vingi va kuja ili wanhu wano wose waje?”
6.6: Yesu kalonga vino kumgeza Filipo kwavija kakala yajuwile kinhu gani chonda yatende.
6.7: Filipo kamwidika, “Sente magana mabili hazidaha kugula magate kwa wanhu wose wano!”
6.8: Imoja wa wanahina zake Yesu yakemigwe Andeleya, ndugu yake Simoni Petulo, kalonga,
6.9: “Kabahano mbwanga kana magate matano ga ngano na somba wabili, lakini sikinhu chochose kwa lunhu lulihano.”
6.10: Yesu kawalongela wanahina zake, “Walongeleni wanhu wakale hasi.” Kwavija hanhu aho hakala na mijani, wanhu wose wakala hasi. Kukala na wambigalo kamba elufu tano.
6.11: Yesu kasola gaja gamagate, kamgwaa nhogolwa Imulungu, kawagolela wanhu wose wakalile aho. Katenda vivo kwa waja iwasomba, kila munhu kapata viyalondile.
6.12: Viwamambukize kuja, Yesu kawalongela wanahina zake, “Dondoleni vihande visigale. Sikumuleke hata kimoja.”
6.13: Avo wanahina wadondola na kumemeza vigelo longo na vibili kulawa kuna gamagate matano gawadile wanhu.
6.14: Viwauwonile unzonza uno yautendile Yesu, wanhu walonga, “Kweli ino ayo mtula ndagu wa Imulungu yalondeke kwiza mwiisi!”
6.15: Yesu kajuwa kamba walonda kumgoga kwa nguvu na kumtenda mndewa wao, avo kabweleganya kuvigongo yaiyeka. Yesu kotembela uchanha mgamazi (Matayo 14:22-23; Maluko 6:45-52)
6.16: Viivikile ichungulo, wanahina wa Yesu wahumuluka kudilamba,
6.17: wakwela mwiingalawa, na kubwela umwambu wa lamba mwambu wa Kapelinaumu. Ikilo ivika lakini Yesu kakala yang'hali hanachola kumwao.
6.18: Beho kulu dibuma na kugatibula gamazi.
6.19: Wanahina zake viwacholile utali wa kilometa tano mbaka sita, wamona Yesu kotembela uchanha mgamazi, kokwiza mwambu wao kuili ngalawa, wadumba ng'hani.
6.21: Wanahina zake walonda kumsola Yesu mwiingalawa, bahaja wavika mwiisi kuwakalile ochola. Wanhu omzahila Yesu
6.22: Imitondo iyagwe lunhu mkulu lukala lukalile mwambu uyagwe wa lamba ona aho hakala na ngalawa imoja iiyeka. Wao wajuwa kamba Yesu hacholile hamoja na wanahina zake, lakini wasegela waiyeka.
6.23: Ngalawa ziyagwe zilawile Tibelia zivika mbaka behi na hanhu hawadile magate Mndewa viyamambukize kumgwaa nhogolwa Imulungu.
6.24: Wanhu viwajuwile Yesu kahaduhu hanhu aho, hebu wanahina zake, wakwela mzingalawa na kuchola Kapelinaumu, kumzahila. Yesu ayo ndiya ya ugima
6.25: Wanhu viwamvikile Yesu umwambu uyagwe wa lamba, wamuuza, “Mfundiza, vino hano kwiza lini?”
6.26: Yesu kawedika, “Nowalongeleni ukweli, monizahila niye kwavija muja magate mwiguta, siyo kwavija mona unzonza wangu.
6.27: Sikumuisang'hanile ndiya inangika, lakini muisang'hanile ndiya igala ugima wa milele. Ino ayo ndiya yonda yawagwee Mwana wa Munhu, kwavija Imulungu Tata kamsagula.”
6.28: Avo wamuuza, “Vino kinhu gani tutende tudahe kugatenda goyolonda Imulungu?”
6.29: Yesu kawedika, “Kinhu choolonda Imulungu mweye mutende, mumtogole ija yamtumile.”
6.30: Wamwidika, “Vino unzonza gani onda utende ili tuwone na kukutogola? Choni chonda utende?
6.31: Wahenga zetu waja ndiya ikemigwa Mana ako kuluwala, kamba Maandiko Gang'alile vigalonga, ‘Kawagwelela ndiya ihumuluke kuulanga.’ ”
6.32: Yesu kawalongela, “Nowalongeleni ukweli, siyo Musa yawagwelele ndiya ya kuulanga, lakini Tatangu ayo yowagwaa ndiya ya ukweli kulawa kuulanga.
6.33: Ndiya iyowagwaa Imulungu ayo heyo yezile hasi kulawa kuulanga na kowagwaa ugima wanhu wa mwiisi.”
6.34: Wamulongela, “Go mkulu, tugwee ndiya ayo siku zose.”
6.35: Yesu kawalongela, “Niye ayo ndiya igala ugima. Wose onda weze kumwangu honda one nzala, na waja wose onhogola honda one ng'hilu.
6.37: Wose iwonigwelela Tatangu okwiza kumwangu. Na niye simwasa kunze munhu yoyose yokwiza kumwangu,
6.38: kwavija sizile hasi kulawa kuulanga kutenda gaja gonilonda lakini goyolonda Tata yanhumile.
6.39: Gano gago goyolonda ija yanhumile sikunimwagize hata imoja mna iwaja wose yangwelele, lakini nolondigwa niwazilibule wose na kuwagwaa ugima siku ya kimambukizo.
6.40: Kwavija kiyolonda Tatangu acho kino, kila munhu yomulola Mwana na kumtogola heyo yawe na ugima wa milele. Na niye nomzilibula munhu ayo mna isiku ya uhelelo.”
6.41: Avo, Wayahudi wasonga kumnung'unikila Yesu kwavija kalonga, “Niye ayo ndiya ihumuluke kuulanga.”
6.42: Avo walonga, “Vino ino siyo Yesu mwanage Yusufu? Tumjuwa tatake na mamake. Yokuwaze kabili kolonga kahumuluka kuulanga?”
6.44: Kuduhu munhu yodaha kwiza kumwangu bila kugaligwa na Tata yanhumile, na niye nomzilibula munhu ayo mna isiku ya uhelelo.
6.45: Watula ndagu wa Imulungu wandika, ‘Kila munhu kofundizigwa na Imulungu.’ Munhu yoyose yomtegeleza Tata na kuifunza kumwake kokwiza kumwangu.
6.46: Kuduhu munhu yoyose yamonile Tata, heyo yalawile kwa Imulungu ayo heyo yaiyeka yamonile Tata.
6.47: Nowalongeleni ukweli, heyo yotogola kanao ugima wa milele.
6.49: Wahenga zenu waja ndiya ikemgwa Mana ako kuluwala, lakini wafa.
6.50: Lakini munhu yoyose yoija ndiya ihumuluke kuulanga honda yafe bule.
6.51: Niye ayo ndiya igala ugima ihumuluke kuulanga. Munhu yoyose yoija ndiya ino, kokuwa mgima siku zose. Ndiya yonda nimgwee munhu ayo awo lukuli lwangu, awo uniwagwelela wanhu wa mwiisi ili wawe wagima.”
6.52: Mbuli ino iwatenda Wayahudi waibamilile. Waiuza, “Vino munhu ino kodahaze kutugwaa lukuli lwake tuluje?”
6.53: Yesu kawalongela, “Nowalongeleni ukweli, kamba hamuluja lukuli lwa Mwana wa Munhu na kuing'wa damu yake, honda muwe na ugima mgati mmwenu.
6.54: Munhu yoluja lukuli lwangu na kuing'wa damu yangu kanao ugima wa milele, na niye nomzilibula mna isiku ya uhelelo.
6.55: Kwavija lukuli lwangu ayo ndiya ya kweli, na damu yangu acho king'waji cha kweli.
6.56: Wanhu oluja lukuli lwangu na kuing'wa damu yangu okala mgati mmwangu, na niye nokala mgati mmwao.
6.57: Tata yeli mgima yanhumile, na kwa mbuli yake niye vivija mgima. Vivo vonda iwe munhu yoyose yoluja lukuli lwangu kokuwa mgima mbuli ya niye.
6.58: Ino ayo ndiya ihumuluke kuulanga, haiigalile na ndiga ija iwadile wahenga zenu, abaho wafa. Lakini yoyose yoija ndiya ino kokuwa mgima siku zose.”
6.59: Yesu kalonga mbuli zino viyakalile kofundiza mna ing'anda ya kumpula Imulungu ako Kapelinaumu. Mbuli zigala ugima wa milele
6.60: Wanhu zake wengi wamkweleleze waihulika mbuli ino na kulonga, “Mafundizo gano madala ng'hani. Nani yodaha kugatogola?”
6.61: Bila kulongeligwa, Yesu kajuwa kamba wanhu zake wamkweleleze wakala oinung'unikila mbuli ino, avo kawalongela, “Vino mbuli ino yolonda kuwatenda mulemelwe?
6.62: Vino yokuwaze, mwahamona Mwana wa Munhu kobwela uchanha kuja kuyakalile ichanduso?
6.63: Loho wa Imulungu ayo yomgwaa munhu ugima, nguvu za munhu hazidaha kinhu chochose. Mbuli ziniwalongeleni ni za Loho wa Imulungu na zogala ugima.
6.64: Lakini wayagwe wenu hawatogola.” Yesu kawajuwa toka mwaka waja hawamtogola na kamjuwa ija yonda yamuhinduke.
6.65: Abaho kalonga, “Lekaavo niwalongeleni kuduhu munhu yodaha kwiza kumwangu bila Tata kutenda idahike kwa munhu ayo kutenda vivo.”
6.66: Kwa ulonzi uno, wanhu wengi wamkweleleze wabweleganya kuchugu na hawadahile kabili kuchola na heyo.
6.67: Avo Yesu kawauza wanahina zake longo na wabili, “Na mweye vivija molonda kusegela?”
6.68: Simoni Petulo kamwidika, “Mndewa, siye tuchole kwa nani? Gweye kunazo mbuli zigala ugima wa milele.
6.69: Sambi siye totogola na tojuwa kamba gweye ayo Yang'alile ija yalawile kwa Imulungu.”
6.70: Yesu kedika, “Vino siwasagule mweye longo na wabili? Lakini imoja wenu Mwenembago!”
6.71: Yesu kakala yolonga mbuli ya Yuda, mwanage Simoni Isikaliote. Yuda kakala imoja wa wanahina longo na wabili, ayo yonda yamuhinduke Yesu.

7.1: Vigabitile gano, Yesu kachola mwiisi ya Galilaya, halondile kuchola isi ya Yudea kwavija wakulu wa Wayahudi wakala olonda kumkoma.
7.2: Siku ya nyimwilinyimwili ya Wayahudi ya viheha ikala behi,
7.3: avo ndugu zake Yesu wamulongela, “Segela hanhu hano uchole isi ya Yudea, ili wanhu zako okukweleleza wazone mbuli ziutenda.
7.4: Kuduhu munhu yofisa kija kiyotenda kamba yahalonda wanhu wamjuwe goya. Kwavija gweye kotenda mbuli zino, leka wanhu wose wa mwiisi wakujuwe.”
7.5: Yesu hatogoligwe hata na ndugu zake.
7.6: Yesu kawalongela, “Kipindi changu niye hakinavika. Lakini kipindi chochose kinoga kumwenu.
7.7: Wanhu wa mwiisi hawawehila mweye, lakini onihila niye, kwavija siku zose nowalongela gaja goyotenda ganyolodoka.
7.8: Mweye choleni kuna inyimwilinyimwili. Niye sichola bule, kwavija kipindi changu hakinavika.”
7.9: Yesu kalonga vino, abaho kagendelela kukala mwiisi ya Galilaya. Yesu kuna inyimwilinyimwili ya viheha
7.10: Ndugu zake Yesu viwacholile kuna inyimwilinyimwili, Yesu nayo kachola. Hacholile kunze kunze lakini kachola kinyelegezi.
7.11: Wakulu wa Wayahudi wakala omzahila Yesu hana inyimwilinyimwili. Walonga, “Munhu ija kakwahi?”
7.12: Hakala na minong'ono hana ulunhu mbuli ya Yesu. Wanhu wayagwe walonga, “Kanoga,” lakini wayagwe walonga, “Bule, kokwagiza wanhu.”
7.13: Lakini kuduhu munhu yokala yolonga mbuli ya Yesu chaka chaka, kwavija wakala owadumba wakulu wa Wayahudi.
7.14: Nyimwilinyimwili viikalile hagatigati, Yesu kengila Mng'anda ya Imulungu kasonga kufundiza.
7.15: Wakulu wa Wayahudi wakanganya ng'hani na kulonga, “Yokuwaze munhu ino kojuwa vinhu vingi na kuno haifunzile kokose?”
7.16: Yesu kawedika, “Mafundizo gano gonifundiza siyo gangu, lakini golawa kwa Imulungu yanhumile.
7.17: Munhu yoyose yolonda kutenda goyolonda Imulungu kojuwa gano gonifundiza golawa kwa Imulungu hebu nolonga gaja gonilonda.
7.18: Munhu ija yolonga mbuli zake kozahila nhogolwa yake mwenyego. Lakini heyo yozahila nhogolwa kumwake ija yamtumile munhu ayo mkweli, mduhu uvizi mmulomo mmwake.
7.19: Vino Musa hawagwelele Malagizo? Lakini kuduhu hata munhu imoja yogagoga. Vino habali molonda kung'homa?”
7.20: Lunhu lwa wanhu lumwidika, “Gweye kuna kinyamkela. Nani yolonda kukukoma?”
7.21: Yesu kawedika, “Nhenda unzonza umoja, mweye mose mukanganya.
7.22: Musa kawalagiza muwengize kumbi wanenu hamoja siyo Musa lakini wahenga zenu awo wasongile, na mweye momwingiza kumbi mwana mna isiku ya Kubwihila.
7.23: Kamba mwana kokwingizigwa kumbi mna isiku ya Kubwihila ili sikumubene Malagizo ga Musa, habali monigevuzikila kwavija nimuhonya munhu mna isiku ya Kubwihila?
7.24: Lekeni kutagusa kwa meso, lakini mutaguse kwa ukweli.” Ayuno iyo Kilisito Mkombola?
7.25: Wanhu wayagwe wa Yelusalemu walonga, “Vino ino siyo munhu ija iwakulu olonda kumkoma?
7.26: Loleni! Kolonga kunze kunze na hawamulongela mbuli yoyose! Vino iwakulu wamjuwa ayo Kilisito Mkombola?
7.27: Lakini Kilisito Mkombola yaheza, kuduhu munhu yonda yajuwe kolawa kwahi, lakini siye tukujuwa koolawa munhu ino.”
7.28: Yesu viyakalile kofundiza Mng'anda ya Imulungu, kalonga kwa sauti ng'hulu, “Vino mweye munjuwa goya niye na mukujuwa kuja kundawa? Sizile kwa udahi wangu mwenyego, heyo yanhumile, ni mkweli. Mweye hamumjuwile,
7.29: lakini niye nimjuwa, kwavija nolawa kumwake, nayo kanhuma.”
7.30: Abaho walonda kumgoga, lakini kuduhu hata munhu imoja yamgolosele mkono, kwavija saa yake ikala hainavika.
7.31: Lakini wanhu wengi hana ulunhu wamtogola na kulonga, “Vino Kilisito Mkombola yaheza, kotenda unzonza mkulu kubanza yautendile munhu ino?” Wakalizi watumigwa kumgoga Yesu
7.32: Mafalisayo waluhulika lunhu lonyong'onya mbuli ya Yesu, avo wao na iwakulu wa walava nhosa wawatuma wakalizi wamgoge.
7.33: Yesu kalonga, “Nokala na mweye kipindi kidodo, na abaho nochola kumwake ija yanhumile.
7.34: Monizahila, lakini honda munyone, kwavija hamudaha kwiza hanhu hanili.”
7.35: Wakulu wa Wayahudi wailongela, “Vino munhu ino kochola kwahi mbaka sikutumone? Vino kochola kuna gamabuga ga Wagiliki kuko kookala wanhu zetu na kuwafundiza Wagiliki?
7.36: Vino kofambula choni viyolonga, tomzahila lakini honda tumone, na hatudaha kuchola kuko konda yawe?” Vizanda va mazi ga ugima
7.37: Mna isiku ya uhelelo na siku ng'hulu ya inyimwilinyimwili, Yesu kema kakemelela, “Munhu yoyose yokona ng'hilu yeze kumwangu yang'we.
7.38: Kamba Maandiko Gang'alile vigalonga, ‘Munhu yonhogola niye, vizanda va mazi gogala ugima vokilima muumoyo wake.’ ”
7.39: Yesu kalonga vino mbuli ya Loho Yang'alile, ija wanhu wose omtogola ombokela. Kipindi acho Loho Yang'alile kakala yang'hali hanakwiza, kwavija Yesu kakala hanakwinuligwa muukulu. Kuigola kwa wanhu
7.40: Wanhu wayagwe mna ulunhu wamuhulika viyalongile avo na walonga, “Kweli munhu ino mtula ndagu wa Imulungu!”
7.41: Wanhu wayagwe walonga, “Heyo ayo Kilisito Mkombola!” Lakini wayagwe walonga, “Kilisito Mkombola hadaha kulawa mwiisi ya Galilaya!
7.42: Maandiko Gang'alile golonga kamba Kilisito Mkombola kolawa mulukolo lwa Daudi na kovumbukila Beselehemu kudibuga diyakalile Daudi.”
7.43: Avo lunhu luigola mbuli ya Yesu.
7.44: Wanhu wayagwe walonda kumgoga Yesu, lakini kuduhu hata munhu imoja yamgolosele mkono. Kuleka kutogola kwa wakulu wa Wayahudi
7.45: Wakalizi viwabwelile, wakulu wa walava nhosa na Mafalisayo wawauza, “Habali hamumgalile?”
7.46: Wakalizi wawedika, “Kuduhu munhu yolonga kamba munhu ayo!”
7.47: Mafalisayo wawauza, “Vino na mweye vivija muviziligwa?”
7.49: Lunhu luno halugajuwile Malagizo ga Musa, avo waduwiligwa na Imulungu!”
7.50: Nikodemo kakala imoja wa Mafalisayo wakalile aho, ayo yacholile kumulola Yesu ichanduso. Kawalongela wayage,
7.51: “Vino Malagizo getu godaha kumtagusa munhu yoyose bila tanhu kumuhulika na kukijuwa kija kiyatendile?”
7.52: Wamwidika, “Vino na gweye vivija kolawa mwiisi ya Galilaya? Gasome Maandiko Gang'alile na koifunza, kuduhu mtula ndagu wa Imulungu yalawile mwiisi ya Galilaya.”
7.53: Abaho kila munhu kachola ukae kumwake.

8.1: Yesu kachola kuna Ulugongo lwa Mizeituni.
8.2: Imitootondo ng'hani Yesu kabwela kuna Ing'anda ya Imulungu. Wanhu wose wamzunguluka, nayo kakala hasi kasonga kuwafundiza.
8.3: Wafundiza Malagizo ga Musa na Mafalisayo wamgala mtwanzi yagogigwe ugoni, wamwika haulongozi wa wanhu wose.
8.4: Wamulongela Yesu, “Mfundiza, mtwanzi ino kagogigwa ugoni.
8.5: Muna Gamalagizo getu Musa katulagiza kamba mtwanzi kamba ino yatoigwe mabwe mbaka yafe. Lelo gweye kolongaze?”
8.6: Walonga vino ili wamgoge Yesu kwa mbuli zake, ili wapate kumtagusa. Lakini Yesu kainama kandika hasi kwa kidole chake.
8.7: Viwagendelele kwima aho kuno omuuza, Yesu kenuka kawalongela, “Munhu yoyose hatendile nzambi yasonge kumpigisila dibwe.”
8.8: Abaho Yesu kainama kabili kandika hasi.
8.9: Viwahulike avo, wose wasegela imoja imoja, wasonga iwavele. Yesu kalekigwa yaiyeka, na mtwanzi ija yang'hali yemile aho.
8.10: Yesu kenuka na kumulongela mtwanzi ija, “Wa kwahi wanhu waja? Kuduhu munhu yoyose yakutaguse?”
8.11: Mtwanzi ija kalonga, “Go mkulu, kahaduhu.” Yesu kalonga, “Vinoga. Na niye vivija sikutagusa. Genda lakini sikuutende nzambi kabili.” Yesu yuyo mulenge wa isi
8.12: Yesu kawalongela Mafalisayo kabili, “Niye ayo mulenge wa isi. Munhu yoyose yonikweleleza kokuwa na mulenge wa ugima na honda yagende mdiziza bule.”
8.13: Mafalisayo wamulongela, “Gweye koisindila mwenyego, avo gago goulonga hagatogoligwa kamba kweli.”
8.14: Yesu kawedika, “Aka, hata kamba nahaisindila mwenyego, gaja gonilonga gaukweli kwavija nikujuwa kundawile na kuja kunichola. Mweye hamukujuwile kuja kundawile hebu kuja kunichola.
8.15: Mweye motagusa kwa nzila zoyotagusa wanhu, niye simtagusa munhu yoyose.
8.16: Lakini hata nahatagusa, notagusa goya kwavija sili niiyeka bule, niye na hamoja na Tata yanhumile.
8.17: Yandikigwa mna Gamalagizo genu kamba usindila wa wanhu wabili wahailumba, gaja gowolonga gaukweli.
8.18: Niye noisindila mwenyego, na Tata yanhumile vivija konisindila.”
8.19: Wamuuza, “Tatako kakwahi?” Yesu kawedika, “Hamnijuwile niye hebu Tatangu. Maza munijuwile niye, vivija mwahamjuwile Tatangu.”
8.20: Yesu kalonga gano gose viyakalile kofundiza Mng'anda ya Imulungu, mdigati hakikigwe kiya cha kulavila sadaka. Kuduhu munhu yamgogile, kwavija saa yake ikala hainavika. Hamudaha kuchola kuja kunyhola
8.21: Yesu kawalongela kabili, “Niye nosegela, mweye monizahila, lakini mofa na nzambi zenu. Hamudaha kuchola kuja kunyhola.”
8.22: Avo wakulu wa Wayahudi wauza, “Kolonga hatudaha kuchola hanhu kuyochola. Vino kolonda kuikoma mwenyego?”
8.23: Yesu kawedika, “Mweye mwa wanhu wa mwiisi ino, lakini niye nolawa kuulanga. Mweye molawa mumuno mwiisi, lakini niye silawa mwiisi bule.
8.24: Lekaavo niwalongeleni mofa na nzambi zenu. Mofa na nzambi zenu kamba hamulonda kutogola kamba ‘Nene iyo Nene.’ ”
8.25: Wamuuza, “Gweye kwa nani?” Yesu kawedika, “Niwalongeleni haichanduso.
8.26: Ninazo mbuli nyingi za kulonga kumwenu, nyingi za kuwatagusa. Hata ivo ija yanhumile ni mkweli, na niye nowalongela wanhu wa mwiisi kija kimhulike kumwake.”
8.27: Wakala hawajuwile kamba Yesu kakala kolonga mbuli ya Tata.
8.28: Avo kawalongela, “Mwahamwinula uchanha Mwana wa Munhu, mojuwa kamba, ‘Nene iyo Nene,’ abaho mojuwa kamba sitenda mbuli yoyose kwa udahi wangu, lakini nolonga kija kiyanilagize Tata nonge.
8.29: Na heyo yanhumile kahamoja na nene, handekile niiyeka bule kwavija siku zose notenda kija kimnogela.”
8.30: Wanhu wengi wamuhulike Yesu yolonga mbuli zino wamtogola. Yesu kowatenda mulekesigwe
8.31: Avo Yesu kawalongela Wayahudi waja wamtogole, “Kamba mwahatogola mafundizo gangu, mwa wanahina zangu kweli.
8.32: Avo moijuwa kweli, na kweli yowatenda mulekesigwe.”
8.33: Wamwidika, “Siye twa lukolo lwa Abulahamu na hatunakuwa watumwa wa munhu yoyose. Habali kotulongela ‘Tolekesigwa’?”
8.34: Yesu kawalongela, “Nowalongeleni ukweli, munhu yoyose yotenda nzambi mtumwa wa nzambi.
8.35: Mtumwa hali munhu wa lukolo siku zose, lakini mwana ayo munhu wa lukolo siku zose.
8.36: Kamba Mwana yahawalekesa, na mweye molekesigwa kweli.
8.37: Nojuwa mwa lukolo lwa Abulahamu. Lakini molonda kunikoma, kwavija hamgatogola mafundizo gangu.
8.38: Nowalongela kija kiyanilagusile Tatangu, lakini mweye motenda kija kimulongeligwe na tata yenu.”
8.39: Wamwidika, “Tata yetu Abulahamu.” Yesu kawedika, “Maza mukalile wana wa Abulahamu, mwahatendile mbuli zizija ziyatendile heyo.
8.40: Niwalongela ukweli umhulike kwa Imulungu, lakini molonda kunikoma. Abulahamu hatendile kamba vivo!
8.41: Motenda kiyatendile tata yenu.” Wamwidika, “Imulungu yaiyeka ayo Tata itwilinayo hatuli wana wa kuvikila, siye twa wanage too.”
8.42: Yesu kawalongela, “Maza Imulungu yakalile Tata yenu, mwahaninogele, kwavija niza kulawa kwa Imulungu na sambi nabahano. Sizile kwa udahi wangu mwenyego, lakini kanhuma.
8.43: Habali hamjuwa kinonga? Kwavija hamudaha kutegeleza usenga wangu.
8.44: Mweye mwa wana wa tataenu, Mwenembago, na mweye molonda kukweleleza kusulukila kwa tataenu. Kusongela mwaka kakala mkomaji na hemile muna ikweli, kwavija mduhu kweli mgati mmwake. Yahalonga uvizi, kolagusa viyali, kwavija heyo ni mvizi na tata wa uvizi.
8.45: Lakini nowalongeleni ukweli, lekaavo hamnitogola bule.
8.46: Nani imoja wenu yodaha kulagusa kamba nibananga? Kamba nolonga ukweli, habali hamunhogola?
8.47: Munhu wa Imulungu kotegeleza mbuli za Imulungu. Hata ivo, mweye hamuli wa Imulungu, lekaavo hamnitegeleza.” Yesu kakala kuko Abulahamu yang'hali hanavumbuka
8.48: Wayahudi wamuliga Yesu walonga, “Hatulongile goya kamba gweye kwa Msamalia na kuna kinyamkela?”
8.49: Yesu kawedika, “Nabule kinyamkela. Nomtegeleza Tatangu lakini mweye monibeza.
8.50: Sizahila nhogolwa yangu mwenyego. Lakini kabaho imoja yoizahila, heyo ayo yotagusa.
8.51: Nowalongeleni ukweli, munhu yoyose yotogola mafundizo gangu honda yafe bule.”
8.52: Avo, Wayahudi wamulongela, “Sambi tojuwa kamba gweye kuna kinyamkela! Abulahamu kafa, na watula ndagu wa Imulungu wafa, abaho gweye kolonga yoyose yotogola mafundizo gako honda yafe bule.
8.53: Vino gweye kwa mkulu kubanza tata yetu Abulahamu? Heyo kafa, na watula ndagu wa Imulungu vivija wafa. Kogesa gweye kwa nani?”
8.54: Yesu kawedika, “Nahaitogola mwenyego, nhogolwa ayo mduhu kinhu. Ija yonitogola niye ni Tatangu yumulonga Imulungu wenu.
8.55: Mweye hamumjuwile bule, lakini niye nimjuwa. Nahalonga simjuwile, nokuwa mvizi kamba mweye. Lakini nimjuwa, na nozigoga mbuli zake.
8.56: Tata yenu Abulahamu kadeng'helela viyachonile kipindi changu chakwiza, kachona na kadeng'helela.”
8.57: Wayahudi wamulongela Yesu, “Vino gweye hunapata hata miyaka malongo matano, kumonaze Abulahamu?”
8.58: Yesu kawedika, “Nowalongeleni ukweli, Abulahamu yang'hali hana vumbuka, niye nabaha.”
8.59: Abaho wadondola mabwe wampigisile, lakini Yesu kaifisa kalawanya Mng'anda ya Imulungu.

9.1: Yesu viyakalile kogenda, kamona munhu yavumbuke msuwameso.
9.2: Wanahina zake wamuuza, “Mfundiza, nzambi gani imtendile munhu ino yavumbuke msuwameso? Vino heyo ayo yaitendile nzambi ayo hebu tatake na mamake?”
9.3: Yesu kawedika, “Ino hailawilile kwavija heyo katenda nzambi hebu tatake na mamake watenda nzambi. Lakini kavumbuka msuwameso ili udahi wa Imulungu oneke kumwake.
9.4: Kwavija ing'hali imisi, tolondigwa tusang'hane sang'hano ya ija yanhumile. Ikilo yovika, baho kuduhu munhu yodaha kusang'hana.
9.5: Kipindi ning'hali mwiisi, niye na mulenge wa isi yose.”
9.6: Viyamambukize kulonga vino, Yesu katema mate hasi, kabuluga nhope kwa mate gaja, abaho kambaka mgameso munhu ija msuwameso.
9.7: Yesu kamulongela, “Genda kasunhe kihanga chako hana dilamba da Siloamu.” Siloamu fambulo jake “Yatumigwe.” Avo munhu ija kachola, kasunha kihanga chake, kabwela yolola.
9.8: Wanhu weli mmabehi nayo, na wanhu wamonile aho umwaka yopula, ing'hali hainalawilila mbuli ino, wauza, “Vino ino siyo munhu ija yakalile na kupula?”
9.9: Wanhu wayagwe walonga, “Iyo heyo,” lakini wayagwe walonga, “Aka, siyo heyo, kaigala nayo.” Avo munhu ija kalonga mwenyego, “Iyo niye.”
9.10: Wamuuza, “Vino kudahaze kulola?”
9.11: Kawedika, “Munhu yokemigwa Yesu katenda nhope, kanibaka mgameso gangu, kanilongela nigenda Siloamu nikasunhe kihanga changu. Avo nichola, na bahaja vinisunhile nidaha kulola.”
9.12: Wamuuza, “Munhu ayo kakwahi?” Kawedika, “Mmhane.” Mafalisayo ozahila munhu msuwameso kahonyigwa vilihi
9.13: Abaho wamgala kwa Mafalisayo munhu ayo yakalile msuwameso.
9.14: Yesu viyatendile nhope na kumuhonya munhu ayo yakalile msuwameso ikala siku ya Kubwihila.
9.15: Abaho Mafalisayo wamuuza kabili munhu ayo viyadahile kulola. Kawalongela, “Kanibaka nhope mgameso gangu, nisunha kihanga changu, na sambi nodaha kulola.”
9.16: Mafalisayo wayagwe walonga, “Munhu yatendile mbuli ino halawa kwa Imulungu bule, kwavija hadigoga lagizo da siku ya Kubwihila.” Lakini wayagwe walonga, “Vino munhu yotenda nzambi kodahaze kutenda unzonza kamba uno?” Avo, wakala waigolile.
9.17: Avo Mafalisayo wabwelela kumuuza munhu ayo, “Kulonga kakuhonya usuwameso wako. Gweye kolongaze mbuli ya munhu ayo?” Munhu ayo kawedika, “Mtula ndagu wa Imulungu.”
9.18: Hata ivo wakulu wa Wayahudi hawalondile kutogola kamba kakala msuwameso na sambi kodaha kulola. Avo wawakema tatake na mamake,
9.19: Wayahudi wawauza, “Vino ino ayo mwanenu? Yumulonga kavumbuka msuwameso, lelo kadahaze kulola?”
9.20: Tatake na mamake wawedika, “Tojuwa kamba heyo ayo mwanetu, na tojuwa kamba kavumbuka msuwameso.
9.21: Lakini hatujuwile sambi viyadahile kulola, wala hatumjuwile munhu yamuhonyile. Muuzeni mwenyego, heyo mkulu goya, kodaha kuwedika!”
9.22: Tatake na mamake walonga vino kwavija wakala owadumba wakulu wa Wayahudi, kwavija Wayahudi walonga munhu yoyose yolonga komtogola Yesu kamba ayo Kilisito Mkombola kowingigwa mng'anda ya kumpula Imulungu.
9.23: Lekaavo tatake na mamake walonga, “Heyo mkulu goya, muuzeni!”
9.24: Mwanza wa kabili wamkema munhu ija yavumbuke msuwameso, wamulongela, “Iduwile kwa Imulungu kamba kolonga ukweli! Tojuwa kamba munhu ino yakuhonyile kotenda nzambi.”
9.25: Munhu ayo kawedika, “Mmhane kamba munhu ayo kotenda nzambi hebu hatenda bule. Kinhu kimoja kinjuwile, ng'hala silola, sambi nolola.”
9.26: Wamuuza, “Vino kakutendela choni? Kakuhonyaze usuwameso wako?”
9.27: Kawedika, “Nimala kuwalongela, lakini hamulonda kutegeleza. Vino habali molonda kuihulika kabili? Hebu na mweye vivija molonda kuwa wanahina zake?”
9.28: Wamuliga na kumulongela, “Gweye kwa mwanahina wa munhu ayo! Siye twa wanahina wa Musa.
9.29: Tojuwa kamba Imulungu kalonga na Musa, lakini kwa munhu ayo, hatujuwile kolawa kwahi!”
9.30: Munhu ija kawedika, “Mweye monyazanya! Hamkujuwile kuyalawile, lakini kanitenda nidahe kulola!
9.31: Tojuwa kamba Imulungu hawategeleza wanhu otenda nzambi, lakini kowategeleza wanhu waja omtegeleza heyo na kusang'hana gaja goyolonda.
9.32: Tangu chanduso cha isi yose kuduhu munhu yahulike kamba munhu yoyose kamuhonya munhu yavumbuke msuwameso.
9.33: Maza munhu ino halawile kwa Imulungu, sambi yadahe kutenda mbuli ino.”
9.34: Wamwidika, “Gweye kuvumbuka na kukulila mzizambi abaho kolonda kutufunza siye?” Avo wamuwinga mna ing'anda ya kumpula Imulungu. Usuwameso wa loho
9.35: Yesu viyahulike kamba wamuwinga mng'anda ya kumpula Imulungu, kamona munhu ayo kamuuza, “Vino gweye komtogola Mwana wa Munhu?”
9.36: Munhu ayo kamwidika, “Go mkulu, nongela ayo nani, mhate kumtogola!”
9.37: Yesu kamulongela, “Kumona, ayo heyo yolonga na gweye sambi.”
9.38: Munhu ayo kalonga, “Notogola Mndewa.” Abaho kamfugamila Yesu.
9.39: Yesu kalonga, “Niza mwiisi ino kuwatagusa wanhu, avo waja hawalola walole na waja ogesa olola waleke kulola.”
9.40: Mafalisayo wayagwe wakalile hamoja na Yesu viwamuhulike kolonga avo, wamuuza, “Vino kolonga na siye vivija hatulola?”
9.41: Yesu kawedika, “Maza mkalile hamulola, sambi mutende nzambi. Lakini kwavija molonga molola, avo mung'hali motenda nzambi.”

10.1: Yesu kalonga, “Nowalongela ukweli, munhu yoyose yoleka kubitila hana ulwivi lwa ng'hondolo, lakini kokwela na kubitila nzila iyagwe, munhu ayo mbavi na mbokaji.
10.2: Munhu ija yobitila hana ulwivi ayo msusilaji wa ng'hondolo.
10.3: Mkalizi wa ulwivi komvugulila ulwivi, ng'hondolo okihulika kifengwa cha msusilaji viyowakema ng'hondolo zake kwa matwaga gao, kowalava kunze.
10.4: Yahawalava kunze kowalongolela, na ng'hondolo omkweleleza kwavija wakijuwa kifengwa chake.
10.5: Honda wamkweleleze munhu yoyose iyagwe, lakini omkimbila munhu ayo kwavija hawakijuwile kifengwa chake.”
10.6: Yesu kawalongela lusimo luno lakini hawajuwile fambulo jake. Yesu ayo msusilaji yanogile
10.7: Avo Yesu kalonga kabili, “Nowalongeleni ukweli, niye ayo lwivi lwa ng'hondolo.
10.8: Wose wayagwe wezile kuchugu kumwangu wabavi na wabokaji, lakini ng'hondolo hawawategeleze bule.
10.9: Niye ayo lwivi. Munhu yoyose yobitila kumwangu kokomboligwa, kokwingila na kulawa kuzahila chakuja.
10.10: Mbavi kokwiza ili yebe, yakome, na kunanga. Niye niza ili muwe na ugima, ugima umemile.
10.11: “Niye ayo msusilaji yanogile. Msusilaji yanogile koulava ugima wake mbuli ya ng'hondolo.
10.12: Munhu wa kulihigwa yeli siyo msusilaji na ng'hondolo haweli wake, yahamona mbwizi kokwiza, kowaleka ng'hondolo na kukimbila. Avo mbwizi kogoga imoja na wayagwe opwililika.
10.13: Munhu wa kulihigwa kokimbila kwavija heyo munhu wa kulihigwa kwiiyeka, na hawagesa bule iwang'hondolo.
10.14: Niye ayo msusilaji yanogile. Niwajuwa ng'hondolo zangu na hewo onijuwa niye,
10.15: kamba Tata viyonjuwa niye, na niye vinimjuwa Tata. Na niye nodaha kufa mbuli ya hewo.
10.16: Abaho ninao ng'hondolo wayagwe siyo wa mdizizi dino. Vivija nolondigwa niwagale, okihulika kifengwa changu, na hewo okuwa bumbila dimoja da msusilaji imoja.
10.17: “Tata koninogela kwavija noulava ugima wangu kwa kulonda mwenyego, ili nidahe kuubweza kabili.
10.18: Kuduhu munhu youlava ugima wangu. Niye noulava kwa kulonda mwenyego. Ninao udahi wa kuulava, na udahi wa kuubweza kabili. Vino vivo viyanilagize Tata nhende.”
10.19: Mbuli zino za Yesu ziwatenda Wayahudi waigole kabili.
10.20: Wanhu wengi wakala olonga, “Kana kinyamkela, vivija kana kibozi mbwelela! Habali mumtegeleza?”
10.21: Lakini wanhu wayagwe wakala olonga, “Munhu yeli na kinyamkela hadaha kulonga kamba vino! Vino kinyamkela kodahaze kuwahonya wasuwameso?” Yesu kolemigwa
10.22: Ako Yelusalemu kukala na nyimwilinyimwili ya kulavigwa kwa Ng'anda ya Imulungu kwa Imulungu. Kikala kipindi cha kihuhwe.
10.23: Yesu kakala kotembela mna uluhelengo lwa Sulemani hana Ing'anda ya Imulungu,
10.24: Wayahudi wamzunguluka, wamuuza, “Vino gweye kotugaza mbaka lini? Tulongele fulu ipile, gweye kwa Kilisito Mkombola?”
10.25: Yesu kawedika, “Nimala kuwalongeleni, lakini hamnhogola. Mbuli zinhenda kwa udahi wa Tatangu zonilagusa,
10.26: lakini honda mtogole, kwavija hamuli ng'hondolo zangu.
10.27: Ng'hondolo zangu oihulika sauti yangu, niye niwajuwa na wao ong'holeleza.
10.28: Nowagwaa ugima wa milele, na honda wafe bule. Kuduhu munhu yonda yawasole mmakono gangu.
10.29: Tatangu yanigwelele awo ayo mkulu kubanza wose, na kuduhu yodaha kuwasola mmakono ga Tata.
10.31: Abaho Wayahudi wadondola mabwe kabili wamtowe Yesu.
10.32: Yesu kawalongela, “Nhenda mbuli nyingi zinogile mgameso genu zija ziyanigwelele Tata nhende, kwa mbuli gani molonda kunhowa mabwe?”
10.33: Wayahudi wamwidika, “Hatulonda kukutowa na mabwe mbuli ya mbuli yoyose inogile, lakini mbuli ya ukuduzi wako! Gweye kwa munhu, lakini koitenda mwenyego kwa Imulungu!”
10.34: Yesu kawedika, “Vino hayandikigwe mna Ikitabu chenu cha malagizo kamba Imulungu kalonga, ‘Mweye mwa walungu?’
10.35: Imulungu kawakema ‘walungu’ wanhu waja wagweleligwe usenga wake, na siye tojuwa kamba Maandiko Gang'alile golonga ukweli siku zose.
10.36: Kamba viili kumwangu, Tata kanisagula na kanhuma mwiisi. Yokuwaze kabili mweye molonga nomkudula kwavija nonga niye na Mwana wa Imulungu?
10.37: Kamba sitenda gaja goyolonda Tatangu nhende, sikumunhogole.
10.38: Lakini kamba nogatenda, hata kamba hamnitogola niye, molondigwa mutogole gaja ganisang'hane, ili mujuwe kamba Tata kokala mgati mmwangu na niye nokala mgati mwa Tata.”
10.39: Bahaja walonda kumgoga Yesu, lakini kawalawa mmakono gao.
10.40: Abaho Yesu kabwela kabili mwambu wa lwanda lwa Yolidani mbaka aho haakalile Yohana yobatiza wanhu, kakala kuko.
10.41: Wanhu wengi wamcholela, walonga, “Yohana hatendile unzonza, lakini kila kinhu kiyalongile mbuli ya munhu ino cha ukweli.”
10.42: Wanhu wengi wa ako wamtogola Yesu.

11.1: Munhu yakemigwe Lazalo yakalile kudibuga da Betania kakala mtamu. Betania dijo buga diwakalile Malia na mkulu wake Mata.
11.2: Malia ino ayo yambakaze Mndewa mavuta gonung'hila goya mmagulu na kuhangusa kwa mvili zake. Lazalo lumbu jake ayo yakalile mtamu.
11.3: Avo lumbu zake Lazalo wamgalila Yesu usenga, “Mndewa, mbwigako yuumnogele mtamu.”
11.4: Yesu viyahulike avo, kalonga, “Utamu awo honda ugale ifa. Uno ulawilila kugala nhogolwa kwa Imulungu, na vivo vonda iwe kwa Mwana wa Munhu kobokela nhogolwa.”
11.5: Yesu kawanogela Mata na mdodo wake Malia na lumbu jao Lazalo.
11.6: Viyabokele usenga uno kamba Lazalo kakala mtamu, Yesu kongeza siku mbili kukala aho haakalile.
11.7: Abaho Yesu kawalongela wanahina zake, “Tubweleni Yudea.”
11.8: Wanahina wamwidika, “Mfundiza, sambi sambi Wayahudi wa aho walonda kukutowa mabwe, abaho kofunga mwanza ubwele kuko?”
11.9: Yesu kalonga, “Vino imisi yabule masaa longo na mabili? Avo wanhu ogenda imisi hawaikwala, kwavija owona mulenge wa mwiisi ino.
11.10: Lakini kamba wahagenda ikilo oikwala kwavija wabule mulenge.”
11.11: Yesu viyamambukize kulonga avo, kalonga, “Mbwigaetu Lazalo kawasa, lakini nochola kumulamusa.”
11.13: Yesu kakala yofambula kamba Lazalo kafa, lakini wanahina zake wagesa kakala yolonga kuwasa utulo.
11.14: Avo Yesu kawalongela fulu ipile, “Lazalo kafa,
11.15: lakini nodeng'helela mbuli yenu kwavija sikalile nayo ili mutogole. Leka tucholeni kumwake.”
11.16: Tomaso yakemigwe Pacha kawalongela wanahina wayage, “Tucholeni hiko hamoja na Mfundiza, tukafe nayo!” Yesu ayo uzilibuko na ugima
11.17: Yesu viyavikile ako, kaluvika lukuli lwa Lazalo lwa mdipanga siku nne.
11.18: Betania ikala utali wa kamba kilometa ndatu kulawa Yelusalemu,
11.19: Wayahudi wengi weza kuwalola Mata na Malia na kuwagoga makono mbuli ya ifa ya lumbu jao.
11.20: Mata viyahulike kamba Yesu kakala yokwiza, kalawa kunze kumbokela, lakini Malia kasigala mng'anda.
11.21: Mata kamulongela Yesu, “Mndewa, maza ukalile baha lumbu jangu sambi yafe bule!
11.22: Lakini hata sambi nojuwa kamba Imulungu kokugwaa kinhu chochose kiumpula.”
11.24: Mata kedika, “Nojuwa kamba kozilibuka mna isiku ya uhelelo.”
11.25: Yesu kamulongela, “Niye ayo uzilibuko na ugima. Wanhu wose onhogola okuwa wagima, hata wahafa,
11.26: na wanhu wose weli wagima na onhogola niye honda wafe bule. Kozitogola mbuli zino?”
11.27: Mata kedika, “Ona Mndewa, notogola kamba gweye ayo Kilisito Mkombola, Mwana wa Imulungu ija yezile mwiisi.” Yesu kolila
11.28: Mata viyalongile avo, kabweleganya mng'anda, kamkema mkulu wake Malia kinyelegezi. Kamulongela, “Mfundiza kabaha, kokukema gweye.”
11.29: Malia viyahulike avo, kenuka himahima kamcholela Yesu.
11.30: Yesu kakala yang'hali hanavika mkijiji, lakini kakala hanhu aho haamting'hane Mata.
11.31: Avo, Wayahudi wakalile mng'anda na Malia omgoga makono, wamkweleleza viwamone kenuka himahima na kuchola kunze. Wagesa kochola kudipanga kulila.
11.32: Malia kavika aho haakalile Yesu, bahaja viyamone, kamfugamila, kalonga, “Mndewa, maza ukalile baha, lumbu jangu sambi yafe bule!”
11.33: Yesu viyamone Malia kolila, na Wayahudi wakalile nayo olila vivija, kona usungu na kanyunyuwala muumoyo.
11.34: Yesu kawauza, “Mumzikila kwahi?” Wamwidika, “Mndewa izo ulole.”
11.37: Lakini wanhu wayagwe walonga, “Kamuhonya munhu msuwameso, hadahile vilihi kumtenda Lazalo sikuyafe?” Lazalo kozilibuka
11.38: Yesu viyakalile yang'hali konyunyuwala muumoyo, kachola kudipanga, dikalile mhango igubikigwe na dibwe.
11.39: Yesu kawalagiza, “Segeseni idibwe!” Mata, lumbu wa munhu ija yafile, kedika, “Mndewa, kwiza honung'ha bundo, kwavija kana siku nne toka yazikigwe!”
11.40: Yesu kamulongela, “Vino sikulongele bule wahatogola kouwona ukulu wa Imulungu?”
11.41: Wadikwesa hamgwazo idibwe, Yesu kalola uchanha kalonga, “Nokugwaa nhogolwa gweye Tata, kwavija konhegeleza.
11.42: Nojuwa kamba siku zose konhegeleza, lakini nolonga vino mbuli ya wanhu weli hano, ili watogole gweye kunhuma.”
11.43: Viyamambukize kulonga avo, kakemelela, “Lazalo, lawa kunze!”
11.44: Lazalo kalawa kunze kuno makono gake na magulu gake gazingilizigwa sitili, na leso mkihanga chake. Yesu kawalongela, “Mfunguleni mulekeni yachole.” Kiseto cha kumkoma Yesu (Matayo 26:1-5; Maluko 14:1-2; Luka 22:1-2)
11.45: Wayahudi wengi wacholile kumtembelela Malia wachona kiyatendile Yesu, wamtogola.
11.46: Lakini wanhu wayagwe wabwela kwa Mafalisayo, wawalongela kija kiyatendile Yesu.
11.47: Avo Mafalisayo na wakulu wa walava nhosa waiting'hana na wanhu wa mkitala waiuza, “Vino tutende choni? Loleni mbuli za unzonza ziyotenda munhu ino!
11.48: Kamba twahamuleka yagendelele vivo, kila munhu komtogola, na wakulu wa Walumi okwiza na kuinanga Ng'anda yetu ya Imulungu na isi yetu!”
11.49: Imoja wao, yakemigwe Kayafa, yakalile Mkulu wa walava nhosa, kalonga, “Mweye mwa wabozi!
11.50: Vino hamona kamba vinoga ng'hani kumwenu munhu imoja yafe mbuli ya wanhu, kubanza isi yose inangigwe?”
11.51: Halongile vino kwa kugesa mwenyego, lakini kwavija kakala Mkulu wa walava nhosa mwaka awo, kakala yolagula kamba Yesu kofa mbuli ya Wayahudi,
11.52: na siyo kwa Wayahudi waiyeka, lakini vivija kuwagala hamoja wanhu wa Imulungu wapwililike wawe wamoja.
11.53: Kulawa siku dijo wakulu wa Wayahudi wamkalila kiseto Yesu wamkome.
11.54: Avo Yesu hacholile kunze kunze mwiisi ya Yudea, lakini kasegela kachola behi na luwala, kunadibuga dikemigwe Efulahimu, kakala kuko na wanahina zake.
11.55: Kipindi cha nyimwilinyimwili ya Pasaka ya Wayahudi kikala behi kuvika, avo wanhu wengi wachola Yelusalemu ili waisunhe, nyimwilinyimwili ing'hali hainavika.
11.56: Wakala omzahila Yesu, na viwaiting'hane Mng'anda ya Imulungu, waiuza, “Vino mogesaze? Hambe Yesu honda yeze mwiinyimwilinyimwili?”
11.57: Wakulu wa walava nhosa na Mafalisayo walagiza kamba munhu yoyose kakujuwa kuyali Yesu yalonge, ili wamgoge.

12.1: Zing'hali siku sita kuvika nyimwilinyimwili ya Pasaka, Yesu kachola Betania, ukae kumwake Lazalo, ayo iyamzilibule kulawa kwa wafile.
12.2: Wanhu wamtandila ndiya ya ichungulo baho, Mata ayo yakalile yomtaza kugola. Lazalo kakala imoja mna iwanhu wakalile oja na Yesu.
12.3: Abaho Malia kasola nusu lita ya mavuta gonung'hila goya ga bei ng'hulu ng'hani, kambakaza Yesu mmagulu, kagahangusa kwa mvili zake. Ng'anda yose ikala bwiki bwiki mbuli ya gaja gamavuta gonung'hila goya.
12.4: Yuda Isikaliote imoja wa wanahina zake Yesu, ayo yonda yamuhinduke Yesu, kalonga,
12.5: “Vino habali mavuta gano hagauzigwe kwa sente magana madatu, na sente azo wagweleligwe wanhu wakiwa?”
12.6: Kalonga vino siyo kwavija kakala yowatonga wakiwa, lakini kwavija kakala mbavi. Kakala mpapaji wa mkoba wa zisente, na miyanza mingi kakala yosola sente.
12.7: Lakini Yesu kalonga, “Sikumumgaze! Mulekeni yatende vivo mbuli ya siku yangu ya kuzikigwa.
12.8: Wanhu wakiwa mokala nao siku zose, lakini hamkala na niye siku zose.” Kiseto cha kumkoma Lazalo
12.9: Wayahudi wengi wahulika kamba Yesu kakala Betania, avo wachola kuko, siyo mbuli ya Yesu yaiyeka lakini vivija kumona Lazalo, ayo iyamzilibule.
12.10: Avo wakulu wa walava nhosa wakala kiseto cha kumkoma Lazalo vivija,
12.11: kwavija mbuli ya Lazalo Wayahudi wengi wakala owalema na kumtogola Yesu. Yesu kokwingila Yelusalemu kwa ng'henze (Matayo 21:1-11; Maluko 11:1-11; Luka 19:28-40)
12.12: Imitondo yake lunhu mkulu lwizile kuna inyimwilinyimwili ya Pasaka luhulika kamba Yesu kakala yokwiza Yelusalemu.
12.13: Avo wabena mibunho ya biki da mtende na wachola kumbokela, wakemelela, “Imulungu yatogolwe! Imulungu yamtambikile munhu ayo yokwiza kwa twaga da Mndewa! Imulungu yamtambikile Mndewa wa Izilaeli!”
12.14: Yesu kamona mwana wa kihongwe, kamkwela mumgongo, kamba Maandiko Gang'alile vigalonga,
12.15: “Sikuudumbe, isi ya Sayuni! Hano kokwiza Mndewa wako, yakwelile mumgongo wa mwana wa kihongwe.”
12.16: Kipindi acho wanahina zake hawaijuwile mbuli ino. Lakini Yesu viyenuligwe muukulu, wakumbuka kamba Maandiko Gang'alile galonga mbuli ino na wamtendela kamba vivo.
12.17: Wanhu wakalile na Yesu kipindi viyamkemile Lazalo kulawa mdipanga na kumzilibula kulawa kwa wafile, wakala ogabwililisa gaja galawilile.
12.18: Lekaavo lunhu lwa wanhu luchola kumbokela, kwavija luhulika unzonza uno uyatendile.
12.19: Abaho Mafalisayo wailongela, “Mona, hatudaha kutenda chochose! Loleni wanhu wose wa mwiisi omkweleleza!” Wagiliki olonda kulonga na Yesu
12.20: Wagiliki wayagwe wakala mumo mna iwanhu wacholile Yelusalemu kutambika mna ikipindi cha nyimwilinyimwili ya Pasaka.
12.21: Wachola kwa Filipo mwenekae wa Betisaida mwiisi ya Galilaya walonga, “Go mkulu, tolonda tumone Yesu.”
12.22: Filipo kachola na kumulongela Andeleya, abaho wose wabili wachola kumulongela Yesu.
12.23: Yesu kawedika, “Sambi kipindi kivika cha Mwana wa Munhu kubokela ukulu.
12.24: Nowalongeleni ukweli, mhule ya uhemba yosigala imoja siku zose mbaka ilagale hasi ife. Ila yahafa baho yolela na kuwa mhule nyingi.
12.25: Munhu yoyose younogela ugima wake kowagiza, lakini munhu yoyose yowihila ugima wake mwiisi ino kowika kwa ugima wa milele.
12.26: Munhu yoyose yolonda kuwa msang'hanaji wangu kolondigwa yanikweleleze, avo msang'hanaji wangu kokuwa na niye aho honda niwe. Tatangu komgwaa nhogolwa munhu yoyose yonisang'hanila. Yesu kolonga mbuli ya ifa yake
12.27: “Sambi loho yangu yoluma, vino nongeze? Nonge, ‘Tata, sambiutende kipindi kino kivike kumwangu’? Lakini lekaavo niza ili nibite kipindi kino cha madununzo.
